Aglais.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), long clubbed antennae
Aglais.wings: 2 pairs broad scaled wings, angular outer margin, no tails
Aglais.color: orange-red with black-and-yellow forewing costa, blue marginal spots on hindwing
Aglais.key_mark: row of blue lunules bordering the dark hindwing margin

Butterfly.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, long antennae with distinct apical club
Butterfly.wings: 2 pairs broad scaled wings, typically held erect at rest
Butterfly.color: highly variable; often vivid and strongly patterned
Butterfly.key_mark: antennae with distinct club tip distinguishing them from moths

Papilio.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, robust thorax
Papilio.wings: large broad wings; most species with one or more hindwing tails
Papilio.color: typically black with yellow, white, or iridescent blue-green banding
Papilio.key_mark: elongated sword-like hindwing tail(s) on large boldly patterned wings

Swallowtail Butterfly.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, robust thorax
Swallowtail Butterfly.wings: large wings; hindwing typically bears one or more pointed tail projections
Swallowtail Butterfly.color: often black with yellow, white, red, or metallic-blue banding
Swallowtail Butterfly.key_mark: hindwing tail projection(s) absent in almost no other butterfly family

Miltochrista.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Miltochrista.wings: narrow rounded forewings; paler hindwings; tent-like rest posture
Miltochrista.color: rosy-orange to orange-yellow forewing with scattered black dots and streaks
Miltochrista.key_mark: bright rosy-orange ground color with sparse neat black spotting

Moth.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, antennae filiform, bipectinate, or feathered
Moth.wings: 2 pairs scaled wings; usually held flat or tent-like at rest
Moth.color: highly variable; often cryptic brown, gray, or cream
Moth.key_mark: non-clubbed antennae and wings resting flat or tented, not erect

Hypanartia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Hypanartia.wings: broad wings with irregular angular outer margin; no tails
Hypanartia.color: bright orange-tawny with black markings and pale submarginal spots
Hypanartia.key_mark: vivid orange-tawny wings with sharply angular forewing apex

Junonia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Junonia.wings: broad, slightly scalloped wings held flat at rest
Junonia.color: brown to orange-brown ground with large ringed eyespots on all wings
Junonia.key_mark: prominent large eyespots dominating both wing surfaces

Dione.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Dione.wings: elongated forewings; hindwings shorter and rounded
Dione.color: bright orange above with black marks; hindwing underside with silver spots
Dione.key_mark: large metallic silver spots covering hindwing underside

Cryphia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae, compact body
Cryphia.wings: broad rounded forewings held flat over body at rest
Cryphia.color: gray-green mottled with darker streaks; closely mimics bark lichen

Graphium.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, slim body
Graphium.wings: elongated wings; hindwing with one or more narrow sword-like tails
Graphium.color: dark brown-black with green, white, or turquoise band or spot series
Graphium.key_mark: pale green or white band on dark wings with slender hindwing sword-tail

Danaus.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Danaus.wings: large broad wings with rounded apex
Danaus.color: orange with bold black venation and white-spotted black wing borders
Danaus.key_mark: orange ground crossed by heavy black veins with white-dotted black border

Eumorpha.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, stout filiform antennae, spindle-shaped body
Eumorpha.wings: narrow pointed forewings; smaller hindwings; swept-back rest posture
Eumorpha.color: olive-green to brown with pink or rose diagonal forewing bands
Eumorpha.key_mark: bold diagonal forewing banding on spindle body with pink abdominal tones

Hawk Moth.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, thickened filiform antennae, torpedo-shaped body
Hawk Moth.wings: narrow swept-back pointed forewings; small hindwings; extremely rapid wingbeat
Hawk Moth.color: cryptic brown-gray to olive; often colorful hindwings or abdominal bands
Hawk Moth.key_mark: torpedo body with narrow swept wings; hovers in place at flowers

Burnsius.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae with hooked tip, stout body
Burnsius.wings: small broad wings held at oblique angle at rest
Burnsius.color: dark brown-black with white checkered spots across both wings
Burnsius.key_mark: bold black-and-white checkered pattern on small angled wings

Limenitis.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Limenitis.wings: broad wings, slightly angular; characteristic flat gliding flight
Limenitis.color: dark brown to black with bold white median band crossing both wings
Limenitis.key_mark: broad white median band slashing across dark brown-black wings

Zesius.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small compact body
Zesius.wings: small wings; hindwing may bear a short tail
Zesius.color: dark brown-black above with vivid red-orange postdiscal spot; underside pale
Zesius.key_mark: striking red-orange spot on otherwise dark brown upperside

Adelpha.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Adelpha.wings: broad wings with slightly scalloped hindwing margin
Adelpha.color: dark brown-black with bold white median band and orange subapical forewing patch
Adelpha.key_mark: white median band plus orange patch near forewing apex on dark wings

Tegosa.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Tegosa.color: orange-brown tawny with black network and pale submarginal crescent spots
Tegosa.key_mark: tawny orange wings with pale crescent spots along outer margin

Hypolimnas.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Hypolimnas.wings: large broad wings; strong sexual dimorphism in pattern
Hypolimnas.color: male jet-black with large iridescent blue-white disc spots; female variable mimetic
Hypolimnas.key_mark: male's bold iridescent white-blue oval spots on jet-black wings

Polygrammate.structure: 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender moth body
Polygrammate.wings: scaled forewings and hindwings, held roof-like at rest
Polygrammate.color: white forewings with intricate black calligraphic markings
Polygrammate.key_mark: black script-like marks on white forewing resembling Hebrew letters

Chlosyne.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, medium butterfly
Chlosyne.color: black with bold orange-yellow median patch and white marginal spots
Chlosyne.key_mark: large orange-yellow band across black forewing

Zeltus.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, small butterfly
Zeltus.wings: scaled; hindwing with short filamentous tail
Zeltus.key_mark: dense fluffy hair-pencil tufts at hindwing anal angle

Pachliopta.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, large butterfly
Pachliopta.wings: scaled, broad; hindwings with scalloped tails
Pachliopta.color: black wings; bright red body and red spots on hindwing
Pachliopta.key_mark: vivid red abdomen and red submarginal spots on black hindwing

Boloria.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, small butterfly
Boloria.color: tawny orange-brown above with black spots; silver-spotted below

Araschnia.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, small butterfly
Araschnia.color: spring form orange/black; summer form dark brown with white band
Araschnia.key_mark: map-like white-veined network on brownish underside

Agrius.structure: 6 legs, filiform antennae, heavy spindle-shaped body
Agrius.wings: narrow lanceolate scaled forewings; small hindwings
Agrius.color: gray-brown mottled forewings; abdomen with pink and black bands
Agrius.key_mark: alternating pink and black transverse bands on abdomen

Celastrina.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, small butterfly
Celastrina.color: silvery blue above; white with sparse small black dots below
Celastrina.key_mark: whitish-blue underside with small scattered black spots

Parnassius.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, large butterfly
Parnassius.color: white to cream; black spots on forewing; red ocelli on hindwing
Parnassius.key_mark: red-ringed black ocelli on white hindwing

Colotis.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, medium butterfly
Colotis.color: white or pale yellow wings with vivid orange or red forewing apex
Colotis.key_mark: vivid orange or crimson patch at forewing apex

Protogoniomorpha.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, large butterfly
Protogoniomorpha.color: pale brownish above; hindwing underside with pearlescent sheen
Protogoniomorpha.key_mark: mother-of-pearl iridescent sheen on hindwing underside

Melitaea.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, medium butterfly
Melitaea.color: orange-brown with black network above; cream/orange chequered below
Melitaea.key_mark: row of black dots in pale submarginal band on hindwing below

Ematurga.structure: 6 legs, male antennae strongly bipectinate, slender moth body
Ematurga.wings: scaled, held flat and outstretched at rest
Ematurga.color: cream to dark brown with fine wavy darker transverse crossbands
Ematurga.key_mark: fine wavy crossbands on wings held flat; highly variable ground color

Amphipyra.structure: 6 legs, filiform antennae, robust moth body
Amphipyra.wings: scaled; cryptic gray-brown forewings; coppery hindwings
Amphipyra.color: brown-gray cryptic forewings; coppery orange-brown hindwings
Amphipyra.key_mark: coppery orange-brown hindwings revealed in flight

Ypthima.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, small butterfly
Ypthima.color: plain brown above; underside with multiple ringed eyespots
Ypthima.key_mark: row of 4+ ringed ocelli on brown underside

Cilix.structure: 6 legs, filiform antennae, small stout moth body
Cilix.wings: scaled, held flat; white with dark central blotch
Cilix.color: white with a dark gray-brown central patch on each forewing
Cilix.key_mark: bird-dropping mimic: dark central smudge on white wings

Leptotes.structure: 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, tiny butterfly
Leptotes.color: pale blue above; white with brown transverse stripes below
Leptotes.key_mark: brown-and-white striped underside with two ocelli near hindwing tail

Antheraea.structure: 6 legs, male antennae broadly bipectinate, large robust body
Antheraea.wings: broad scaled wings; each wing with large eyespot
Antheraea.color: tan to reddish-brown; large translucent ocellus on each wing
Antheraea.key_mark: large clear-windowed eyespot on each hindwing

Silk Moth.structure: 6 legs, antennae broadly bipectinate (esp. male), robust body
Silk Moth.wings: large broad scaled wings; often with eyespots or elongated tails
Silk Moth.color: variable tan, brown, or green; prominent eyespots common
Silk Moth.key_mark: large prominent eyespots and/or elongated hindwing tails

Colotois.structure: 6 legs, male antennae strongly bipectinate, slender moth body
Colotois.wings: scaled, held flat at rest; outer margin toothed
Colotois.color: warm ochre to orange-buff with darker toothed transverse lines
Colotois.key_mark: strongly feathered male antennae on orange-buff toothed-line wings

Acraea.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), long clubbed antennae
Acraea.wings: broad scaled wings, slightly leathery and semi-translucent
Acraea.color: tawny orange with bold black venation and checkered black margins
Acraea.key_mark: brick-orange ground with heavy black vein network across entire wing

Colias.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout body, pink-tipped clubbed antennae
Colias.wings: broad rounded scaled wings, held closed at rest
Colias.color: yellow to deep orange above; solid black marginal border; underside greenish
Colias.key_mark: bright yellow or orange upperwing with unbroken solid black outer border

Candalides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender body, clubbed antennae
Candalides.color: blue-gray to brown above; underside bearing yellow-orange spots
Candalides.key_mark: bold yellow or orange spots set against blue-gray or brown wing ground

Doratifera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout body, bipectinate antennae in males
Doratifera.wings: broad scaled wings with rounded apex
Doratifera.color: olive-green to greenish-brown with four pale whitish forewing spots
Doratifera.key_mark: four distinct pale spots arranged across the forewing

Vanessa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Vanessa.wings: angular scaled wings with slightly scalloped hindwing margin
Vanessa.color: dark brown to black with orange-red bands and white apical spots
Vanessa.key_mark: bold orange-red band across black wings with white spots near apex

Xenophanes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout thorax, hooked clubbed antennae
Xenophanes.wings: dark scaled wings with hyaline (glassy) windows on forewing
Xenophanes.color: dark brown with large translucent hyaline patches on forewing
Xenophanes.key_mark: large glassy hyaline windows occupying much of the forewing

Euplagia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust body, filiform antennae
Euplagia.wings: broad scaled wings, held flat or tent-like at rest
Euplagia.color: dark brown forewing with cream stripes; hindwing orange-red with black spots
Euplagia.key_mark: cream-striped dark forewing contrasting bright orange-red spotted hindwing

Autographa.wings: narrow mottled scaled forewings; paler hindwings
Autographa.color: mottled gray-brown forewing; pale whitish hindwing
Autographa.key_mark: metallic silver Y- or gamma-shaped mark on mid-forewing

Euptoieta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Euptoieta.wings: broad scaled wings with slightly angular forewing
Euptoieta.color: tawny orange with black lines and spots; underside lacking large silver spots
Euptoieta.key_mark: tawny fritillary pattern without large silver spots on hindwing underside

Hamadryas.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Hamadryas.color: mottled blue-gray and white with black ocelli on both wings
Hamadryas.key_mark: blue-gray cryptic mosaic of ocelli; rests head-down on tree trunks

Deilephila.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust fusiform body, long curved antennae
Deilephila.wings: narrow pointed scaled forewings; smaller hindwings
Deilephila.color: olive-green with vivid rose-pink bands on body and wings
Deilephila.key_mark: vivid rose-pink and olive-green banding across body and wings

Lethe.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Lethe.color: warm brown with pale-centered eyespots ringed in gold or cream
Lethe.key_mark: row of pearly white-pupiled eyespots along both wing margins

Alsophila.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; female wingless
Alsophila.wings: male: thin pale gray-brown scaled wings; female: vestigial stubs only
Alsophila.color: pale gray-brown with faint darker wavy crosslines (male only)
Alsophila.key_mark: female entirely wingless; male plain pale with subtle dark wavy crosslines

Spodoptera.wings: scaled; mottled forewing; pale plain hindwing
Spodoptera.color: mottled gray-brown forewing with pale oblique streak; white hindwing
Spodoptera.key_mark: pale oblique streak through mottled forewing; brilliant white hindwing

Lerema.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout thorax, hooked clubbed antennae
Lerema.wings: dark scaled wings with small hyaline spots on forewing
Lerema.color: dark blackish-brown with purple gloss and small glassy forewing spots
Lerema.key_mark: very dark wings with purple iridescent gloss and tiny glassy forewing spots

Agrotis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout body, filiform antennae
Agrotis.wings: narrow mottled forewing; pale plain hindwing
Agrotis.color: gray to brown mottled forewing with kidney spot and dart mark
Agrotis.key_mark: wedge-shaped black dart mark flanking kidney spot on mottled forewing

Manduca.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very large robust fusiform body, long antennae
Manduca.wings: narrow elongated scaled forewings; smaller hindwings
Manduca.color: gray-brown with row of bold yellow lateral abdominal spots
Manduca.key_mark: very large hawkmoth with conspicuous yellow spots along abdomen sides

Eurytides.wings: elongated kite-shaped forewings; long spatulate hindwing tails
Eurytides.color: white to pale green with bold black zebra-stripe pattern
Eurytides.key_mark: kite-shaped wings with black zebra stripes and long spatulate tails

Phyllodesma.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust body, bipectinate antennae
Phyllodesma.wings: broad scaled wings with strongly scalloped outer margins
Phyllodesma.color: cryptic dead-leaf brown with darker wavy transverse crosslines
Phyllodesma.key_mark: strongly scalloped wing margins with cryptic dead-leaf brown camouflage

Anartia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Anartia.color: bold red or white ground color with black borders and contrasting bands
Anartia.key_mark: vivid bicolor pattern of scarlet-red or white boldly outlined in black

Heraclides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long clubbed antennae, broad thorax
Heraclides.wings: 4 broad scaled wings; hindwings each with single elongated tail
Heraclides.color: black with bold yellow diagonal band crossing all wings
Heraclides.key_mark: bold yellow diagonal band on black wings; hindwing tails

Coenonympha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), slender clubbed antennae
Coenonympha.wings: 4 rounded scaled wings; underside bears submarginal eyespot row
Coenonympha.color: tawny-orange above; underside pale buff with white-ringed eyespots
Coenonympha.key_mark: row of small white-ringed eyespots along pale buff underside hindwing

Dryadula.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), slender clubbed antennae
Dryadula.wings: 4 scaled wings; elongated forewing, narrow hindwing
Dryadula.color: bright orange with bold transverse black bands on all wings
Dryadula.key_mark: vivid orange ground with striking bold black transverse banding

Hipparchia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs reduced), thin clubbed antennae
Hipparchia.color: cryptic gray-brown above with pale median band; underside mottled gray
Hipparchia.key_mark: bark-cryptic mottled gray underside; rests closed-winged on bare ground

Emmelia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender moth build
Emmelia.wings: 4 scaled wings; forewing yellow with black markings
Emmelia.color: bright yellow forewings with bold black costal spots and median streak
Emmelia.key_mark: vivid yellow-and-black spotted small forewing; day-flying noctuid

Catopsilia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, thin clubbed antennae; medium-sized build
Catopsilia.color: pale lemon-yellow to white; female often white with greenish wash
Catopsilia.key_mark: uniformly pale lemon-yellow wings; strong long-distance migrant

Dyseriocrania.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, simple filiform antennae; tiny primitive moth
Dyseriocrania.wings: 4 lanceolate scaled wings with metallic iridescent scales
Dyseriocrania.color: dark bronze-brown forewing with iridescent gold or purple metallic spots
Dyseriocrania.key_mark: metallic iridescent forewing spots; minute early-spring primitive moth

Nymphalis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Nymphalis.wings: 4 scaled wings with strongly scalloped angular margins
Nymphalis.color: tawny orange-brown with black spots above; blue submarginal lunules
Nymphalis.key_mark: ragged scalloped wing margins with blue submarginal spots on tawny ground

Maniola.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), thin clubbed antennae
Maniola.wings: 4 rounded scaled wings; forewing with apical eyespot patch
Maniola.color: dull brown above; isolated orange-buff forewing patch enclosing eyespot
Maniola.key_mark: single black-and-white eyespot set in isolated orange-buff forewing patch

Cebysa.structure: male: 6 legs, bipectinate antennae; female legless and wingless
Cebysa.wings: male: 4 sparsely scaled semitransparent wings; female: none
Cebysa.color: male pale gray-white; larval case encrusted with lichen fragments
Cebysa.key_mark: larval portable case decorated with lichen and plant material

Diacrisia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pectinate (male) or filiform antennae
Diacrisia.wings: 4 broad rounded scaled wings; hindwings brighter than forewings
Diacrisia.color: male pale buff-yellow forewing with dark spots; orange-yellow hindwing
Diacrisia.key_mark: pale buff spotted forewing contrasting bright orange-yellow hindwing

Polygonia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Polygonia.wings: 4 scaled wings with deeply jagged notched margins
Polygonia.color: tawny orange-brown with dark spots above; dark cryptic bark-like underside
Polygonia.key_mark: deeply ragged wing outline + white comma mark on dark underside hindwing

Ortilia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Ortilia.wings: 4 scaled wings; forewing slightly pointed at apex
Ortilia.color: orange-brown with black borders; pale crescent spots along hindwing margin
Ortilia.key_mark: pale crescent spot band along hindwing margin on orange-brown ground

Mimas.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bipectinate antennae; heavy spindle-shaped body
Mimas.wings: 4 scaled wings; hindwing outer margin strongly wavy/scalloped
Mimas.color: forewing mottled olive-green and brown; hindwing pink-buff with olive patch
Mimas.key_mark: strongly scalloped hindwing margin; mossy green-brown marbled forewing

Lycaena.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, thin clubbed antennae; small compact body
Lycaena.color: forewing brilliant copper-orange with black spots and dark margin
Lycaena.key_mark: gleaming copper-orange forewing contrasting gray-brown hindwing

Heteropterus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hooked clubbed antennae; stout skipper body
Heteropterus.color: dark brown above; underside hindwing dark with large bold cream-white spots
Heteropterus.key_mark: large bold cream-white spots on dark brown underside hindwing

Hippotion.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; torpedo-shaped abdomen
Hippotion.wings: 4 narrow scaled wings; forewing apex pointed
Hippotion.color: olive-brown body with pale longitudinal stripes; hindwings pink and black
Hippotion.key_mark: pale longitudinal body stripes + pink hindwing revealed in hovering flight

Pararge.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), thin clubbed antennae
Pararge.color: dark brown with scattered irregular pale cream-yellow blotches and eyespots
Pararge.key_mark: dark brown wings with scattered pale cream spots and forewing apical eyespot

Lasiocampa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; male strongly bipectinate antennae; stout hairy
Lasiocampa.wings: 4 broad scaled wings, no frenulum; tent posture at rest
Lasiocampa.color: rich chestnut-brown with pale transverse band; white discal spot on forewing
Lasiocampa.key_mark: stout furry body; brown forewing with pale cross-band and white central spot

Melanargia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), thin clubbed antennae
Melanargia.color: bold black-and-white chessboard pattern across all four wings
Melanargia.key_mark: unmistakable stark black-and-white chessboard wing pattern

Atteva.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, long filiform antennae
Atteva.wings: narrow scaled forewings held flat over body at rest
Atteva.color: bright orange-yellow forewings with white spots ringed in black
Atteva.key_mark: orange wings with bold rows of white-and-black spots

Pontia.wings: broad scaled wings, white with bold dark markings
Pontia.color: white with black checkered spots; underside with greenish-gray vein tracery
Pontia.key_mark: white wings with black checkerboard spots and greenish underside veins

Ligdia.wings: broad wings held flat in geometer resting posture
Ligdia.color: white with dark brown scorched patches at outer wing margins
Ligdia.key_mark: white wings with dark brown burnt-looking patches at outer margins

Amathusia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Amathusia.color: dull brown above with ochreous patches; large eyespots on underside
Amathusia.key_mark: large eyespots on underside of broad dark brown wings

Pseudaphelia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, broadly bipectinate antennae (males)
Pseudaphelia.color: pale tawny to yellowish with darker crossband markings
Pseudaphelia.key_mark: robust body, broad rounded wings, feathery bipectinate male antennae

Tyria.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, slender filiform antennae
Tyria.wings: narrow dark forewings; broad crimson hindwings
Tyria.color: slate-gray forewings with red streak and two red spots; hindwings crimson
Tyria.key_mark: black forewing with red streaks and spots; crimson hindwings

Xestia.wings: narrow forewings held tent-like over abdomen at rest
Xestia.color: gray-brown forewings with dark reniform spot and pale subreniform area
Xestia.key_mark: dark C- or dagger-shaped marking on gray-brown forewing

Argynnis.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Argynnis.color: bright tawny orange with bold black spots; silvery streaks on hindwing below
Argynnis.key_mark: silvery longitudinal streaks on green-washed hindwing underside

Acherontia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, massive thorax, short pectinate antennae
Acherontia.color: brown-black forewings; yellow hindwings; yellow abdomen banded black and blue
Acherontia.key_mark: skull-shaped pale pattern on thorax dorsum

Phyciodes.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Phyciodes.color: orange with black borders and spots; pale crescent on hindwing underside
Phyciodes.key_mark: pale crescent spot on dark hindwing underside margin

Athyma.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Athyma.color: dark brown to black with bold white median band and marginal spots
Athyma.key_mark: bold white median band across dark brown wings

Moduza.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Moduza.wings: medium, broad with slightly angled forewing apex
Moduza.color: rich dark brown with a single broad white transverse median band
Moduza.key_mark: single broad white band bisecting dark brown wings

Spoladea.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, long labial palps, filiform antennae
Spoladea.wings: narrow, held flat; pyraloid resting posture
Spoladea.color: dark brown with irregular wavy white transverse bands
Spoladea.key_mark: dark brown wings with wavy white crossbands

Euthalia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Euthalia.color: olive-green to brown with pale spot bands; male often iridescent green
Euthalia.key_mark: strong sexual dimorphism; male with iridescent greenish sheen

Euploea.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Euploea.color: dark chocolate-brown to black with marginal and submarginal white spots
Euploea.key_mark: dark brown wings with rows of white marginal spots

Erebia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Erebia.color: dark sooty-brown with rusty-red submarginal band of white-pupilled eyespots
Erebia.key_mark: sooty wings with rusty-red eyespot band

Badamia.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, large eyes, angled-club skipper antennae
Badamia.color: uniform dark brown above; paler below; no bold pattern
Badamia.key_mark: large skipper with long narrow pointed wings; plain uniform brown

Chilades.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; hindwing with short tail
Chilades.wings: small, rounded; hindwing with short filiform tail
Chilades.color: brilliant blue dorsally (males); underside pale with dark spots and ocelli
Chilades.key_mark: brilliant blue dorsal surface; underside ocellate spots near hindwing tail

Pieris.color: white with black forewing tip patch; one or two black spots on forewing
Pieris.key_mark: white wings with black forewing tip and 1-2 round black spots

Yramea.structure: 3 body segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Yramea.wings: medium, rounded with slightly scalloped edges
Yramea.color: tawny orange with black spots above; silver spots on hindwing underside
Yramea.key_mark: orange fritillary with metallic silver spots on hindwing underside

Parallelia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, medium stout body
Parallelia.wings: 2 pairs scaled wings; forewings held flat, hindwings concealed at rest
Parallelia.color: warm brown with two dark oblique streaks across forewing
Parallelia.key_mark: pair of parallel dark diagonal forewing lines on warm brown ground

Mellilla.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Mellilla.wings: broad rounded scaled wings held flat; geometer resting posture
Mellilla.color: uniform vivid orange-yellow across all wings
Mellilla.key_mark: all wings uniform bright orange-yellow; unique among geometers

Iphiclides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, elongated abdomen
Iphiclides.wings: large scaled wings; hindwings with exceptionally long slender tails
Iphiclides.color: cream-white with bold black tiger stripes; blue and orange submarginal spots
Iphiclides.key_mark: extremely long slender hindwing tails with bold black stripes on pale ground

Pseudopanthera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Pseudopanthera.wings: broad wings held flat at rest; day-flying geometer posture
Pseudopanthera.color: bright yellow with scattered irregular dark brown blotches
Pseudopanthera.key_mark: bright yellow wings with dark brown spots; diurnal flight

Eudocima.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bipectinate antennae (male), robust body
Eudocima.wings: cryptic mottled forewings; hindwings bright orange with black spots
Eudocima.color: bark-brown cryptic forewings concealing orange hindwings with black dots
Eudocima.key_mark: orange hindwings with bold black spots hidden under cryptic brown forewings

Cerura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bipectinate antennae (male), densely furry thorax
Cerura.wings: white forewings with fine dark gray reticulate tracery; hindwings white
Cerura.color: white with intricate dark gray grid markings; abdomen striped gray
Cerura.key_mark: very fluffy white body and intricate dark tracery on white forewings

Utetheisa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Utetheisa.wings: narrow elongate forewings; smaller rounded hindwings
Utetheisa.color: white forewing densely spotted red and black; hindwing white with black border
Utetheisa.key_mark: dense red and black spots on white forewing; unmistakable tiger-moth pattern

Lampides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small slender body
Lampides.wings: small scaled wings; hindwing with short fine tail and small lobe
Lampides.color: male violet-blue above; underside white-barred brown with orange-capped eyespot
Lampides.key_mark: orange-capped black eyespot near short hindwing tail on white-barred underside

Leptosia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, very slender body
Leptosia.wings: small rounded white wings; characteristically slow fluttery wingbeats
Leptosia.color: white with single round black spot near forewing apex
Leptosia.key_mark: tiny all-white butterfly with one black forewing spot; fluttery weak flight

Anarta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, stout noctuid body
Anarta.wings: cryptically patterned forewings held flat; hindwings pale unmarked
Anarta.color: gray-brown with pale reniform and orbicular spots; dark subterminal band
Anarta.key_mark: marbled gray-brown forewing with contrasting pale kidney-shaped reniform spot

Ascalapha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, large robust body
Ascalapha.wings: very large broad wings; scalloped margins; pointed forewing apex
Ascalapha.color: dark brown-black with faint iridescent purple sheen; pale C-mark on forewing
Ascalapha.key_mark: bat-sized dark moth with scalloped wings and pale C-shaped forewing mark

Scopula.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Scopula.wings: broad wings held flat; delicate parallel wavy cross-lines across surface
Scopula.color: pale cream-white with multiple fine brown wavy parallel lines on all wings
Scopula.key_mark: pale wings crossed by numerous fine wavy parallel lines with dotted outer border

Pharmacophagus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, large robust body
Pharmacophagus.wings: very large wings; hindwings with broad spatulate tails
Pharmacophagus.color: black with white submarginal spots; red patches on body and hindwing base
Pharmacophagus.key_mark: enormous black butterfly with white spots and red body markings; Madagascar only

Pachysphinx.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, thickened antennae, heavy torpedo-shaped body
Pachysphinx.wings: long pointed narrow forewings; smaller hindwings; powerful hovering flight
Pachysphinx.color: pale gray-brown cryptic forewings; hindwings with rose-pink band and black bar
Pachysphinx.key_mark: gray cryptic forewings with bright rose-pink hindwings revealed in flight

Lymantria.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; male strongly bipectinate, female filiform antennae
Lymantria.wings: male: brown patterned wings; female: white wings, abdomen very bulky
Lymantria.color: male tan-brown with dark wavy cross-bands; female white with dark wavy marks
Lymantria.key_mark: extreme sexual dimorphism: tan patterned male vs white bulky pale female

Delias.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, medium body
Delias.wings: broad rounded scaled wings; hindwing underside boldly patterned
Delias.color: white or pale upperside; hindwing underside boldly patterned red, yellow, black
Delias.key_mark: brilliant red, yellow, and black hindwing underside visible at rest

Carthaea.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bipectinate antennae, robust body
Carthaea.wings: large broad wings resembling saturniid; no ocellate eyespots
Carthaea.color: warm brown with pale cream patches and darker longitudinal streaks
Carthaea.key_mark: sole Carthaeidae member; large brown saturniid-like moth lacking eyespots

Afrodryas.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, medium body
Afrodryas.wings: broad rounded scaled wings; underside cryptically leaf-patterned
Afrodryas.color: orange-tawny upperside with dark borders; underside mimics dried autumn leaf
Afrodryas.key_mark: cryptic dead-leaf underside sharply contrasting with orange-tawny upperside

Polyommatus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small slender body
Polyommatus.wings: small rounded scaled wings; no tails
Polyommatus.color: male vivid sky-blue above, narrow dark border; female brown with orange lunules
Polyommatus.key_mark: male vivid sky-blue upperside with narrow dark border; female brown with orange lunules

Gangara.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hooked-clubbed antennae, large stout body
Gangara.wings: broad triangular forewings; rapid darting skipper flight
Gangara.color: dark brown-black with small white hyaline forewing spots; unmarked hindwing
Gangara.key_mark: very large skipper with strikingly prominent red compound eyes

Rathinda.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, slender abdomen
Rathinda.wings: two pairs scaled wings; hindwing with long filamentous tail(s)
Rathinda.color: dark brown above with white and dull orange spots; pale underside
Rathinda.key_mark: long whip-like filamentous hindwing tail on a small dark lycaenid

Perizoma.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Perizoma.wings: two pairs scaled wings, broad forewings held flat at rest
Perizoma.color: white or pale ground with contrasting brown transverse bands
Perizoma.key_mark: bold dark crossband bisecting a white forewing

Pyrausta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender body
Pyrausta.wings: two pairs scaled wings; forewings held flat or slightly tented
Pyrausta.color: straw-yellow to purplish ground with pale transverse bars or spots
Pyrausta.key_mark: small size with straw or purplish ground and pale transverse wing bars

Heteronympha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Heteronympha.wings: two pairs broad scaled wings, rounded hindwings
Heteronympha.color: rich tawny brown with bold orange forewing patch and black eyespot(s)
Heteronympha.key_mark: large orange forewing patch bearing a prominent black-and-white eyespot

Charaxes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae, stout thorax
Charaxes.wings: two pairs broad scaled wings; angular forewing, hindwing with 1-2 tails
Charaxes.color: orange-brown above with cream submarginal band; underside intricately patterned
Charaxes.key_mark: two hindwing tails on a large fast-flying orange-and-cream butterfly

Cossus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bipectinate antennae (male), very stout heavy body
Cossus.wings: two pairs scaled wings, narrow forewing with dense reticulate pattern
Cossus.color: gray-brown with fine dark reticulate streaking throughout wings
Cossus.key_mark: massive heavy body with bark-textured reticulate forewing pattern

Chrysoteuchia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, projecting labial palps
Chrysoteuchia.wings: two pairs scaled wings; narrow forewings rolled tightly to body at rest
Chrysoteuchia.color: creamy straw-yellow with faint pale longitudinal streaks
Chrysoteuchia.key_mark: straw-colored wings wrapped tight to body at rest, mimicking a grass stem

Trapezites.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae with recurved hook and apiculus
Trapezites.wings: two pairs scaled wings, triangular forewing; darting powerful flight
Trapezites.color: dark brown with yellow-orange spots above; white spots on pale underside
Trapezites.key_mark: hooked skipper antennae plus dark brown wings with yellow spot array

Myscelia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Myscelia.wings: two pairs broad scaled wings, slightly angular forewing apex
Myscelia.color: blackish-brown with bold iridescent blue bands crossing both wings
Myscelia.key_mark: electric iridescent blue bands on dark blackish wings

Callophrys.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small slender body
Callophrys.wings: two pairs scaled wings; hindwing tail absent or vestigial in most species
Callophrys.color: upperside plain brown; entire underside vivid bright green
Callophrys.key_mark: solid vivid-green underwing visible when wings closed at rest

Ichneutica.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, stout noctuid body
Ichneutica.wings: two pairs scaled wings; forewings held roof-like at rest
Ichneutica.color: gray-brown mottled forewing with indistinct markings; pale hindwing
Ichneutica.key_mark: uniform drab gray-brown mottled forewing with poorly defined noctuid spots

Chrysodeixis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, smooth-scaled body
Chrysodeixis.wings: two pairs scaled wings; forewings held flat to slightly tented
Chrysodeixis.color: golden-brown forewing with two silver or metallic spots near center
Chrysodeixis.key_mark: paired silver metallic spots on a golden-brown forewing

Arctia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, densely hairy thorax
Arctia.wings: two pairs scaled wings; hindwings boldly patterned in warning colors
Arctia.color: streaked brown-cream forewing; red or orange hindwing with black spots
Arctia.key_mark: vivid red or orange hindwing with bold black spots flashed as warning

Daphnis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, torpedo-shaped body
Daphnis.wings: two pairs narrow swept-back scaled wings; hovers in flight
Daphnis.color: complex mosaic of olive-green, pink-lilac, and white geometric patches
Daphnis.key_mark: large hawkmoth with intricate olive-green and pink camouflage mosaic

Dichagyris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, medium noctuid body
Dichagyris.wings: two pairs scaled wings; forewings held roof-like at rest
Dichagyris.color: pale gray to ochre-brown forewing with dark reniform and orbicular spots
Dichagyris.key_mark: pale gray-ochre forewing with contrasting dark kidney-shaped reniform spot

Cupido.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, very small slender body
Cupido.wings: two pairs scaled wings; hindwing with single short filamentous tail
Cupido.color: male blue above; pale gray-white below with black spots and orange lunules
Cupido.key_mark: single delicate hair-like hindwing tail setting it apart from tailless blues

Glaucopsyche.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small slender body
Glaucopsyche.wings: two pairs scaled wings, no tails
Glaucopsyche.color: blue above; pale gray below with one arc of large dark spots, no outer band
Glaucopsyche.key_mark: single bold row of black spots on plain gray underside, no submarginal band

Battus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, robust body
Battus.wings: two pairs broad scaled wings; hindwing typically lacks tails
Battus.color: black with a chain of yellow or gold submarginal spots on both wings
Battus.key_mark: tailless large swallowtail with gold submarginal spot chain on black wings

Talicada.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small compact body
Talicada.wings: two pairs scaled wings, no tails
Talicada.color: white forewing with black border; scarlet-red hindwing with black spots
Talicada.key_mark: stark two-tone contrast of white forewing against bright red hindwing

Jamides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, small slender body
Jamides.wings: two pairs scaled wings; short hindwing tail usually present
Jamides.color: male brilliant pale cerulean-blue above; white below with fine brown streaks
Jamides.key_mark: washed-out pale cerulean-blue upperside, lighter than most lycaenid blues

Heliconius.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), long clubbed antennae
Heliconius.wings: 2 pairs scaled; forewings distinctly long and narrow
Heliconius.color: black ground with bold red, orange, yellow, or white bands; mimetic
Heliconius.key_mark: extremely elongated narrow forewings with vivid warning-color bands

Pantoporia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Pantoporia.color: tawny orange upperside with black borders and white subapical spots
Pantoporia.key_mark: bright orange wings with bold black margins and white spot row

Feredayia.wings: 2 pairs scaled; forewings held flat at rest
Feredayia.color: bright green with pale longitudinal streaks matching grass blades
Feredayia.key_mark: bright grass-green forewings with pale longitudinal streaking

Chiasmia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; rests with wings spread flat
Chiasmia.wings: 2 pairs scaled, broad; typical geometer resting posture
Chiasmia.color: pale cream to white with dense dark brown lattice crosslines
Chiasmia.key_mark: fine dark lattice grid crosslines covering pale wing surface

Actias.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; males with broad bipectinate antennae
Actias.wings: 2 pairs large scaled; hindwings produced into long twisted tails
Actias.color: pale lime-green with pink-yellow wing margins and small eyespots
Actias.key_mark: long sinuous hindwing tails on large lime-green wings

Schinia.wings: 2 pairs scaled; forewings held roof-like at rest
Schinia.color: highly variable; often white, pink, or yellow matching host flowers
Schinia.key_mark: cryptic flower-matching coloration; typically rests on flowerheads

Noctua.wings: 2 pairs scaled; forewings tent-like concealing hindwings at rest
Noctua.color: dull brown-gray forewings; hindwings bright yellow with black border
Noctua.key_mark: flash of vivid yellow hindwings with black terminal band when disturbed

Perina.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; males with bipectinate antennae
Perina.wings: forewings scaled; hindwings largely translucent clearwing
Perina.color: white to pale gray with sparse dark spots; hindwings glassy
Perina.key_mark: near-transparent hindwings on a tussock-moth body plan

Temenis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Temenis.color: vivid red-orange upperside with black apex and scattered white spots
Temenis.key_mark: intense red-orange wings with black forewing apex and white spots

Erebus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; large robust body
Erebus.wings: 2 pairs large scaled; cryptic bark-pattern at rest
Erebus.color: dark brown-black with complex mottled pattern and large ringed eyespots
Erebus.key_mark: large owl-like ringed eyespots on hindwings

Heterusia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; rests with wings spread flat
Heterusia.wings: 2 pairs scaled, broad; typical geometer posture
Heterusia.color: orange-yellow ground with contrasting dark brown crosslines and spots
Heterusia.key_mark: bright orange-yellow wings with bold dark geometric markings

Brenthis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Brenthis.color: tawny orange with black spots above; hindwing underside marbled violet-silver
Brenthis.key_mark: marbled purple-silver hindwing underside with pearly spot row

Amiga.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Amiga.color: brown with iridescent blue-violet upperwing patches and small eyespots
Amiga.key_mark: contrasting iridescent blue-violet patch on brown satyrid wings

Hypena.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; labial palps long, projecting forward as snout
Hypena.wings: 2 pairs scaled; narrow wings held angled delta-like at rest
Hypena.color: mottled brown-gray with darker streaks and faint crosslines
Hypena.key_mark: long forward-projecting snout (labial palps) conspicuous at rest

Carterocephalus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae with hooked apiculus
Carterocephalus.wings: 2 pairs scaled; skipper posture at rest
Carterocephalus.color: dark blackish-brown with bold cream-yellow spots forming checkerboard
Carterocephalus.key_mark: bold checkerboard cream-yellow spots on dark brown wings

Striphnopteryx.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; males with broad bipectinate antennae
Striphnopteryx.wings: 2 pairs large scaled; robust eupterotid wing shape
Striphnopteryx.color: ochreous to reddish-brown with dark striated and scalloped markings
Striphnopteryx.key_mark: large robust moth with heavily textured brown wings and pectinate antennae

Oligographa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; fusiform tapering abdomen; thickened antennae
Oligographa.wings: 2 pairs scaled; narrow pointed forewings; typical hawkmoth silhouette
Oligographa.color: cryptic gray-brown with darker streaks along wing veins
Oligographa.key_mark: hawkmoth fusiform body with narrow swept-back gray-brown forewings

Gonepteryx.wings: 2 pairs scaled; strongly pointed and angled leaf-like wing margins
Gonepteryx.color: males bright sulfur-yellow or orange-flushed; females pale greenish-white
Gonepteryx.key_mark: strongly angled leaf-shaped wing outline; male sulfur-yellow coloration

Chioides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae with apiculus
Chioides.wings: 2 pairs scaled; hindwings produced into very long narrow tails
Chioides.color: brown with translucent white forewing spots; pale stripe on hindwing tails
Chioides.key_mark: exceptionally long striped hindwing tails among skippers

Neptis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae

Neptis.color: dark brown to black with white bands and spots in regular rows
Neptis.key_mark: gliding sailer flight; bold white bands on dark brown wings

Geometra.wings: broad fore- and hindwings held fully spread flat at rest
Geometra.color: uniform vivid sea-green with fine pale white transverse strigae
Geometra.key_mark: uniform vivid sea-green wings with faint white cross-lines

Zizeeria.wings: small rounded, held closed at rest showing spotted underside
Zizeeria.color: male dorsum iridescent violet-blue; underside pale gray with dark spots
Zizeeria.key_mark: tiny bright blue butterfly with spotted pale gray underside

Trogonoptera.wings: very large; elongated black forewings; no tails
Trogonoptera.color: jet black with diagonal band of metallic emerald-green forewing spots
Trogonoptera.key_mark: row of electric-green chevrons across jet-black forewings

Acrolophus.structure: 3-segmented body, 6 legs, long projecting labial palps, filiform antennae
Acrolophus.wings: narrow forewings held tent-like over body at rest
Acrolophus.color: mottled tawny to gray-brown, no bright markings
Acrolophus.key_mark: very long sickle-curved labial palps projecting forward

Eurema.color: bright yellow with bold black forewing apex and outer border
Eurema.key_mark: bright yellow wings with sharply defined black forewing tip

Erynnis.structure: robust stocky body, 6 legs, antennal club with hooked tip
Erynnis.wings: small, held flat; dull mottled pattern
Erynnis.color: sooty dark brown with intricate pale gray-brown mottling
Erynnis.key_mark: all-dark sooty-brown wings, cryptic gray flecking, no bright marks

Polyura.structure: robust 3-segmented body, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Polyura.wings: large; hindwings with 2 short spatulate tails
Polyura.color: bold cream-white patches on dark olive-black wings
Polyura.key_mark: twin short spatulate hindwing tails with bold cream median band

Melanitis.structure: medium 3-segmented body, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Melanitis.wings: large; forewing apex pointed or angular; cryptic leaf-like underside
Melanitis.color: warm brown; prominent eyespot near forewing apex; cryptic underside
Melanitis.key_mark: large eyespot near angular forewing apex, dead-leaf underside

Lamproptera.wings: narrow, semi-transparent; hindwing with extremely long ribbon tail
Lamproptera.color: white or pale green with bold black venation on translucent wings
Lamproptera.key_mark: extremely long filiform hindwing ribbon tail

Xylophanes.color: olive-tan forewing with oblique pale streaks; pink to buff hindwing
Xylophanes.key_mark: diagonal pale streaks on olive forewing with pink hindwing flash

Pheosia.wings: medium; held tent-like; raised ridge on inner margin at rest
Pheosia.color: white with dark brown longitudinal streaks; white wedge on inner forewing
Pheosia.key_mark: large white wedge on inner forewing margin contrasting dark streaks

Manataria.structure: medium 3-segmented body, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae
Manataria.wings: medium-large rounded; satyrine venation with swollen forewing veins
Manataria.color: dark brown with conspicuous scattered white spots on all wings
Manataria.key_mark: scattered white spots on dark brown wings

Hyalophora.structure: large robust 3-segmented body, 6 legs, broad bipectinate antennae
Hyalophora.wings: very large broad; red-bordered crescent eyespots on all 4 wings
Hyalophora.color: reddish-brown; white crescents red-bordered on each wing; red collar
Hyalophora.key_mark: white crescent spots edged in red on all 4 wings, red thorax collar

Phoebis.color: bright yellow to deep orange; female may have dark-spotted border
Phoebis.key_mark: large uniformly bright yellow to orange wings, minimal patterning

Blepharomastix.color: white to pale cream with dark spots having pale unfilled centers
Blepharomastix.key_mark: white wings with hollow-centered doughnut-like dark spots

Harrisimemna.wings: medium forewings held tent-like at rest
Harrisimemna.color: pale gray-white forewing with 3 large bold black spots
Harrisimemna.key_mark: three large isolated black spots on pale gray forewing

Hyles.structure: robust fusiform 3-segmented body, 6 legs, filiform antennae
Hyles.wings: narrow pointed forewings; rose-pink hindwings with dark border
Hyles.color: streaked tan-brown forewing with longitudinal pale stripes; pink hindwing
Hyles.key_mark: bold pale longitudinal stripes on forewing, rose-pink hindwing

Protambulyx.wings: long narrow pointed forewings; narrow hindwings
Protambulyx.color: straw-yellow to olive forewing with dark longitudinal streaks
Protambulyx.key_mark: dark longitudinal streaks on pale straw forewing, elongated wing

Pachylioides.structure: robust fusiform 3-segmented body, 6 legs, filiform antennae
Pachylioides.wings: narrow elongated forewings; smaller pinkish hindwings
Pachylioides.color: olive-brown streaked forewing; contrasting pinkish-buff hindwing
Pachylioides.key_mark: olive-streaked forewing with bright pinkish-buff hindwing contrast

Cisseps.wings: narrow dark forewings held flat or slightly rolled at rest
Cisseps.color: blue-black wings and body; vivid orange-yellow thoracic collar
Cisseps.key_mark: vivid orange-yellow collar on all-dark wasp-mimic body

Opisthograptis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, slender geometrid body
Opisthograptis.wings: broad scaled wings, held flat at rest
Opisthograptis.color: uniform bright sulfur-yellow; small rust-brown costal blotches
Opisthograptis.key_mark: all-yellow wings with rust blotch near forewing costa

Mesocelis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout hairy body, bipectinate antennae (male)
Mesocelis.wings: broad scaled wings, held tent-like at rest
Mesocelis.color: brownish-buff ground with contrasting white discal spots
Mesocelis.key_mark: white spots on dark brown lasiocampid wings

Macroglossum.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust spindle body, short bipectinate antennae
Macroglossum.wings: narrow pointed forewings; rapid hover-flight wingbeat
Macroglossum.color: olive-brown forewings, bright orange-buff hindwings, banded abdomen
Macroglossum.key_mark: hovers at flowers hummingbird-style; orange hindwings visible in flight

Orthosia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout noctuid body, filiform antennae
Orthosia.color: grey-brown to ochreous with darker streaks; reniform and orbicular spots
Orthosia.key_mark: drab grey-brown forewing with paired kidney and ring spot

Hypoprepia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender body, filiform antennae
Hypoprepia.color: grey forewings with bold red or orange longitudinal streaks
Hypoprepia.key_mark: vivid red or orange streaks on grey forewing

Xanthorhoe.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender geometrid body, filiform antennae
Xanthorhoe.wings: broad scaled wings, triangular resting posture
Xanthorhoe.color: pale grey or white with dark transverse band across mid-forewing
Xanthorhoe.key_mark: bold dark crossband through mid-forewing on pale ground

Heniocha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large stout body, strongly bipectinate antennae
Heniocha.wings: large broad scaled wings with prominent eyespots
Heniocha.color: marbled grey-brown; large black-ringed white ocelli on hindwings
Heniocha.key_mark: large eyespots on hindwings of a big marbled-grey saturniid

Ethmia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender body, long upturned labial palps
Ethmia.wings: narrow scaled forewings; long legs conspicuous at rest
Ethmia.color: white or pale grey forewings with rows of bold black spots
Ethmia.key_mark: neat rows of black spots on white forewing

Myselasia.structure: 3 body sections, fore-legs reduced (males), clubbed antennae, small build
Myselasia.color: brownish with metallic or pale spotting
Myselasia.key_mark: small riodinid with variable spotting; reduced fore-legs in males

Iambrix.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout skipper body, hooked antennal club
Iambrix.wings: small triangular forewings; dart posture at rest
Iambrix.color: rich chestnut-orange-brown above; paler below with faint pale spots
Iambrix.key_mark: warm chestnut upperwings in a small dart-posture skipper

Hypocysta.structure: 3 body sections, fore-legs vestigial, clubbed antennae, satyrinae build

Eupithecia.key_mark: pale wings with single small dark lime-speck discal dot

Hylephila.structure: compact body; clubbed + hooked antennae; 3 pairs legs
Hylephila.wings: triangular pointed forewings; held at skipper angle
Hylephila.color: tawny orange above with dark brown borders and forewing banding
Hylephila.key_mark: tawny skipper with dark fasciolate banding on forewing

Urapteroides.structure: slender body; filiform to bipectinate antennae; 3 pairs legs
Urapteroides.wings: tailed hindwing; acute forewing apex; day-flying uraniid
Urapteroides.color: white to pale with dark vein-lines and possible iridescent scaling
Urapteroides.key_mark: recurved hindwing tail on pale dark-veined wings

Dryocampa.structure: stout fluffy body; bipectinate antennae (male); 3 pairs legs
Dryocampa.wings: medium rounded; held spread at rest
Dryocampa.color: bright pink and yellow; pink forewings with yellow median band
Dryocampa.key_mark: unmistakable pink-and-yellow wings with fluffy yellow body

Pyropteron.structure: slender wasp-like body; scaled narrow antennae; 3 pairs legs
Pyropteron.wings: largely transparent with narrow dark scaled borders; narrow
Pyropteron.color: dark body with red-orange abdominal bands; clear wings
Pyropteron.key_mark: wasp-mimic; clear wings and banded red-black abdomen

Charanyca.structure: stout body; filiform antennae; 3 pairs legs
Charanyca.wings: ovate forewing; held flat or tent-like at rest
Charanyca.color: pale buff to ochreous with 3 thin parallel dark cross-lines
Charanyca.key_mark: 3 parallel dark lines crossing pale buff forewing

Laspeyria.structure: slender body; pectinate antennae (male); 3 pairs legs
Laspeyria.color: lilac-grey to purple-tinged with dark strigulae and spots
Laspeyria.key_mark: hooked forewing with lilac-purple suffusion and dark streaks

Dichorragia.structure: brushfoot; forelegs vestigial; clubbed antennae; 2 functional pairs
Dichorragia.color: very dark brown to blackish with dense pale blue and white streaks
Dichorragia.key_mark: blackish wings densely streaked with blue-white lines

Zerene.structure: slender body; clubbed antennae; 3 pairs legs
Zerene.color: yellow with black forewing border enclosing dog-head silhouette
Zerene.key_mark: poodle-head silhouette in yellow forewing within black border

Attacus.structure: massive furry body; strongly bipectinate antennae; vestigial mouthparts
Attacus.wings: very large triangular; transparent patches at each wingtip
Attacus.color: reddish-brown with white-buff markings and triangular clear patches
Attacus.key_mark: huge size; snake-head transparent patches at each wingtip

Deltote.structure: stout body; filiform antennae; 3 pairs legs
Deltote.wings: ovate forewing; held flat at rest
Deltote.color: dark brown to blackish forewing with white orbicular spot and streaks
Deltote.key_mark: conspicuous white orbicular spot on dark marbled forewing

Neolucia.structure: slender body; clubbed antennae; 3 pairs legs
Neolucia.wings: small rounded with prominent long pale fringe
Neolucia.color: blue-grey above; white-grey below with faint spotting; strong pale fringe
Neolucia.key_mark: prominent white checkered fringe contrasting with blue-grey upperside

Sarangesa.structure: compact body; clubbed + hooked antennae; 3 pairs legs
Sarangesa.wings: broad; held flat at rest (flat-skipper posture)
Sarangesa.color: dark brown with white hyaline spots on forewing; paler hindwing
Sarangesa.key_mark: wings held flat; dark forewing with white hyaline spot row

Prolimacodes.structure: stout oval body; bipectinate antennae (male); 3 pairs legs
Prolimacodes.wings: broad ovate with smooth oval outline; tent-like at rest
Prolimacodes.color: pale tan to brown with oblique darker streaks or patches
Prolimacodes.key_mark: smooth skiff-shaped wing outline with oblique dark forewing streak

Eutricha.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, bipectinate (male) or filiform antennae; stout woolly body
Eutricha.wings: broad rounded; held flat or tented at rest; hindwing margin slightly scalloped
Eutricha.color: ochreous to reddish-brown with darker wavy transverse lines
Eutricha.key_mark: thick woolly body with scalloped hindwing lappet resting flat on bark

Camptogramma.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender body
Camptogramma.wings: broad triangular forewings held flat spread at rest; no covers
Camptogramma.color: warm yellow-buff ground with dense dark wavy cross-lines on both wings
Camptogramma.key_mark: closely packed dark wavy lines on yellow-buff ground giving shell-like banding

Ornithoptera.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; very large robust body
Ornithoptera.wings: long narrow falcate forewings; broad hindwings; no covers
Ornithoptera.color: male iridescent green/gold on velvety black; female brown/cream/yellow
Ornithoptera.key_mark: among world's largest butterflies; male's brilliant iridescent green on black

Dysstroma.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender body
Dysstroma.wings: broad; held flat spread at rest; no covers
Dysstroma.color: mottled brown, grey, white with complex dark marbling; highly variable
Dysstroma.key_mark: intricate marbled brown/grey/white carpet pattern; extremely variable

Arawacus.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; slender; hindwing with filiform tails
Arawacus.wings: small; hindwing with 1-2 short tails; no covers
Arawacus.color: upperside brown; underside cream-white with bold dark longitudinal stripes
Arawacus.key_mark: cream underside with sharp dark stripe running along wing length

Drymonia.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, pectinate (male) or filiform antennae; stout thorax
Drymonia.wings: broad; held roof-like over body at rest; no covers
Drymonia.color: brown and grey with dark marbling; cryptic bark-pattern
Drymonia.key_mark: bark-mimicking mottled brown pattern; wings tent-like at rest

Lycaenopsis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; small slender body
Lycaenopsis.wings: small rounded; no prominent tails; no covers
Lycaenopsis.color: male vivid blue above with dark margin; underside pale with dark spots
Lycaenopsis.key_mark: vivid blue upperside (male) with distinct black margin and white fringe

Spalgis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; small compact body
Spalgis.color: grey-brown above; underside pale with dark spots forming ape-face pattern
Spalgis.key_mark: underside markings mimic an ape face; larva mimics mealybugs

Pyrrhopyge.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, hooked clubbed antennae; robust thick body
Pyrrhopyge.wings: broad; held flat or angled at rest; no covers
Pyrrhopyge.color: mostly black with brilliant red-orange abdomen tip; sometimes red forewing spots
Pyrrhopyge.key_mark: vivid red-orange abdomen tip on large dark skipper (firetip)

Grammodes.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; medium stout body
Grammodes.wings: broad angular forewings; held spread at rest; no covers
Grammodes.color: dark brown with bold white/cream geometric transverse bands on forewing
Grammodes.key_mark: bold contrasting white angular bands on dark brown forewing

Epiphyas.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; small compact tortricid
Epiphyas.wings: broad rounded; held bell-shaped flat over body at rest; no covers

Epiphyas.key_mark: bell-shaped resting silhouette; light brown with darker oblique crossband

Mycalesis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs (forelegs vestigial), clubbed antennae; medium body
Mycalesis.color: uniform medium brown with submarginal row of small ocelli on both surfaces
Mycalesis.key_mark: row of small white-pupilled eyespots along margin of plain brown wings

Nacaduba.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; tiny slender body; hindwing tails
Nacaduba.wings: small; hindwing with 1-2 short tails; no covers
Nacaduba.color: male pale blue above; underside white-grey with multiple fine dark striae
Nacaduba.key_mark: numerous parallel fine dark lines crossing pale grey-white underside

Arethusana.color: tawny ochre with dark brown borders; single ocellus on forewing
Arethusana.key_mark: single white-pupilled forewing ocellus on warm tawny-ochre ground

Aedia.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; medium body
Aedia.wings: broad; forewings covering hindwings at rest; no covers
Aedia.color: pale grey-brown forewing with dark markings; hindwings white with dark border
Aedia.key_mark: pale whitish hindwings contrasting with darker patterned forewing

Ennomos.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, pectinate (male) or filiform antennae; slender body
Ennomos.wings: broad; scalloped toothed margins; held spread flat at rest; no covers
Ennomos.color: bright sulphur-yellow with fine brown speckling; yellow thoracic tufts
Ennomos.key_mark: vivid canary-yellow wings with angular toothed margins; yellow shoulder tufts

Pingasa.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender body
Pingasa.wings: broad; held spread flat; very pale; no covers
Pingasa.color: bright white to cream with thin grey wavy cross-lines
Pingasa.key_mark: strikingly white wings with faint grey wavy lines; palest local geometer

Teracolus.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; medium-robust body
Teracolus.color: white or yellow ground with vivid orange, red, or pink apical patches
Teracolus.key_mark: bright orange-red or pink forewing apex on white/yellow ground; African pierid

Polytremis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, hooked clubbed antennae; robust body
Polytremis.wings: broad triangular forewings; held at typical skipper angle; no covers
Polytremis.color: tawny to dark brown with pale hyaline translucent spots on forewing
Polytremis.key_mark: pale translucent forewing spots on tawny-brown stocky skipper

Maruca.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender long-legged body
Maruca.wings: narrow brownish forewings; broad white hindwings; held spread; no covers
Maruca.color: brown forewings with white patches; hindwings largely white with brown border
Maruca.key_mark: white hindwings with brown border contrast sharply with brown-patched forewings

Plagodis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender abdomen
Plagodis.wings: two pairs broad, held flat; forewing rounded with weakly scalloped edge
Plagodis.color: warm ochre-yellow with irregular brown scorched blotches
Plagodis.key_mark: burnt brown patches on ochre wings mimicking a scorched leaf

Endrosis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; slender micro-moth
Endrosis.wings: narrow, held steeply roof-like over abdomen at rest
Endrosis.color: mottled grey-brown forewings; bright white head and thorax
Endrosis.key_mark: white head and shoulder patch contrasting sharply with dark mottled wings

Palthis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; stout abdomen
Palthis.wings: triangular forewings held tent-like at rest
Palthis.color: pale straw-tan with darker brown shading and dark discal spot
Palthis.key_mark: angular forewing apex and prominent dark discal spot on tan ground

Duponchelia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae; slender crambid build
Duponchelia.wings: narrow, held flat or weakly deltoid at rest
Duponchelia.color: brown-grey with pale yellowish sinuous transverse lines
Duponchelia.key_mark: pale wavy cross-lines on brown forewings; projecting upturned labial palps

Adoxophyes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; compact tortricid form
Adoxophyes.wings: broad trapezoidal forewings held bell-shaped over body at rest
Adoxophyes.color: pale gold-straw with darker oblique brown fasciae
Adoxophyes.key_mark: golden bell-shaped resting silhouette with darker oblique forewing bands

Famegana.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; small lycaenid build
Famegana.wings: two pairs small rounded butterfly wings
Famegana.color: pale blue-violet above; white below with small black spots
Famegana.key_mark: small grass-blue butterfly with black-spotted white underside

Azanus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; small lycaenid build
Azanus.wings: two pairs small rounded butterfly wings
Azanus.color: bright topaz-blue above; white below with dark spots and streaks
Azanus.key_mark: vivid topaz-blue upperside contrasting white spotted underside

Peripyra.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; typical noctuid build
Peripyra.wings: narrow forewings held flat tent-like at rest
Peripyra.color: dark brown-grey ground with prominent blood-red crimson spots
Peripyra.key_mark: vivid blood-red spots contrasting against dark forewing ground

Zeuzera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bipectinate (male) or filiform (female) antennae; stout
Zeuzera.wings: long broad white wings held spread flat; bold blue-black spots
Zeuzera.color: white wings and body densely peppered with blue-black spots
Zeuzera.key_mark: leopard-spotted white wings; blue-black spotted thorax

Xylocopa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short elbowed antennae; large robust build
Xylocopa.wings: two pairs membranous, often with violet-blue iridescent sheen
Xylocopa.color: mostly glossy black; thorax often with yellow or pale hairs
Xylocopa.key_mark: large shiny hairless black abdomen distinguishes from bumblebees

Bee.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; variable body form
Bee.wings: two pairs membranous, coupled by hamuli
Bee.color: variable: yellow-black banded, metallic, or plain black to brown
Bee.key_mark: branched (plumose) body hairs enabling pollen adhesion

Apis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; slender hairy build
Apis.wings: two pairs membranous, folded along abdomen at rest
Apis.color: amber-brown with darker transverse abdominal bands
Apis.key_mark: shiny corbiculae (pollen baskets) on hind tibiae; amber-striped abdomen

Honey Bee.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; slender hairy build
Honey Bee.wings: two pairs membranous, folded along abdomen at rest
Honey Bee.color: amber-brown with darker transverse abdominal bands
Honey Bee.key_mark: shiny corbiculae (pollen baskets) on hind tibiae; amber-striped abdomen

Megachile.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; robust broad-headed build
Megachile.color: dark with pale hair bands across abdominal segments
Megachile.key_mark: dense ventral abdominal scopa (pollen-collecting hairs) on females

Aphaenogaster.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; slender long-legged; 2-node petiole

Ant.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; 1-2 petiole nodes at waist

Atta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; polymorphic workers; spiny thorax
Atta.wings: none in workers; alate reproductives winged
Atta.size: 2-14 mm body (strong size polymorphism across castes)

Bombus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; large robust densely hairy

Bombus.color: bold yellow and black banding; some species with orange or red
Bombus.key_mark: large rounded conspicuously fuzzy body with bold yellow-black banding

Bumble Bee.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; large robust densely hairy
Bumble Bee.wings: two pairs membranous, hindwing coupled to forewing by hamuli
Bumble Bee.color: bold yellow and black banding; some species with orange or red
Bumble Bee.key_mark: large rounded conspicuously fuzzy body with bold yellow-black banding

Camponotus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; 1-node petiole; polymorphic workers
Camponotus.wings: none in workers; alate reproductives winged
Camponotus.size: 6-13 mm body (distinct major and minor castes)
Camponotus.color: variable: black, red-and-black, or ferruginous by species
Camponotus.key_mark: single scale-like petiole node and smoothly convex spineless thorax profile

Pseudomyrmex.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 1-node petiole, elongate build
Pseudomyrmex.wings: workers wingless; alates with 2 pairs membranous wings
Pseudomyrmex.color: orange-brown to bicolored orange and black
Pseudomyrmex.key_mark: strikingly slender elongate body with conspicuously large eyes for an ant

Bicyrtes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, narrow petiolate waist
Bicyrtes.color: black with 4 pale yellow abdominal bands
Bicyrtes.key_mark: 4 yellow bands on black abdomen; provisions burrow exclusively with stink bugs

Wasp.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, narrow petiolate waist
Wasp.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings, hindwing coupled to forewing; folded flat in some

Wasp.key_mark: narrow constricted waist (petiole) between thorax and abdomen

Habropoda.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, robust stocky build
Habropoda.color: black with pale yellowish facial hair; thorax and abdomen with buff pile

Lasius.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 1-node petiole
Lasius.wings: workers wingless; alates with 2 pairs membranous wings
Lasius.color: pale to bright yellow; some subgenera dark brown
Lasius.key_mark: bright yellow workers emit strong citronella/lemon scent when colony disturbed

Solenopsis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 2-node petiole
Solenopsis.color: reddish-brown to golden-red with darker gaster
Solenopsis.key_mark: reddish body with 2-segmented waist; mound nests; delivers intense burning sting

Acraspis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, laterally compressed abdomen

Acraspis.key_mark: tiny gall wasp found with or inside distinctive jewel-like woody oak galls

Polistes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, slender spindle abdomen
Polistes.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings folded longitudinally at rest
Polistes.color: brown to reddish-brown with yellow markings; pattern varies by species
Polistes.key_mark: wings folded flat lengthwise at rest; long tapered abdomen; open paper comb nest

Paraponera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, robust ponerine build
Paraponera.wings: workers wingless; alates with 2 pairs membranous wings
Paraponera.key_mark: among largest ants at ~25 mm; Neotropical; infamously potent sting

Agapostemon.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, slender build
Agapostemon.color: female metallic green thorax, yellow-black striped abdomen; male all-striped
Agapostemon.key_mark: metallic green thorax sharply contrasting with yellow-black striped abdomen

Brachyponera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, ponerine node on petiole
Brachyponera.color: dark brown to black with contrasting orange-yellow mandibles
Brachyponera.key_mark: dark body with bright orange mandibles; painful sting; nests in disturbed soil

Vespula.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, compact robust build
Vespula.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings folded longitudinally at rest
Vespula.color: bold black-and-yellow banding; face with black anchor or lance mark
Vespula.key_mark: short compact waist; bold yellow-black banding; nests often subterranean

Prenolepis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 1-node petiole, slender
Prenolepis.color: dark brown to black with pale yellowish legs
Prenolepis.key_mark: active surface foraging near freezing temperatures; winter activity is diagnostic

Dasymutilla.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; female wingless and ant-like
Dasymutilla.wings: female none; male 2 pairs membranous wings
Dasymutilla.color: dense red-orange pile patches on black body; aposematic
Dasymutilla.key_mark: wingless female covered in bright red pile; audible squeak when handled

Andrena.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, facial foveae flanking eyes
Andrena.color: variable; black with tawny or pale hair bands; some species rufous
Andrena.key_mark: velvety facial foveae (grooves flanking each compound eye) diagnostic for genus

Sphecius.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, robust with narrow waist

Nylanderia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 1-node petiole, long legs

Nylanderia.key_mark: rapid erratic 'crazy' movement; abundant long macrosetae on body and legs

Polyergus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 1-node petiole

Polyergus.key_mark: sickle-shaped falcate mandibles adapted solely for slave-raiding other ant colonies

Neoponera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, ponerine petiole node
Neoponera.color: black to dark brown body covered in dense golden-brown pubescence
Neoponera.key_mark: large hairy ponerine ant; conspicuous golden pile on dark body; potent sting

Cladius.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pectinate or filiform antennae, no waist constriction

Cladius.color: adult pale brownish to black; larvae pale green
Cladius.key_mark: pectinate comb-like antennae in males; no wasp waist; larvae skeletonize roses

Formica.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, single petiole node

Formica.color: often bicolored: red-brown head/thorax, darker gaster; some all-black
Formica.key_mark: single petiole node + no sting + mound-building field ant habit

Paratrechina.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very long elbowed antennae, single petiole node
Paratrechina.wings: workers wingless; reproductives with 2 pairs membranous wings
Paratrechina.color: dark blackish-brown with grayish pubescence sheen
Paratrechina.key_mark: disproportionately long legs and antennae; erratic rapid movement

Brachymelecta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; robust build
Brachymelecta.color: black with pale yellow or white abdominal hair bands; some red markings
Brachymelecta.key_mark: sparse body hair and absent pollen-collecting structures (cuckoo bee)

Tetramorium.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 2-node petiole
Tetramorium.wings: workers wingless; reproductives with 2 pairs membranous wings
Tetramorium.color: brown to dark brown; legs and antennae paler
Tetramorium.key_mark: parallel longitudinal striations on head and thorax

Sceliphron.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; extreme thread-like petiole
Sceliphron.wings: 2 pairs membranous; fore wings not folded, held flat at rest
Sceliphron.color: black with bright yellow markings on legs and abdomen
Sceliphron.key_mark: extremely elongated thread-like petiole between thorax and gaster

Holcopasites.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; compact build
Holcopasites.color: black with pale yellow lateral abdominal spots
Holcopasites.key_mark: sparse hair and absent pollen-carrying structures (kleptoparasite)

Halictus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; slender-moderate build
Halictus.color: brown to black, often faint metallic; pale hair bands on abdomen
Halictus.key_mark: distinct transverse pale hair bands at apical margin of each tergum

Eulaema.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; very large robust build
Eulaema.color: black with bold orange abdominal bands; dense short velvety hair
Eulaema.key_mark: large velvety-black body with bold orange abdominal hair bands

Lasioglossum.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; slender small build
Lasioglossum.color: black to metallic green; faint or absent abdominal hair bands
Lasioglossum.key_mark: minute to small size; dull or faintly metallic; weak abdominal banding

Acromyrmex.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 2-node petiole; polymorphic castes
Acromyrmex.wings: workers wingless; reproductives with 2 pairs membranous wings
