Acromyrmex.color: reddish-brown to dark brown; often pale-haired
Acromyrmex.key_mark: multiple paired spines on thorax + leaf-cutting workers

Osmia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; medium robust build
Osmia.color: metallic blue-black or dense orange/ginger hair; varies by species
Osmia.key_mark: pollen-collecting scopae on underside of abdomen (not hind legs)

Myrmecina.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 2-node petiole; compact squat body
Myrmecina.wings: workers wingless; reproductives with 2 pairs membranous wings
Myrmecina.key_mark: strongly sculptured/ribbed head and thorax; very compact body

Vespa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; robust waist, large build
Vespa.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings, fore pair folded longitudinally at rest
Vespa.color: yellow and brown or black banding; head often yellow or reddish
Vespa.key_mark: large size + wings folded longitudinally at rest + stout waist

Dolichoderus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, flattened single-node petiole
Dolichoderus.wings: workers wingless; reproductives with 2 pairs membranous wings
Dolichoderus.color: dark brown to black; some species with pale yellow gaster spots
Dolichoderus.key_mark: scale-like flat petiole node; pungent anal secretion when disturbed

Nomada.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; slender wasp-like build
Nomada.color: black with yellow or red-orange markings; strongly wasp-like pattern
Nomada.key_mark: wasp-like coloration with sparse hair; no corbiculae or scopae

Diplolepis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender elbowed antennae; laterally compressed abdomen
Diplolepis.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings; agamic females sometimes brachypterous
Diplolepis.color: reddish-brown to blackish; legs partly pale
Diplolepis.key_mark: associated with conspicuous mossy pincushion galls on Rosa

Cynips.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender elbowed antennae; strongly compressed abdomen
Cynips.wings: 2 pairs membranous; agamic females often wingless
Cynips.color: dark brown to black; abdomen often reddish-brown
Cynips.key_mark: induces distinctive oak galls; alternates sexual and asexual generations

Trichilogaster.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short elbowed antennae; compact tiny build
Trichilogaster.key_mark: induces round woody bud/flower galls on Acacia longifolia

Anthidium.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae; robust; male larger than female
Anthidium.color: black with paired yellow lateral spots on abdomen; face often yellow-marked
Anthidium.key_mark: rows of paired yellow lateral abdominal spots; female with ventral scopae

Neuroterus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender elbowed antennae; strongly compressed abdomen
Neuroterus.wings: 2 pairs membranous; agamic generation often wingless
Neuroterus.color: yellowish-brown to reddish-brown; abdomen often darker
Neuroterus.key_mark: produces flat disc-like spangle galls on oak leaf undersides

Messor.structure: 3-segmented body, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, 1-node petiole, polymorphic workers
Messor.key_mark: major workers with massively enlarged heads for cracking seeds

Dasypoda.structure: robust bee, 6 legs, exaggerated hind-leg scopae, elbowed antennae
Dasypoda.color: black with tawny-yellow hair bands on abdomen
Dasypoda.key_mark: females bear spectacular feathery pantaloon scopae on hind legs

Urocerus.structure: stout cylindrical body, 6 legs, no waist constriction, long filiform antennae
Urocerus.color: yellow and black banded; female abdomen ends in long rigid spike
Urocerus.key_mark: long spike-like ovipositor projecting from abdomen tip

Sphex.structure: slender wasp, narrow petiolar waist, 6 legs, medium filiform antennae
Sphex.color: golden-orange thorax, dark abdomen, golden pubescence on body
Sphex.key_mark: bright golden-orange thorax contrasting sharply with dark abdomen

Myrmica.key_mark: antennal scape with distinct right-angle bend at base

Crematogaster.color: variable; many spp bicolored red head + black gaster
Crematogaster.key_mark: heart-shaped gaster held erect over thorax (acrobat posture)

Mellinus.structure: slender wasp, narrow waist, 6 legs, medium filiform antennae
Mellinus.color: black with bright yellow spots and bands on abdomen
Mellinus.key_mark: black abdomen with bold yellow rectangular spots in paired rows

Caliroa.structure: adult stout sawfly, no waist, 6 legs; larva soft-bodied and slug-like
Caliroa.wings: adult 2 pairs membranous, dark-tinged; larva wingless
Caliroa.color: larva dark olive-green, slime-coated; adult mostly black
Caliroa.key_mark: larva covered in dark mucilaginous slime, slug-like on leaf surface

Mutilla.structure: densely hairy wasp; female wingless and ant-like, 6 legs, robust
Mutilla.color: black with vivid red or orange patches of dense velvety hair
Mutilla.key_mark: wingless female with dense velvety red-and-black pile; cow-killer sting

Anoplolepis.structure: slender ant, 6 legs, notably long antennae and legs relative to body
Anoplolepis.key_mark: frantic erratic movement with disproportionately long legs and antennae

Oecophylla.structure: slender ant, 6 legs, single petiole node, large compound eyes
Oecophylla.color: orange-red to greenish-yellow; gaster often paler or contrasting
Oecophylla.key_mark: arboreal silk-stitched leaf nests; workers form living chains at margins

Meranoplus.structure: stocky ant, 6 legs, broad flattened shield-like promesonotum overhangs body
Meranoplus.color: bicolored: orange-red head and thorax, black gaster
Meranoplus.key_mark: flattened shield-shaped promesonotum protruding beyond thorax margins

Delta.structure: slender potter wasp, 6 legs, very elongated first gastral segment, antennae
Delta.wings: 2 pairs membranous, folded longitudinally at rest
Delta.color: black with yellow markings; basal gastral segment elongated and cylindrical
Delta.key_mark: bottle-shaped silhouette from very long cylindrical first gastral segment

Tetraponera.structure: very slender elongate ant, 6 legs, large eyes, long legs, pseudomyrmecine
Tetraponera.color: bicolored: orange-red front half, black gaster in many spp
Tetraponera.key_mark: wasp-waisted elongate body with disproportionately large eyes for an ant

Tapinoma.structure: small ant, 6 legs, petiole node hidden beneath gaster, elbowed antennae
Tapinoma.color: dark brown to black head, translucent pale gaster and legs
Tapinoma.key_mark: ghost pattern: dark head with pale translucent abdomen and legs

Pristomyrmex.structure: small ant, 6 legs, 2-node waist, spiny mesosoma, short elbowed antennae
Pristomyrmex.wings: typically queenless; workers wingless; alates rare
Pristomyrmex.color: pale yellowish to light brown throughout
Pristomyrmex.key_mark: prominent sharp spines on pronotum and mesonotum

Dinomyrmex.structure: very large ant, 6 legs, powerful mandibles, robust build, single petiole
Dinomyrmex.key_mark: giant size to 28 mm alone diagnostic; among the world's largest ants

Wasmannia.structure: tiny ant, 6 legs, 2-node waist, 11-segmented elbowed antennae
Wasmannia.key_mark: minute ginger ant delivering sting pain far disproportionate to its size

Ooceraea.structure: small slender doryline ant, 6 legs, reduced eyes, constricted waist segments
Ooceraea.key_mark: tiny, nearly eyeless, pale doryline ant in queenless clonal colony

Nomia.structure: medium bee, 6 legs, hind tibiae with pollen scopae, short elbowed antennae
Nomia.wings: 2 pairs membranous; forewings often dusky or dark-tinged
Nomia.color: dark body with pale or metallic iridescent abdominal banding in many spp
Nomia.key_mark: swollen hind tibiae with iridescent banding; diagnostic among halictids

Harpegnathos.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, single petiole node
Harpegnathos.color: dark brown, yellowish legs, pale elongated mandibles
Harpegnathos.key_mark: saber-length linear mandibles + oversized compound eyes for an ant

Trichomyrmex.key_mark: tiny, uniform pale color, dense trailing columns in disturbed habitats

Ctenioschelus.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, compact bee build
Ctenioschelus.key_mark: hind legs lack pollen-collecting scopae (cleptoparasitic habit)

Cephalotes.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; soldiers with disc-shaped head
Cephalotes.color: dark brown to black, thorax often bearing spiny projections
Cephalotes.key_mark: soldier's circular flattened disc head used as living nest-entrance plug

Trigona.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, corbiculate hind legs
Trigona.color: mostly black, some with pale spots or faint abdominal bands
Trigona.key_mark: resin-sealed tubular nest entrance; no sting visible at gaster tip

Thygater.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs; male antennae greatly elongated beyond body
Thygater.color: black body densely covered in pale to tawny hair
Thygater.key_mark: male antennae exceed body length; robust densely hairy black bee

Aglae.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, elongated mouthparts, robust
Aglae.color: brilliant uniform metallic cerulean blue entire body
Aglae.key_mark: solid metallic blue all over; largest orchid bee; monotypic genus

Melitoma.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; females with paddle-shaped fore basitarsi
Melitoma.color: dark brown to black with pale abdominal hair bands
Melitoma.key_mark: paddle-shaped fore basitarsi specialized for floral oil collection

Tetragonisca.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, corbiculate hind legs
Tetragonisca.color: yellowish-brown to amber with pale legs
Tetragonisca.key_mark: hovering guard bees station at narrow tubular wax nest entrance

Exomalopsis.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; females with hind-leg scopae
Exomalopsis.color: black body with dense golden-yellow hair throughout
Exomalopsis.key_mark: densely golden-hairy small bee; ground-nesting solitary habit

Eciton.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; polymorphic; soldiers with hook mandibles
Eciton.key_mark: soldier's enormous curved sickle mandibles; massive bivouac raiding columns

Eufriesea.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; males with swollen hind tibiae
Eufriesea.color: brilliant metallic violet, blue, or green iridescent
Eufriesea.key_mark: metallic violet-to-green sheen; male hind tibiae swollen with scent stores

Partamona.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, corbiculate hind legs
Partamona.color: black, sometimes with pale yellow facial markings
Partamona.key_mark: nests inside active termite mounds; resin-guarded entrance tube

Nannotrigona.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae, corbiculate hind legs
Nannotrigona.color: pale testaceous (brick-tan) body with conspicuously pale antennae
Nannotrigona.key_mark: distinctly pale testaceous antennae diagnostic on a tiny dark stingless bee

Technomyrmex.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; petiole node very low or scale-like
Technomyrmex.color: black to dark brown body, tarsi strikingly white or pale
Technomyrmex.key_mark: brilliant white tarsi contrasting sharply with dark body

Megaponera.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; strongly dimorphic major/minor workers
Megaponera.key_mark: majors carry injured minor workers back from termite raids for treatment

Eucera.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs; male antennae as long as or longer than body
Eucera.color: black with pale or tawny hair bands across abdominal terga
Eucera.key_mark: male antennae equaling or exceeding body length

Linepithema.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; petiole with single low flat scale
Linepithema.color: uniform light to medium brown, no patterning
Linepithema.key_mark: musty rancid-coconut odor when crushed; forms vast unicolonial supercolonies

Cataglyphis.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; notably long slender stilt-like legs
Cataglyphis.color: silvery metallic sheen (C. bombycina); other spp. orange or bicolored
Cataglyphis.key_mark: mirror-silver reflective triangular hairs; fastest-running desert ant

Paltothyreus.structure: 3 sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; robust with toothed mandibles
Paltothyreus.color: dark brown to black, legs and tarsi orange-brown
Paltothyreus.key_mark: powerful pungent alarm odor when disturbed; large specialist termite hunter

Dorylus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; workers blind, polymorphic
Dorylus.wings: none in workers; alates produced seasonally
Dorylus.key_mark: massive raiding columns; soldiers with large hooked falcate mandibles

Odontomachus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; elongated narrow head
Odontomachus.color: dark brown to black, often with reddish-brown legs
Odontomachus.key_mark: long straight mandibles held wide open at ~180°, snapping shut on contact

Patellapis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; female with hind-leg scopae
Patellapis.wings: 2 pairs membranous; forewing venation typical of Halictidae
Patellapis.color: dull to weakly metallic; abdomen with pale banded pattern
Patellapis.key_mark: metasomal apical furrow on last visible tergite; diagnostic for family

Aenictus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; workers small, monomorphic
Aenictus.key_mark: golden amber coloration; dense column raids targeting other ant colonies

Myrmecia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long elbowed antennae; large compound eyes
Myrmecia.color: black with red or orange on thorax and/or gaster, species-variable
Myrmecia.key_mark: long serrated forward-projecting mandibles paired with large compound eyes

Pachodynerus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; narrow petiole, constricted waist
Pachodynerus.wings: 2 pairs membranous; forewings folded longitudinally at rest
Pachodynerus.color: black with pale yellow or white abdominal bands
Pachodynerus.key_mark: slender elongated petiole; nests in small pre-formed cavities and keyholes

Opisthopsis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long elbowed antennae; slender with long legs
Opisthopsis.color: black head, reddish-orange thorax, dark gaster
Opisthopsis.key_mark: jerky stop-start strobe-like locomotion; bicolored black-and-red body

Iridomyrmex.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; robust workers, 1-node waist
Iridomyrmex.color: purplish-blue iridescent gaster, often reddish or dark head and thorax
Iridomyrmex.key_mark: strong blue-purple iridescence on gaster; large open gravel-mound nests

Hyleoides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; robust bee body form
Hyleoides.color: black with bold bright yellow abdominal bands
Hyleoides.key_mark: striking wasp-mimicry yellow-and-black banding on an otherwise bee body

Ochetellus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; small slender workers
Ochetellus.color: shiny black; gaster with faint copper or blue iridescence
Ochetellus.key_mark: tiny shiny black ant with coppery iridescent gaster

Polyrhachis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; spines on pronotum and/or petiole
Polyrhachis.color: black, often overlaid with silvery or golden pubescence
Polyrhachis.key_mark: prominent paired spines on thorax and petiole; often dense silvery hair

Lipotriches.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; female with hind-leg pollen scopae
Lipotriches.color: metallic green thorax with golden-yellow banded abdomen
Lipotriches.key_mark: brilliant metallic green-and-gold banding; strongly iridescent in sunlight

Pheidole.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; extreme major/minor worker dimorphism
Pheidole.key_mark: major soldier workers with enormously enlarged head out of proportion to body

Ancistrocerus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; narrow petiole, tapered gaster
Ancistrocerus.wings: 2 pairs membranous; forewings folded longitudinally at rest
Ancistrocerus.color: black with yellow bands; pale markings on face and legs
Ancistrocerus.key_mark: first gastral segment with raised transverse keel and slight basal expansion

Priocnemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long elbowed antennae; long spiny legs
Priocnemis.color: black body, often with red or orange band on abdomen
Priocnemis.key_mark: rapid continuous wing-flicking while running; drags paralyzed spider prey

Chelaner.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; 2-node waist
Chelaner.key_mark: 2-node waist; NZ's most abundant native ant, in open disturbed ground

Amblyopone.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; small eyes, stout mandibles
Amblyopone.key_mark: linear comb of teeth along full inner mandible margin; centipede specialist

Liometopum.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; slender, densely pubescent workers
Liometopum.color: reddish-brown head and thorax, black gaster with velvety matte finish
Liometopum.key_mark: dense velvet-like pubescence giving matte sheen; red-and-black bicoloration

Pogonomyrmex.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; robust with psammophore under head
Pogonomyrmex.key_mark: psammophore: conspicuous fringe of long curved hairs under the head

Colobopsis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; majors with phragmotic flat head
Colobopsis.color: dark brown to black with paler appendages
Colobopsis.key_mark: major workers use flat truncated head as living plug to block nest entrance

Monomorium.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 12-seg elbowed antennae with 3-seg club
Monomorium.wings: workers wingless; reproductives have 2 pairs membranous wings
Monomorium.color: pale yellow to light brown; gaster slightly darker
Monomorium.key_mark: tiny pale 2-node petiole ant with 3-segmented antennal club

Apoica.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, narrow petiole
Apoica.wings: 2 pairs membranous; fore wings folded lengthwise at rest
Apoica.color: uniformly pale cream to yellowish-white; no bold banding
Apoica.key_mark: all-pale cream nocturnal paper wasp; open exposed horizontal comb nest

Dolichovespula.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, narrow petiole
Dolichovespula.wings: 2 pairs membranous; fore wings folded lengthwise at rest
Dolichovespula.color: black and yellow banded; pale face with white or yellow markings
Dolichovespula.key_mark: elongated face with long malar space; aerial paper nest with bottom entrance

Eumenes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae, very long narrow petiole
Eumenes.wings: 2 pairs membranous; fore wings folded lengthwise at rest
Eumenes.color: black with yellow or white spots and bands
Eumenes.key_mark: extremely elongated cylindrical petiole creates exaggerated hourglass waist

Stilbum.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, compact abdomen curls under body
Stilbum.color: brilliant metallic emerald-green overall; cuticle deeply pitted
Stilbum.key_mark: intense iridescent emerald-green all over with heavily sculptured pitted surface

Aproceros.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 3-seg antennae (3rd elongated), no wasp waist
Aproceros.wings: 2 pairs membranous held flat or rooflike at rest
Aproceros.color: mostly black; legs and abdomen base partly pale yellowish
Aproceros.key_mark: larvae leave diagnostic zigzag feeding trails along elm leaf margins

Harmonia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae, strongly domed oval
Harmonia.color: orange to red elytra with 0-22 black spots; highly variable
Harmonia.key_mark: black M or W mark on white pronotum; spot count and color wildly variable

Beetle.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae variable; heavily sclerotized thorax
Beetle.wings: hardened elytra meeting in straight dorsal suture over membranous hindwings
Beetle.color: highly variable: brown, black, metallic, or boldly patterned
Beetle.key_mark: elytra meeting in a straight midline suture—the defining beetle character

Popillia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate club antennae, stocky oval body
Popillia.color: iridescent coppery-brown elytra; metallic green head and pronotum
Popillia.key_mark: 5 white hair tufts per elytral side plus 2 at abdomen tip, visible from above

Scarab Beetle.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, fan-like lamellate antennal club, robust oval body
Scarab Beetle.wings: thick hardened elytra; large membranous hindwings
Scarab Beetle.color: brown, black, or metallic; varies widely by species
Scarab Beetle.key_mark: fan-shaped lamellate antennal club with plate-like segments that open and close

Carabus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae, flattened elongated body
Carabus.wings: elytra fused and flightless in most species; hindwings vestigial
Carabus.color: metallic bronze, copper, gold, or violet; elytra with ridges and pit rows
Carabus.key_mark: large metallic-bronze flightless ground beetle with strongly ridged sculpted elytra

Deloyala.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, very flat with wide marginal flanges
Deloyala.wings: elytra with broad transparent marginal expansions; membranous hindwings
Deloyala.color: mottled black and orange-yellow; elytral margins translucent
Deloyala.key_mark: tortoise-like with broad transparent flanges ringing elytra and pronotum

Coleomegilla.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae, elongate-oval dome
Coleomegilla.color: pink to rose-red elytra with 12 black spots (6 per elytron)
Coleomegilla.key_mark: pink not orange-red elytra; elongated oval body unlike most round lady beetles

Agrilus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short serrate antennae, narrow wedge-shaped body
Agrilus.wings: flat hard elytra tapering to a point; membranous hindwings
Agrilus.color: metallic green, bronze, or copper with iridescent sheen
Agrilus.key_mark: extremely narrow elongated metallic body tapering to a sharp posterior point

Chauliognathus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae, soft flattened body
Chauliognathus.wings: soft leathery elytra (not hardened); membranous hindwings
Chauliognathus.color: yellow-orange with bold black spot or stripe on elytra and pronotum
Chauliognathus.key_mark: soft leathery orange-yellow elytra with large black markings; common on flowers

Glischrochilus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae, compact oval body
Glischrochilus.wings: elytra slightly shortened, exposing abdominal tip; membranous hindwings
Glischrochilus.color: black with 4 bright orange-yellow spots on elytra
Glischrochilus.key_mark: black with 4 orange-yellow spots; truncate elytra expose abdominal tip

Lucanus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed lamellate antennae; males with huge mandibles
Lucanus.key_mark: males with greatly enlarged antler-like mandibles that dwarf the head

Stag Beetle.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed lamellate antennae; males with large mandibles
Stag Beetle.color: dark brown to black; elytra often slightly paler reddish-brown
Stag Beetle.key_mark: males with dramatically branched antler-like mandibles—unmistakable at a glance

Calligrapha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae, broadly oval convex body
Calligrapha.color: cream to white elytra with bold black calligraphic streaks and dots
Calligrapha.key_mark: white elytra with dark pen-stroke calligraphic markings; pattern unique per species

Diabrotica.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae, oval slightly flattened body
Diabrotica.color: bright yellow-green elytra with 12 black spots; head and scutellum black
Diabrotica.key_mark: yellow-green elytra with 12 black spots—resembles a yellow-green ladybug

Polyphylla.structure: robust scarab body; 6 legs; antennae with large lamellate fan-shaped club
Polyphylla.color: brown elytra overlaid with dense white-scale stripes
Polyphylla.key_mark: white longitudinal scale-stripes on brown elytra; male fan-club antennae enormous

Tylonotus.structure: elongate cylindrical body; 6 legs; long filiform antennae
Tylonotus.color: grayish-brown with two pale spots near elytral midpoint
Tylonotus.key_mark: two pale elytral spots on slender gray-brown longhorn

Longhorn Beetle.structure: elongate cylindrical body; 6 legs; antennae often equaling or exceeding body length
Longhorn Beetle.color: highly variable; often banded, spotted, or mottled
Longhorn Beetle.key_mark: extremely long antennae equaling or surpassing body length

Tetraopes.structure: elongate body; 6 legs; antennal sockets divide each compound eye into two lobes
Tetraopes.color: red-orange elytra with black spots; black antennae and legs
Tetraopes.key_mark: vivid red body with black spots; obligate associate of milkweed

Olla.structure: hemispherical domed body; 6 short legs; short clubbed antennae
Olla.color: pale ash-gray with fine black spots; melanic form black with 2 red spots
Olla.key_mark: strongly dimorphic lady beetle; ash-gray speckled form unlike any other coccinellid

Cicindela.structure: slender body; 6 long spindly legs; bulging eyes; large sickle-shaped mandibles
Cicindela.color: metallic green, blue, or purple; elytra with cream spots or lunules
Cicindela.key_mark: huge bulging eyes and curved sickle mandibles; sprints in short bursts on open ground

Ptosima.structure: elongate flattened body; 6 legs; short serrate antennae
Ptosima.color: black with contrasting orange-red spots on elytra
Ptosima.key_mark: black buprestid body with bold orange-red elytral spots

Anthrenus.structure: tiny oval convex body; 6 legs; short clubbed antennae
Anthrenus.wings: elytra surfaced with colored scales concealing hindwings
Anthrenus.color: mottled white, brown, and black scale mosaic
Anthrenus.key_mark: minute oval beetle; elytra patterned with multicolored scales, not a solid color

Malachius.structure: elongate soft body; 6 legs; filiform antennae; eversible red-orange defense vesicles
Malachius.color: iridescent green elytra; red head, pronotum, and elytral tips
Malachius.key_mark: metallic green elytra with red tip and red pronotum

Rhagonycha.structure: elongate soft body; 6 legs; filiform antennae; flexible leathery elytra
Rhagonycha.color: orange-yellow to red-brown; elytral tips darkened
Rhagonycha.key_mark: soft orange-tan elytra with dark tips; regularly found on flower heads

Megacyllene.structure: elongate cylindrical body; 6 legs; long filiform antennae
Megacyllene.color: jet black with bold bright-yellow transverse bands
Megacyllene.key_mark: wasp-mimicking yellow bands on black body; adults common on goldenrod

Atalantycha.structure: elongate soft body; 6 legs; filiform antennae
Atalantycha.color: yellow-orange ground with two dark longitudinal stripes on elytra
Atalantycha.key_mark: two dark stripes running full length of pale elytra

Euchroma.structure: very large elongate flattened body; 6 legs; short serrate antennae
Euchroma.color: brilliant metallic green with coppery-red patches on elytra
Euchroma.key_mark: massive size; vivid iridescent green and copper coloration

Chalcophora.structure: large elongate flattened body; 6 legs; short serrate antennae
Chalcophora.color: dark bronze-brown with pale longitudinal ridges on deeply impressed elytra
Chalcophora.key_mark: heavily sculptured and ridged bronze elytra with cream-highlighted grooves

Paracotalpa.structure: compact oval scarab; 6 legs; lamellate clubbed antennae
Paracotalpa.color: yellowish-brown to reddish-brown; body densely covered in pale hair
Paracotalpa.key_mark: small stout scarab conspicuously clothed in shaggy pale hair

Xanthogaleruca.structure: small oval body; 6 legs; filiform antennae roughly half body length
Xanthogaleruca.color: yellowish-olive with a dark stripe along the outer margin of each elytron
Xanthogaleruca.key_mark: yellow chrysomelid with dark lateral stripe on each elytron; on elm

Diaperis.structure: oval convex body; 6 legs; gradually clubbed antennae
Diaperis.color: shiny black elytra with reddish-orange spots
Diaperis.key_mark: polished black tenebrionid with distinct red-orange elytral spots on fungi

Coccinella.structure: hemispherical domed body; 6 short legs; short clubbed antennae
Coccinella.color: red to orange elytra with black spots; black pronotum with pale lateral marks
Coccinella.key_mark: 7 black spots on red elytra arranged 3+3 plus 1 scutellar

Cypherotylus.structure: oval elongate body; 6 legs; gradually clubbed antennae
Cypherotylus.color: brilliant iridescent metallic blue to blue-black overall
Cypherotylus.key_mark: striking all-over metallic blue sheen; found on bracket fungi

Exomala.structure: robust oval scarab; 6 legs; lamellate clubbed antennae
Exomala.color: highly variable; straw-yellow to dark brown with variable black mottling
Exomala.key_mark: small scarab with extreme color variability; straw-yellow with dark patches common

Dermestes.structure: robust oval body; 6 legs; 11-segmented clubbed antennae
Dermestes.color: dark brown-black elytra; pale yellowish basal band with dark spots
Dermestes.key_mark: pale transverse band with black spots across basal third of elytra

Lucidota.structure: soft elongated body; 6 legs; filiform antennae; large pronotum
Lucidota.wings: soft leathery elytra; membranous hind wings present
Lucidota.color: entirely black or dark grey throughout
Lucidota.key_mark: all-black firefly with broad pronotum fully concealing head from above

Heilipus.structure: stout body; 6 legs; elbowed antennae with club; elongated rostrum
Heilipus.wings: hard elytra; hind wings functional or reduced
Heilipus.color: mottled brown-black with irregular pale scale patches
Heilipus.key_mark: broad stout snout and coarse mottled scale pattern

Weevil.structure: 6 legs; elbowed antennae with compact club; elongated rostrum/snout
Weevil.wings: hard elytra; hind wings present or fused depending on species
Weevil.color: highly variable; commonly brown, grey, or black, often with scales
Weevil.key_mark: elongated snout with antennae inserted midway along its length

Odontotaenius.structure: large robust parallel-sided body; 6 legs; lamellate geniculate antennae
Odontotaenius.wings: hard longitudinally grooved elytra; hind wings folded beneath
Odontotaenius.color: uniformly shiny jet-black dorsally and ventrally
Odontotaenius.key_mark: single short curved horn projecting forward from head

Pyrota.structure: soft elongated body; narrow pronotum; 6 legs; filiform antennae
Pyrota.wings: soft leathery elytra; may not fully cover abdomen
Pyrota.color: yellow-orange ground with black spots or crescent-shaped marks
Pyrota.key_mark: bold black crescent markings on bright yellow-orange elytra

Hippodamia.structure: hemispherical body; 6 short legs tucked under; clubbed antennae
Hippodamia.color: orange-red elytra with black spots; black pronotum with white marks
Hippodamia.key_mark: two white converging streaks on black pronotum

Propylea.structure: hemispherical body; 6 short legs; clubbed antennae
Propylea.color: pale yellow-cream elytra with 14 squarish black spots, often fused
Propylea.key_mark: yellow elytra with rectangular black spots forming a grid-like pattern

Thalassa.structure: hemispherical body; 6 short legs; clubbed antennae
Thalassa.color: orange to red elytra with variable black spots; pale pronotum margins
Thalassa.key_mark: relatively large coccinellid with pale-margined pronotum and orange elytra

Chrysolina.structure: strongly convex oval body; 6 legs; filiform antennae; robust build
Chrysolina.wings: hard elytra with fine puncture rows
Chrysolina.color: vivid metallic: green, blue, red, or bronze depending on species
Chrysolina.key_mark: strongly domed elytra with bright metallic iridescence

Calvia.structure: hemispherical body; 6 short legs; clubbed antennae
Calvia.color: tan to reddish-brown elytra with 14 cream or white rounded spots
Calvia.key_mark: cream/white spots on warm brown background — inverted vs. typical ladybird

Dorcus.structure: robust flattened body; 6 legs; lamellate geniculate antennae; male mandibles enlarged
Dorcus.wings: hard elytra with fine longitudinal ridges
Dorcus.key_mark: flattened matte-black body; male mandibles enlarged but smaller than Lucanus

Anoplotrupes.structure: rounded convex body; 6 legs; lamellate antennae
Anoplotrupes.wings: hard striated elytra; hind wings functional
Anoplotrupes.color: black above; vivid metallic blue or violet on ventral surface
Anoplotrupes.key_mark: brilliant blue-violet metallic underside contrasting sharply with black dorsum

Rutpela.structure: slender tapering body; antennae exceeding body length; 6 legs
Rutpela.wings: narrow elytra tapering to near-pointed tips
Rutpela.color: yellow-cream with variable black blotches and bands
Rutpela.key_mark: wasp-mimicking yellow-and-black pattern with very long antennae

Trichoferus.structure: cylindrical elongated body; long antennae; 6 legs
Trichoferus.wings: hard elytra covered in fine dense pubescence
Trichoferus.color: uniform grey-brown with fine velvety pubescence and faint mottling
Trichoferus.key_mark: dense velvety grey-brown pubescence giving a matte suede-like texture

Capnodis.structure: large flattened elongated body; 6 legs; short serrate antennae
Capnodis.color: black peppered with irregular patches of chalky white scales
Capnodis.key_mark: large flat black buprestid with chalky white scale patches on dorsum

Typhaeus.structure: robust rounded body; 6 legs; lamellate antennae; males with 3 pronotal horns
Typhaeus.key_mark: males bear 3 parallel forward-pointing horns on pronotum

Pterostichus.structure: elongated parallel-sided body; 6 long slender legs; filiform antennae
Pterostichus.wings: hard elytra with deep longitudinal striae
Pterostichus.color: uniformly glossy black dorsum and venter
Pterostichus.key_mark: entirely high-gloss black with deeply striated parallel-sided elytra

Lamprodila.structure: elongated slightly flattened body; 6 legs; short serrate antennae
Lamprodila.color: bright metallic green with coppery-red iridescent reflections
Lamprodila.key_mark: jewel-like metallic green elytra with coppery-red reflections

Pyrochroa.structure: soft elongated body; 6 legs; strongly pectinate antennae in males
Pyrochroa.wings: soft red elytra; membranous hind wings beneath
Pyrochroa.color: vivid red elytra and pronotum; head red or black; legs and antennae black
Pyrochroa.key_mark: brilliant all-red elytra and pronotum with contrasting black appendages

Psyllobora.structure: compact oval body, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae
Psyllobora.wings: hard rounded elytra fully covering abdomen
Psyllobora.color: bright yellow elytra with 22 small black spots
Psyllobora.key_mark: 22 tiny black spots on yellow elytra — more spots than any other common ladybird

Halyzia.structure: compact oval body, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae
Halyzia.wings: hard elytra with pale translucent margins to pronotum
Halyzia.color: pale creamy-orange elytra with 12-16 cream-white spots
Halyzia.key_mark: translucent pale pronotal edge combined with white-spotted orange elytra

Adalia.structure: compact oval body, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae
Adalia.color: typically red with 1 black spot per elytron; melanic forms black with red spots
Adalia.key_mark: single bold black spot centred on each elytron in typical form

Stictoleptura.structure: elongate body narrowing toward head, 6 long legs, long filiform antennae
Stictoleptura.wings: posteriorly tapering elytra typical of Lepturinae
Stictoleptura.color: black with bold red-orange markings on elytra
Stictoleptura.key_mark: heart-shaped red patch on otherwise black elytra

Trichius.structure: robust oval scarab, 6 legs, short lamellate antennae, hairy thorax
Trichius.wings: short elytra leaving abdominal tip exposed
Trichius.color: black body with irregular yellow-ochre bands of dense pale setae on elytra
Trichius.key_mark: bumblebee-mimicking yellow-and-black banded pattern with shaggy hairy thorax

Stenocorus.structure: large elongate body tapering sharply toward head, 6 long legs, long antennae
Stenocorus.color: highly variable; yellow, tawny, gray to black with pale mottling
Stenocorus.key_mark: very large Lepturinae with dramatically waisted, sharply tapering elytra

Acanthocinus.structure: elongate flattened body, 6 legs, extraordinarily long antennae in males
Acanthocinus.key_mark: male antennae up to 5× body length — longest relative antennae of European beetles

Oiceoptoma.structure: flattened oval body, 6 legs, clubbed antennae
Oiceoptoma.wings: abbreviated elytra exposing last 1-2 abdominal tergites
Oiceoptoma.color: vivid red-orange pronotum contrasting sharply with black elytra and head
Oiceoptoma.key_mark: bright red-orange pronotum on black body with visibly short elytra

Aromia.structure: large elongate longhorn, 6 long legs, long antennae, lateral pronotal spines
Aromia.color: brilliant metallic blue-green, sometimes with coppery or golden sheen
Aromia.key_mark: intense metallic blue-green iridescence; emits strong musky scent when disturbed

Cetonia.structure: robust oval scarab, 6 legs, lamellate antennae, large scutellum
Cetonia.wings: elytra with basal notch allowing flight without fully opening
Cetonia.color: brilliant metallic green with irregular white transverse streaks on elytra
Cetonia.key_mark: vivid metallic green with white transverse marks and V-notch at elytral base

Anthaxia.structure: elongate flattened buprestid, 6 short legs, short serrate antennae
Anthaxia.wings: hard metallic elytra tapering to blunt tip
Anthaxia.color: metallic iridescent; males often vivid green or gold, females brassy or greenish
Anthaxia.key_mark: strong sexual dichromatism plus jewel-beetle iridescence

Rhagium.structure: robust elongate body, 6 long legs, medium antennae, coarsely textured elytra
Rhagium.wings: elytra bearing two pale transverse fasciae
Rhagium.color: gray-brown elytra with two pale yellowish diagonal cross-bands; dark pronotum
Rhagium.key_mark: two pale diagonal bands across brown elytra on a robustly built longhorn

Trichodes.structure: elongate soft-bodied hairy beetle, 6 legs, slightly clubbed antennae
Trichodes.color: red or orange elytra with 2-3 irregular blue-black transverse bands
Trichodes.key_mark: striking red-and-blue-black banded elytra with dense erect bristly hairs

Oxythyrea.structure: robust oval scarab, 6 legs, lamellate antennae
Oxythyrea.color: black body densely peppered with irregular white spots on elytra and pronotum
Oxythyrea.key_mark: black chafer covered all over with small white macules

Cerambyx.structure: very large elongate longhorn, 6 long legs, very long antennae, strong mandibles
Cerambyx.wings: dark elytra narrowing posteriorly to reddish-brown tips
Cerambyx.color: dark brown to black; elytral apices rust-brown
Cerambyx.key_mark: one of Europe's largest beetles; rusty-brown elytral tips on otherwise black body

Oedemera.structure: narrow elongate soft beetle, 6 legs; males with massively swollen hind femora
Oedemera.wings: elytra diverge posteriorly leaving abdomen exposed
Oedemera.color: metallic green or bronze; legs often yellowish in O. flavipes
Oedemera.key_mark: elytra gaping apart at rear to expose abdomen; male hind thighs hugely swollen

Phyllopertha.structure: stout compact scarab, 6 legs, lamellate antennae
Phyllopertha.color: metallic dark-green head and pronotum; chestnut-brown elytra; white abdominal tufts
Phyllopertha.key_mark: bicolor contrast of metallic green thorax against chestnut-brown elytra

Rhynchophorus.structure: large robust weevil, 6 legs, elbowed antennae on very long curved rostrum
Rhynchophorus.color: rust-red to reddish-brown; dark blotches often on pronotum
Rhynchophorus.key_mark: very large size with prominent long curved snout; overall rust-red coloration

Leptinotarsa.structure: convex oval leaf beetle, 6 legs, medium filiform antennae
Leptinotarsa.wings: hard domed elytra with bold longitudinal stripes
Leptinotarsa.color: yellow-orange elytra with 5 black longitudinal stripes each; spotted pronotum
Leptinotarsa.key_mark: 10 black longitudinal stripes on domed yellow-orange elytra

Clytra.structure: robust oval leaf beetle, 6 legs, serrate antennae
Clytra.color: red-orange elytra with 4 bold black spots; black head and pronotum
Clytra.key_mark: 4 large black spots on red-orange elytra with contrasting all-black head

Sinodendron.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed lamellate-clubbed antennae; cylindrical build
Sinodendron.key_mark: small upturned cephalic horn on male; distinctly barrel-shaped body

Calosoma.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae; robust flattened carabid
Calosoma.wings: striated or pitted elytra; hindwings present
Calosoma.color: dark black-green with iridescent metallic elytral margins
Calosoma.key_mark: metallic copper or green elytral margins; powerful legs for tree-climbing

Vibidia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; hemispherical ladybird form
Vibidia.color: pale cream to yellowish-white with 12 whitish spots
Vibidia.key_mark: 12 spots on a cream-white background — no red, unlike most ladybirds

Rhyzobius.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; small oval ladybird form
Rhyzobius.color: reddish-brown to dark brown; elytra densely hairy
Rhyzobius.key_mark: tiny hairy plain brown ladybird with no bold spots

Ocypus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; elongated rove beetle build
Ocypus.wings: very short elytra covering only 2 abdominal segments; hindwings folded beneath
Ocypus.key_mark: long exposed flexible abdomen raised scorpion-like when threatened

Agelastica.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; compact oval leaf beetle
Agelastica.key_mark: uniform deep metallic blue-violet; found gregariously on alder foliage

Tropinota.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate-clubbed antennae; compact scarab build
Tropinota.wings: elytra bearing white felty hair-tuft patches
Tropinota.color: dull blackish-brown with scattered white hair patches
Tropinota.key_mark: white hair-patch clusters on dark elytra; found inside open flowers

Meloe.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae (kinked in males); soft-bodied
Meloe.wings: short overlapping elytra leaving abdomen broadly exposed; hindwings absent
Meloe.key_mark: hugely swollen soft abdomen protruding far beyond stubby elytra

Oryctes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate-clubbed antennae; large robust scarab
Oryctes.color: dark chestnut-brown to black; smooth shiny elytra
Oryctes.key_mark: single long curved horn projecting forward from male's head

Cheilomenes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; hemispherical ladybird
Cheilomenes.color: red-orange with variable black spots often in a zigzag arrangement
Cheilomenes.key_mark: black spots in irregular zigzag or arc pattern on red-orange elytra

Olenecamptus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae often exceeding body length; slender cerambycid
Olenecamptus.color: white or pale gray with dark mottling or banding
Olenecamptus.key_mark: pale white ground color with dark markings; very long antennae

Arhopalus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, moderately long filiform antennae; stout cerambycid
Arhopalus.wings: dull leathery elytra tapering toward apex
Arhopalus.color: uniformly dark reddish-brown to blackish-brown, dull surface
Arhopalus.key_mark: plain unpatterned dark brown longhorn; strongly linked to burnt or stressed pine

Sophiodela.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; large-eyed slender tiger beetle
Sophiodela.wings: elytra with pale maculations; hindwings well-developed
Sophiodela.color: metallic green with cream-white elytral maculations
Sophiodela.key_mark: large bulging eyes, metallic green body, bold pale spots on elytra

Ophraella.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; small oblong leaf beetle
Ophraella.key_mark: tan-and-dark longitudinal stripes; found specifically on ragweed (Ambrosia)

Cosmodela.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; large-eyed slender tiger beetle
Cosmodela.wings: elytra with distinct golden spots; strong hindwings
Cosmodela.color: dark metallic ground with bright golden-yellow elytral spots
Cosmodela.key_mark: vivid golden spots on dark metallic elytra; large bulging compound eyes

Naupactus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; moderately long curved rostrum
Naupactus.wings: fused elytra with dense scale-patterned surface; typically flightless
Naupactus.color: mottled gray-brown from overlapping pale and dark scales
Naupactus.key_mark: dense mottled gray-brown scale pattern on fused elytra; elbowed snout antennae

Henosepilachna.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; hemispherical ladybird form
Henosepilachna.key_mark: 28 black spots plus hairy elytra — phytophagous, not an aphid predator

Acrocinus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; males with forelegs longer than body
Acrocinus.wings: elytra with bold geometric mosaic pattern; functional hindwings
Acrocinus.color: black with red, tan, and yellow intricate mosaic across elytra and thorax
Acrocinus.key_mark: harlequin geometric mosaic and male forelegs dramatically longer than body

Disonycha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; enlarged hind femora for jumping
Disonycha.wings: elytra with pale ground and dark lateral stripes
Disonycha.color: black head and pronotum; yellowish-green elytra with dark lateral stripes
Disonycha.key_mark: contrasting black pronotum against pale striped elytra; jumps when disturbed

Chiasognathus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed lamellate-clubbed antennae; large stag beetle
Chiasognathus.color: brilliant metallic green with coppery-red reflections
Chiasognathus.key_mark: enormous curved toothed mandibles on males plus metallic green-copper sheen

Cycloneda.structure: compact oval; 6 legs; short clubbed antennae; 3 fused body regions
Cycloneda.wings: hard elytra over folded membranous hindwings
Cycloneda.key_mark: plain spot-free red-orange elytra separates it from nearly all other ladybirds

Gymnetis.structure: robust scarab; 6 stout legs; lamellate club antennae
Gymnetis.wings: elytra with lateral flight notch; broad membranous hindwings
Gymnetis.color: dark brown or black with irregular cream-white blotchy spots
Gymnetis.key_mark: chaotic inkblot pale-spot pattern on dark elytra

Hylotrupes.structure: elongate cylindrical longhorn; 6 legs; antennae roughly body length
Hylotrupes.color: gray-brown with dense pubescence and two pale elytral patches
Hylotrupes.key_mark: two shiny raised black tubercles on pronotum

Onychocerus.structure: elongate longhorn; 6 legs; antennal segment 11 tipped with venom spine
Onychocerus.key_mark: antennal apex modified into a scorpion-like venom-injecting spine

Charidotella.structure: domed tortoise-form; 6 legs; short antennae hidden under wide pronotal flange
Charidotella.wings: elytra with broad transparent marginal flanges; membranous hindwings
Charidotella.color: liquid mirror gold (shifts to red-orange when disturbed)
Charidotella.key_mark: brilliant living-gold elytra with wide clear flanges, tortoise silhouette

Promeces.structure: very slender elongate longhorn; 6 notably long legs; antennae ~body length
Promeces.color: vivid metallic green to blue-green overall
Promeces.key_mark: brilliant metallic green combined with conspicuously elongated legs

Astylus.structure: soft-bodied elongate-oval; 6 legs; filiform antennae; flexible elytra
Astylus.color: orange-yellow with bold black spots on elytra
Astylus.key_mark: ladybird-like spots on soft leathery elytra; typically pollen-dusted

Oplostomus.structure: large robust scarab; 6 legs; front tibiae strongly toothed; lamellate antennae
Oplostomus.key_mark: heavily armed raptorial front legs adapted for forcing into bee hives

Mausoleopsis.structure: robust oval scarab; 6 legs; lamellate club antennae
Mausoleopsis.wings: elytra with lateral flight notch; membranous hindwings
Mausoleopsis.color: dark brown to black with scattered cream-white spots
Mausoleopsis.key_mark: white spots on dark elytra in a chafer body plan

Chnootriba.structure: compact oval; 6 legs; short clubbed antennae; 3 body regions
Chnootriba.color: orange-yellow ground with numerous small black spots
Chnootriba.key_mark: many-spotted yellowish lady beetle feeding on cucurbit leaf tissue

Atrichonotus.structure: broad-nosed weevil; short wide rostrum; 6 legs; elbowed clubbed antennae
Atrichonotus.color: grayish-brown scales with darker lateral banding
Atrichonotus.key_mark: fringe-like scale tufts along elytral striae on a short broad-snouted weevil

Brachycerus.structure: extremely globose weevil; very short wide rostrum; 6 legs; elbowed antennae
Brachycerus.color: black to dark brown with heavily sculptured warty surface
Brachycerus.key_mark: grotesquely ball-shaped body with raised warty tubercles across elytra

Leucocelis.structure: small robust scarab; 6 legs; lamellate club antennae
Leucocelis.wings: elytra with lateral flight notch; membranous hindwings
Leucocelis.color: bright orange to orange-red across entire dorsal surface
Leucocelis.key_mark: uniformly vivid orange coloration on a small fruit-chafer build

Bradybaenus.structure: large-eyed oval ground beetle; 6 slender legs; filiform antennae
Bradybaenus.color: dark brown to black, sometimes faint metallic sheen
Bradybaenus.key_mark: notably broad pronotum relative to elytra, marsh-dwelling carabid

Sciobius.structure: broad-nosed weevil; short rostrum; 6 legs; elbowed clubbed antennae
Sciobius.wings: elytra likely fused; weakly or non-flying
Sciobius.color: dark central elytra with contrasting pale gray lateral flanks
Sciobius.key_mark: sharply defined pale lateral stripe flanking otherwise dark elytra

Anisorrhina.structure: robust oval scarab; 6 legs; lamellate antennae
Anisorrhina.wings: elytra with lateral flight notch; membranous hindwings
Anisorrhina.color: dark brown to black with pale cream humeral patches
Anisorrhina.key_mark: bold pale epaulette patches at humeral angles of dark elytra

Anthia.structure: large elongate ground beetle; 6 long legs; filiform antennae; fused elytra
Anthia.color: matte black with white spots or longitudinal stripes on elytra
Anthia.key_mark: large flightless black carabid with white spots; sprays acid when threatened

Mecynorhina.structure: very large robust scarab; 6 legs; lamellate antennae; males with cephalic horn
Mecynorhina.wings: elytra with lateral flight notch; broad membranous hindwings
Mecynorhina.color: black with bold orange spots across elytra and exposed abdomen
Mecynorhina.key_mark: large black chafer with vivid orange spots; males with a forked head horn

Onitis.structure: compact rounded scarab; 6 legs; front tibiae flattened for digging; lamellate antennae
Onitis.color: dark bronze-brown to black, uniformly glossy
Onitis.key_mark: bronzy metallic sheen on a tunneler dung beetle with flattened front tibiae

Geodorcus.structure: elongate stag beetle; 6 legs; geniculate antennae; males with enlarged mandibles
Geodorcus.wings: elytra present; hindwings absent; fully flightless
Geodorcus.color: dark brown to black, lightly glossy
Geodorcus.key_mark: flightless NZ stag beetle; males with prominent curved enlarged mandibles

Chondropyga.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate antennae; robust scarab build
Chondropyga.wings: thick hard elytra over folded membranous hindwings
Chondropyga.color: chestnut-brown elytra with irregular cream-yellow blotches

Blosyropus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; pronotum with sharp spines
Blosyropus.color: dark greyish-brown with sparse pale pubescence
Blosyropus.key_mark: prominent sharp lateral spines projecting from pronotum

Cyclocephala.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate club antennae; rounded stout body
Cyclocephala.color: uniform tan to yellowish-brown; pronotum often with dark markings
Cyclocephala.key_mark: plain pale tan scarab lacking horns or strong patterning

Halmus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; compact hemispherical
Halmus.wings: smooth rounded elytra; hindwings present beneath
Halmus.color: uniform iridescent steel-blue to blue-green, no spots
Halmus.key_mark: wholly metallic blue, completely spot-free ladybird

Neomycta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; slender curved rostrum
Neomycta.wings: elytra present; hindwings reduced or absent
Neomycta.key_mark: small entirely reddish weevil with elongate curved snout

Lema.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; elongate leaf-beetle form
Lema.color: metallic blue elytra; head and pronotum reddish-orange
Lema.key_mark: vivid blue elytra sharply contrasting orange-red pronotum

Prionoplus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae nearly body-length; very heavy build
Prionoplus.color: uniform mid to dark brown throughout
Prionoplus.key_mark: NZ's heaviest beetle; massive brown body with very long antennae

Xylotrupes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate antennae; males with horns
Xylotrupes.key_mark: males bear bifurcate cephalic horn and forked thoracic horn

Cassida.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; strongly flattened oval body
Cassida.wings: wide flanged elytra and pronotum hide legs and head from above
Cassida.key_mark: tortoise-shell outline; head completely hidden under pronotal shield

Megadromus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; broad flat ground-beetle
Megadromus.color: jet black, highly glossy on all surfaces
Megadromus.key_mark: large glossy-black flightless carabid; Canterbury NZ endemic

Cleobora.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; large domed body
Cleobora.color: orange-red elytra with large bold black spots
Cleobora.key_mark: unusually large ladybird with bold large-spotted pattern

Neocicindela.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, filiform antennae; long-legged slender body
Neocicindela.wings: elytra present; powerful hindwings for agile flight
Neocicindela.color: brown to bronze with pale cream spots or bands along elytral margins
Neocicindela.key_mark: huge forward-facing eyes and crossed sickle-shaped mandibles

Cryptolaemus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; compact domed body
Cryptolaemus.color: dark brown-black body with orange-red head, pronotum, and elytral tips
Cryptolaemus.key_mark: orange head and orange tail-tip on an otherwise dark ladybird

Navomorpha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae exceeding body length; slender
Navomorpha.wings: elytra with distinct pale longitudinal stripes; hindwings functional
Navomorpha.color: brown base with bold creamy-white longitudinal stripes on elytra
Navomorpha.key_mark: crisp pale stripes running full length of each elytron

Phlyctinus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; robust oval body, short snout
Phlyctinus.color: grey-brown mottled with irregular pale and dark scale patches
Phlyctinus.key_mark: flightless mottled-grey weevil with short broad downcurved rostrum

Paralissotes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pectinate antennae; stout stag-beetle build
Paralissotes.wings: elytra with raised net-like reticulate texture; hindwings present
Paralissotes.key_mark: elytra covered in prominent raised net (reticulate) sculpturing

Coelophora.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; rounded domed body
Coelophora.color: orange to red with variable black spot number and size
Coelophora.key_mark: spot count and arrangement varies strikingly between individuals

Lamprima.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate antennae; males with large mandibles
Lamprima.color: brilliant iridescent gold, green, or blue-green entire body
Lamprima.key_mark: whole beetle glows metallic gold-green; male mandibles enlarged

Orphilus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short clubbed antennae; compact oval body
Orphilus.color: dark brown to black with fine pale scale-like pubescence
Orphilus.key_mark: tiny dark dermestid with scaly surface texture

Cyrtepistomus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; stout curved rostrum
Cyrtepistomus.color: chestnut-brown overlaid with mottled pale scale patches
Cyrtepistomus.key_mark: broad downward-curved rostrum, scaly mottled chestnut pattern

Otiorhynchus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae with apical club
Otiorhynchus.wings: elytra fused in most species; hind wings absent; flightless
Otiorhynchus.color: dull black or brown, often with gray or white scale patches
Otiorhynchus.key_mark: short broad rostrum with antennae inserted at midlength

Xenocnema.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed clubbed antennae; robust oval body
Xenocnema.wings: fused elytra; hind wings reduced or absent
Xenocnema.key_mark: stout short rostrum; bark-dwelling habit on large conifers

Hypsideroides.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae often exceeding body length
Hypsideroides.wings: hard elytra; membranous hind wings for flight
Hypsideroides.color: brown base with concentric pale and dark rings on elytra
Hypsideroides.key_mark: bold concentric circular target-like pattern on elytra

Trachelophorus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae; neck massively elongated in males
Trachelophorus.color: bright red elytra contrasting with jet-black head and elongated neck
Trachelophorus.key_mark: giraffe-like neck up to 2x body length in males

Dynastes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate antennae; males with cephalic and thoracic horns
Dynastes.wings: thick convex elytra; large functional hind wings
Dynastes.color: yellowish-olive to gray elytra with irregular black mottling
Dynastes.key_mark: massive forked cephalic horn + upward thoracic horn in males

Cucujus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long slender antennae; body extremely flattened
Cucujus.wings: flat hard elytra; hind wings present
Cucujus.color: vivid uniform red-orange dorsally and ventrally
Cucujus.key_mark: brilliant red body flattened paper-thin for bark crevice life

Oxysternon.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate antennae; males with single cephalic horn
Oxysternon.key_mark: metallic green dung beetle with single upturned horn in males

Rosalia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae longer than body with black-white bands
Rosalia.color: pale blue-gray elytra with irregular velvety black patches
Rosalia.key_mark: blue-gray elytra with velvety black blotches; hugely banded antennae

Eurhinus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elbowed antennae with club; long curved rostrum
Eurhinus.color: intense iridescent metallic green, gold, and blue-violet

Goliathus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, lamellate antennae; massive robust body
Goliathus.wings: thick hard elytra; very large hind wings
Goliathus.color: black with bold white streaks and patches on elytra and pronotum
Goliathus.key_mark: enormous size with bold black-and-white striped pronotum

Necrophila.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, clubbed antennae; broad oval flattened body
Necrophila.wings: short elytra exposing 1-2 abdominal segments; large hind wings
Necrophila.color: yellow pronotum with central black spot; elytra black
Necrophila.key_mark: bright yellow pronotum with bold black central spot

Orthetrum.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short setaceous antennae; large eyes meeting dorsally
Orthetrum.wings: 2 pairs large net-veined wings held flat at rest
Orthetrum.color: males powder-blue pruinescent; females yellowish-brown with black markings
Orthetrum.key_mark: male powder-blue body with contrasting black abdomen tip

Dragonfly.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short setaceous antennae; huge eyes nearly meeting
Dragonfly.wings: 2 pairs large net-veined wings held horizontally at rest
Dragonfly.color: highly variable; blues, greens, reds, and yellows common
Dragonfly.key_mark: wings held horizontal at rest; eyes meeting or nearly meeting dorsally

Diplacodes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; rounded eyes meeting dorsally
Diplacodes.wings: 2 pairs net-veined wings held horizontally; small basal spots in some
Diplacodes.color: males chalky white-blue pruinescent; females yellow-brown with black markings
Diplacodes.key_mark: males strikingly chalky white overall; perches low on ground

Calopteryx.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; eyes set wide apart on head sides
Calopteryx.wings: 2 pairs broad petiolate iridescent wings folded along abdomen at rest
Calopteryx.color: males brilliant metallic blue-green; wings entirely or partially dark
Calopteryx.key_mark: broad dark-patched wings + iridescent metallic body; fluttering flight

Damselfly.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; compound eyes widely separated
Damselfly.wings: 2 pairs slender net-veined wings folded along abdomen at rest
Damselfly.color: highly variable; blues, reds, and yellows predominate
Damselfly.key_mark: slender abdomen; eyes far apart; wings folded along body at rest

Rhyothemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; hindwings notably broad
Rhyothemis.wings: 2 pairs net-veined; hindwings expanded with bold dark and clear patterning
Rhyothemis.color: wings with large dark brown-black and hyaline or yellow-amber patches
Rhyothemis.key_mark: boldly patterned picture wings with mosaic of dark and clear sections

Cordulia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; large brilliant green eyes
Cordulia.wings: 2 pairs net-veined wings held horizontally; faint amber basal tint
Cordulia.color: metallic bronze-green body; thorax with dense golden-green hair
Cordulia.key_mark: metallic bronze-green body + golden downy thorax + vivid emerald eyes

Urothemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; broad robust abdomen
Urothemis.wings: 2 pairs net-veined; hindwings with large amber-red basal patches
Urothemis.color: males vivid all-over crimson-scarlet; wing bases amber
Urothemis.key_mark: intense all-red male with large amber patches at wing bases

Aeshna.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; large eyes meeting broadly dorsally
Aeshna.wings: 2 pairs large net-veined wings; hindwing with small anal triangle
Aeshna.color: dark brown-black abdomen with rows of blue, green, and yellow spots
Aeshna.key_mark: large size; eyes broadly contiguous on top of head; vivid spots on dark abdomen

Pseudagrion.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; oval eyes widely set; short bristle antennae
Pseudagrion.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate membranous wings, held along abdomen at rest
Pseudagrion.color: blue/black abdomen; face often orange, saffron, or yellow per species
Pseudagrion.key_mark: brightly colored face (orange or yellow) contrasting blue-black abdomen

Libellago.structure: compact damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short antennae
Libellago.wings: 2 pairs broad wings held angled open at rest; often colorfully patterned
Libellago.color: iridescent metallic blue-green thorax; wings with white or yellow patches
Libellago.key_mark: broad jewel-wings held open like butterfly; metallic body sheen

Pachydiplax.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes nearly meeting; short antennae
Pachydiplax.wings: 2 pairs broad membranous wings; brown streaking at base and along veins
Pachydiplax.color: males chalky blue pruinescent; females brown with yellow lateral stripes
Pachydiplax.key_mark: male: powder-blue body with brown-streaked disproportionately long wings

Brachydiplax.structure: small-medium stocky dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Brachydiplax.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings; some species with yellow or amber basal patches
Brachydiplax.color: males blue pruinescent; some species rufous-backed with yellow wing spots
Brachydiplax.key_mark: blue pruinose abdomen on short stocky body; yellow basal hindwing patches

Agriocnemis.structure: very small slender damselfly; 6 legs; widely-spaced eyes; short antennae
Agriocnemis.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate wings, held along abdomen at rest
Agriocnemis.color: variable; often red-orange and black or green-white; strong sexual dimorphism
Agriocnemis.key_mark: among smallest damselflies; often red-tipped abdomen on tiny slender frame

Somatochlora.structure: medium-large dragonfly; 6 legs; large holoptic eyes; short antennae
Somatochlora.wings: 2 pairs clear membranous wings; often with yellow spots at base
Somatochlora.color: brilliant metallic green thorax and abdomen; yellow lateral abdominal spots
Somatochlora.key_mark: vivid metallic emerald-green all over body; bright green compound eyes

Onychothemis.structure: large robust dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Onychothemis.wings: 2 pairs broad membranous wings; amber-tinted, sometimes with dark patches
Onychothemis.color: tawny brown-yellow body; amber-tinted wings; pale yellow abdominal spots
Onychothemis.key_mark: large river hawk; perches on streamside twigs; amber-tinted wings

Cratilla.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Cratilla.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings, sometimes with dark markings
Cratilla.color: dark brown-black body with emerald-green or pale transverse abdominal bands
Cratilla.key_mark: bright emerald-green banding across dark abdomen; pale face

Crocothemis.structure: medium stocky dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Crocothemis.wings: 2 pairs broad wings; amber-red basal patch on hindwings
Crocothemis.color: males uniform fiery scarlet-red; females olive-yellow; amber wing bases
Crocothemis.key_mark: males entirely brilliant scarlet including thorax; amber hindwing base

Neurothemis.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Neurothemis.wings: 2 pairs broad wings; often heavily pigmented brown, red, or black-and-white
Neurothemis.color: males red or brown-red; some species pied black-and-white wing pattern
Neurothemis.key_mark: striking pied or heavily banded wings; some species almost entirely dark

Ceriagrion.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; widely-spaced eyes; short antennae
Ceriagrion.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate wings, held along abdomen at rest
Ceriagrion.color: abdomen uniform orange, yellow, or red without black rings; green thorax
Ceriagrion.key_mark: plain warm-toned abdomen lacking black segmentation; citrus-orange hue

Erythrodiplax.structure: small-medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Erythrodiplax.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings; many species with dark basal and apical bands
Erythrodiplax.color: males dark red to black pruinescent; wing banding black in banded species
Erythrodiplax.key_mark: broad dark wing bands (basal + apical) bracketing clear central wing zone

Anax.structure: very large hawker; 6 legs; huge eyes meeting broadly atop head; long abdomen
Anax.wings: 2 pairs large clear membranous wings; faint amber tinge; no dark patches
Anax.color: bright blue abdomen with black dorsal stripe; apple-green thorax
Anax.key_mark: large size; vivid blue-green coloration; continuous patrolling flight

Libellula.structure: medium-large stout dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Libellula.wings: 2 pairs broad wings; dark spot at each nodus and often at wing base
Libellula.color: brown-yellow to blue pruinescent; bold dark spots at wing nodus and base
Libellula.key_mark: dark nodus spot on all 4 wings; stocky flattened abdomen

Copera.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; widely-spaced eyes; notably expanded flat tibiae
Copera.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate wings held along abdomen at rest
Copera.color: yellow and black pattern; pale yellow body; dark-tipped abdomen
Copera.key_mark: distinctive feathered pale yellow flattened tibiae used in courtship display

Tholymis.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Tholymis.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings; conspicuous white spot near each hindwing apex
Tholymis.color: tawny brown body; coral-red abdomen tip in males; white hindwing patch
Tholymis.key_mark: bold white spot near apex of each hindwing; active at dusk

Potamarcha.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Potamarcha.color: males blue-grey pruinescent with dark terminal abdominal segments; females brown
Potamarcha.key_mark: blue-grey pruinose male with sharply dark abdomen tip; perches on low stems

Austrolestes.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; widely-spaced eyes; short antennae
Austrolestes.wings: 2 pairs narrow wings held open at ~45° angle at rest (spreadwing posture)
Austrolestes.color: bright metallic blue-black; males vivid blue with black markings
Austrolestes.key_mark: wings held open at 45° at rest, not folded along body — spreadwing posture

Plathemis.structure: medium stocky dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Plathemis.wings: 2 pairs broad wings; dark basal patch and broad dark medial band
Plathemis.color: males chalk-white abdomen with dark wing banding; females brown with yellow
Plathemis.key_mark: males: brilliant chalk-white abdomen contrasting bold dark wing bands

Trithemis.structure: small-medium dragonfly; 6 legs; large eyes; short antennae
Trithemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous wings; amber to red-orange basal patch on hindwings
Trithemis.color: males vivid crimson, violet-blue, or yellow per species; amber wing bases
Trithemis.key_mark: intense saturated body color (crimson, violet, or yellow) with amber wing bases

Sympetrum.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, large compound eyes nearly meeting dorsally, short antennae
Sympetrum.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held flat at rest; some spp. with yellow basal wing patches
Sympetrum.color: males red to orange-red; females yellow-brown; some with yellow wing patches
Sympetrum.key_mark: red or orange-red abdomen in males; yellow basal wing patches in some species

Ischnura.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, very slender abdomen, short antennae
Ischnura.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate, folded along abdomen at rest
Ischnura.color: black with blue markings; segment 8 vivid blue on otherwise dark abdomen
Ischnura.key_mark: isolated bright blue spot on abdominal segment 8 — the forktail bluetail mark

Lestes.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, robust for a damselfly, short antennae
Lestes.wings: 2 pairs narrow, held at ~45° angle at rest — diagnostic spreadwing posture
Lestes.color: metallic bronze-green; mature males pruinose blue on S1-2 and S9-10
Lestes.key_mark: wings held at ~45° from body at rest, neither folded flat nor spread horizontal

Paragomphus.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely separated on broad head, short antennae
Paragomphus.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally at rest; hindwings broader at base
Paragomphus.color: black and yellow banded abdomen and thorax
Paragomphus.key_mark: widely separated eyes + slight terminal abdominal club; small gomphid clubtail

Nesciothemis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, large compound eyes meeting dorsally, short antennae
Nesciothemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally at rest
Nesciothemis.color: male pale blue-grey pruinose; abdomen tip strongly black; female brownish
Nesciothemis.key_mark: sharply black-tipped abdomen contrasting with pale pruinose basal segments

Coenagrion.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, slender abdomen, short antennae
Coenagrion.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate, folded along abdomen at rest
Coenagrion.color: blue and black; pale postocular spots; species-specific mark on segment 2
Coenagrion.key_mark: species-specific dorsal S2 pattern distinguishes from other blue damselflies

Hemicordulia.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, large bulging eyes meeting dorsally, short antennae
Hemicordulia.wings: 2 pairs membranous; hindwings broader at base; often slightly drooped at rest
Hemicordulia.color: metallic green thorax and face; dark abdomen with yellow lateral spots
Hemicordulia.key_mark: brilliant metallic emerald-green eyes and thorax

Enallagma.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, very slender build, short antennae
Enallagma.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate, folded along abdomen at rest
Enallagma.color: blue and black ringed abdomen; pale blue postocular spots on head
Enallagma.key_mark: pale blue postocular spots + densely blue-and-black ringed abdomen; bluet

Brachythemis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, compact build, eyes meeting dorsally, short antennae
Brachythemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held flat; some spp. with contrasting dark wing bands
Brachythemis.color: males vivid orange-red; some spp. with contrasting pale and dark wing bands
Brachythemis.key_mark: compact, low-perching dragonfly; males strikingly orange-red throughout body

Epallage.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, robust for a damselfly, short antennae
Epallage.wings: 2 pairs broad, not narrowly petiolate; held partially open at rest
Epallage.color: metallic body; wings with dark spots or patches; often iridescent sheen
Epallage.key_mark: broad wings held partially open at rest; unlike folded-wing pond damselflies

Pantala.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting dorsally, short antennae
Pantala.wings: 2 pairs; hindwings exceptionally broad at base enabling sustained gliding
Pantala.color: golden-yellow body; wings often amber-tinted basally; hindwings largely glassy
Pantala.key_mark: exceptionally broad hindwings; aerial gliding migrant that rarely perches

Sympecma.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, slender, short antennae
Sympecma.wings: 2 pairs narrow, held closed flat along abdomen at rest (not at 45° like Lestes)
Sympecma.color: cryptic straw-brown with bronze-brown dorsal stripe; no bright colours
Sympecma.key_mark: cryptic brown; wings folded flat along body — unlike all other Lestidae

Tramea.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, large eyes meeting dorsally, short antennae
Tramea.wings: 2 pairs; large dark chestnut patches at hindwing bases forming saddlebags
Tramea.color: red or brownish body; bold dark basal hindwing patches conspicuous in flight
Tramea.key_mark: large paired dark saddlebag patches at hindwing bases

Vestalis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, elongate metallic body, short antennae
Vestalis.wings: 2 pairs broad petiolate, largely transparent; dark apex in some species
Vestalis.color: brilliant metallic green body; wings glassy with darkened tips
Vestalis.key_mark: intense metallic green body + broad glassy wings with conspicuous dark tips

Xanthocnemis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, slender, short antennae
Xanthocnemis.wings: 2 pairs narrow petiolate, folded along abdomen at rest
Xanthocnemis.color: bright red to orange-red abdomen and thorax throughout
Xanthocnemis.key_mark: vivid red body; New Zealand's only common red damselfly with no close lookalike

Euphaea.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely spaced, robust, short antennae
Euphaea.wings: 2 pairs broad, iridescent; held partly spread or along abdomen at rest
Euphaea.color: metallic body; wings with extensive dark iridescent patches
Euphaea.key_mark: broad wings with large dark iridescent patches; swift rheophilous stream damselfly

Ictinogomphus.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes widely separated; abdomen strongly club-shaped distally
Ictinogomphus.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally at rest
Ictinogomphus.color: bold black and yellow banding throughout body
Ictinogomphus.key_mark: dramatically expanded terminal abdominal club + widely separated eyes

Erythemis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes meeting dorsally, robust compact build, short antennae
Erythemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally at rest
Erythemis.color: males vivid lime-green (young) to blue-pruinose (mature); females green with black
Erythemis.key_mark: males brilliant lime-green body — among the greenest of New World dragonflies

Dasythemis.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, eyes meeting dorsally, short antennae
Dasythemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held flat; some spp. with dark basal wing patches
Dasythemis.color: dark abdomen with pale yellow dorsal median stripe; streaked thorax
Dasythemis.key_mark: pale dorsal stripe running full length of dark abdomen

Hydrobasileus.structure: 3 segments, 6 legs, large eyes meeting dorsally, short antennae
Hydrobasileus.wings: 2 pairs; hindwings broad at base; entire wing membrane uniformly amber-tinted
Hydrobasileus.color: brownish-yellow body; all four wings uniformly deep amber throughout
Hydrobasileus.key_mark: entire wing membrane uniformly deep amber — no clear-winged areas at all

Indosticta.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely set on narrow head; short bristle antennae
Indosticta.wings: 4 narrow petiolate wings held closed along body at rest
Indosticta.color: dark brown-black body with saffron-orange abdominal tip
Indosticta.key_mark: saffron-orange tip on otherwise dark, very slender abdomen

Acisoma.structure: compact dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Acisoma.wings: 4 broad hyaline wings held flat at rest
Acisoma.color: powder-blue and black grizzled pattern on pale body
Acisoma.key_mark: very short stout abdomen tapering sharply to a point — pintail silhouette

Macrodiplax.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Macrodiplax.wings: 4 hyaline wings with large dark-brown basal patches on all four
Macrodiplax.color: yellowish-brown body; prominent dark basal wing patches
Macrodiplax.key_mark: bold dark basal patches covering base of all 4 wings

Rhodothemis.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Rhodothemis.wings: 4 hyaline wings, sometimes amber-tinged at base
Rhodothemis.color: uniformly rufous/brick-red body, thorax, and legs
Rhodothemis.key_mark: entirely rufous-red coloration including spiny legs

Neurobasis.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short bristle antennae
Neurobasis.wings: 4 broad wings; male wholly metallic emerald-green; held along body at rest
Neurobasis.color: male metallic green body and wings; female brown with white pseudopterostigma
Neurobasis.key_mark: male's wholly metallic emerald-green wings flash brilliantly in sunlight

Leucorrhinia.structure: small dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Leucorrhinia.wings: 4 hyaline wings; hindwing with small dark basal patch
Leucorrhinia.color: dark body with red or yellow spots; stark white frons
Leucorrhinia.key_mark: chalk-white face contrasting sharply with dark spotted body

Chalcolestes.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short bristle antennae
Chalcolestes.wings: 4 narrow petiolate wings held open at ~45° from body at rest
Chalcolestes.color: bright metallic green body with bronze highlights; hyaline wings
Chalcolestes.key_mark: wings held spread open at rest on metallic green body — spreadwing posture

Zyxomma.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Zyxomma.wings: 4 hyaline to faintly smoky wings; abdomen strongly petiolate
Zyxomma.key_mark: very strongly waisted elongate abdomen; plain brown; crepuscular habits

Remartinia.structure: large dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly meeting at crown; short bristle antennae
Remartinia.wings: 4 broad hyaline wings held flat at rest
Remartinia.color: brown thorax with pale lateral stripes; abdomen with pale blue spots
Remartinia.key_mark: large aeshnid hawker; eyes meeting at crown; pale lateral thorax stripes

Adversaeschna.structure: large dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly meeting at crown; short bristle antennae
Adversaeschna.wings: 4 broad hyaline wings held flat at rest
Adversaeschna.color: dark brown-black body; blue spots on abdomen; blue-green thorax markings
Adversaeschna.key_mark: vivid blue abdominal spots on dark body; eyes broadly meeting at crown

Aciagrion.structure: very slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short bristle antennae
Aciagrion.wings: 4 narrow petiolate hyaline wings held along body at rest
