Aciagrion.color: pale blue with fine black markings; extremely slender abdomen
Aciagrion.key_mark: needle-thin abdomen — among the most slender of blue pond damselflies

Chlorolestes.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short bristle antennae
Chlorolestes.wings: 4 petiolate hyaline wings, held partially spread or along body
Chlorolestes.color: brilliant malachite-green metallic body; clear wings
Chlorolestes.key_mark: intense malachite-green metallic body in shaded forest stream habitat

Hemistigma.structure: small dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Hemistigma.wings: 4 wings with conspicuous white or pale spots near each apex
Hemistigma.color: dark brown to black body; white apical wing spots
Hemistigma.key_mark: white spots at all four wing tips on a dark-bodied dragonfly

Tetrathemis.structure: small dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Tetrathemis.wings: 4 hyaline wings with irregular black splash at each apex
Tetrathemis.color: pale brownish body; irregular dark apical wing patches
Tetrathemis.key_mark: irregular ink-splash black patches at tips of all four wings

Indothemis.structure: medium dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Indothemis.wings: 4 hyaline wings with white apical patches and dark basal spots
Indothemis.color: jet black body and thorax; pale/white wing-tip patches
Indothemis.key_mark: jet-black body contrasting with bold white patches at all wing tips

Austroaeschna.structure: large dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes meeting at crown; short bristle antennae
Austroaeschna.wings: 4 broad hyaline wings held flat at rest
Austroaeschna.color: brown body with blue and yellow-green lateral spots on thorax and abdomen
Austroaeschna.key_mark: large forest hawker with blue-green abdominal spots; eyes meeting at crown

Erythromma.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes large, widely separated; short bristle antennae
Erythromma.wings: 4 narrow petiolate hyaline wings held along body at rest
Erythromma.color: dark metallic body with blue markings; vivid scarlet-red compound eyes
Erythromma.key_mark: vivid red compound eyes instantly distinguish from other blue pond damselflies

Telebasis.structure: very slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short bristle antennae
Telebasis.wings: 4 narrow petiolate hyaline wings held along body at rest
Telebasis.color: vivid scarlet-red body with thin black markings
Telebasis.key_mark: brilliant red coloration on a tiny, delicate firetail damselfly

Aethriamanta.structure: small dragonfly; 6 legs; eyes broadly contiguous; short bristle antennae
Aethriamanta.wings: 4 notably short wings relative to body length; amber basal tint
Aethriamanta.color: scarlet red body; wings with amber basal wash
Aethriamanta.key_mark: scarlet body with distinctively short, stubby wings

Pyrrhosoma.structure: slender damselfly; 6 legs; eyes widely separated; short bristle antennae
Pyrrhosoma.wings: 4 narrow petiolate hyaline wings held along body at rest
Pyrrhosoma.color: bright red body with black markings; entirely black legs
Pyrrhosoma.key_mark: bright red body with all-black legs — unique among European red damselflies

Dythemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting dorsally, bristle antennae
Dythemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally; often angled forward while perching
Dythemis.color: dark brown to black; mature males may develop blue-grey pruinescence
Dythemis.key_mark: habit of perching with wings tilted forward at an angle ('set-wing' posture)

Dysphaea.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes on broad head, bristle antennae
Dysphaea.wings: 2 pairs membranous, smoky to heavily pigmented, held partly spread at rest
Dysphaea.color: dark metallic brown or black body; wings uniformly dark or smoky throughout
Dysphaea.key_mark: uniformly dark wings on a robust torrent-specialist damselfly

Choristhemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting dorsally, bristle antennae
Choristhemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally at rest
Choristhemis.color: yellow and black banded slender abdomen; pale thorax with dark dorsal stripes
Choristhemis.key_mark: striking tiger-striped yellow-and-black abdomen on a slender dragonfly

Allocnemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, slender build, bristle antennae
Allocnemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, narrow, held folded along abdomen at rest
Allocnemis.color: black body; posterior abdominal segments bright yellow-gold
Allocnemis.key_mark: vivid gold tail tip contrasting sharply against black body

Palpopleura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting dorsally, bristle antennae
Palpopleura.wings: 2 pairs membranous; bold basal patches of black and yellow on all wings
Palpopleura.color: males white-pruinose or yellow; females brown; all with patterned wing bases
Palpopleura.key_mark: conspicuous dark-and-pale basal wing patches visible at any perch angle

Bradinopyga.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting dorsally, bristle antennae
Bradinopyga.wings: 2 pairs membranous, clear to lightly tinted, held horizontally
Bradinopyga.color: mottled grey, cream, and dark brown cryptic pattern matching granite rock
Bradinopyga.key_mark: stone-grey cryptic mottling; nearly invisible when perched on rock

Uropetala.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting, very robust thorax, bristle antennae
Uropetala.wings: 2 pairs very large membranous with petaltail venation, held horizontally
Uropetala.color: black with bold yellow stripes on thorax and abdomen
Uropetala.key_mark: exceptional size; among the world's largest Odonata; NZ endemic

Platycnemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, distinctly widened flat tibiae
Platycnemis.wings: 2 pairs narrow membranous, held folded along abdomen at rest
Platycnemis.color: pale blue or white with black markings; females greenish-white
Platycnemis.key_mark: conspicuously expanded, flattened white or pale mid and hind tibiae

Disparoneura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, slender abdomen, bristle antennae
Disparoneura.wings: 2 pairs membranous with extensive black pigmentation, apically or throughout
Disparoneura.color: dark body; wings with bold black patches covering much of the wing surface
Disparoneura.key_mark: large black wing markings on a slender Asian stream damselfly

Paracercion.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, slender build, bristle antennae
Paracercion.wings: 2 pairs membranous, narrow, held folded along abdomen at rest
Paracercion.color: blue and black segmented abdomen; paired pale postocular spots on head
Paracercion.key_mark: blue-and-black coenagrionid pattern; perches flat on floating vegetation

Orthemis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes nearly meeting dorsally, bristle antennae
Orthemis.wings: 2 pairs membranous, broad, held horizontally at rest
Orthemis.color: males brilliant rose-pink to magenta; females brown with yellow lateral stripes
Orthemis.key_mark: intense rose-pink to magenta coloration of mature males unmistakable

Phyllogomphus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely separated eyes, robust thorax, bristle antennae
Phyllogomphus.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally; gomphid venation
Phyllogomphus.color: yellow and black patterned; abdominal tip with broad pale expansion
Phyllogomphus.key_mark: broad flattened leaf- or paddle-shaped expansion at abdomen tip

Argia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, slender body, bristle antennae
Argia.wings: 2 pairs narrow membranous, held folded or slightly open along abdomen
Argia.color: blue, violet, or purple with black markings; patterns vary by species
Argia.key_mark: vivid blue-violet coloration combined with active low dancing flight

Ophiogomphus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely separated eyes, stout thorax, bristle antennae
Ophiogomphus.wings: 2 pairs membranous, held horizontally; moderate abdominal club near tip
Ophiogomphus.color: bright apple-green and black; green thorax with bold black dorsal stripes
Ophiogomphus.key_mark: vivid bright green coloration diagnostic among clubtail dragonflies

Platycypha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, spaced eyes; males with strikingly flattened tibiae
Platycypha.wings: 2 pairs membranous, often partly spread; may have dark or pale patches
Platycypha.color: males metallic blue-black with brilliant white, red, or orange flattened legs
Platycypha.key_mark: vividly colored expanded flat tibiae waved conspicuously in display

Ecchlorolestes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, slender build, bristle antennae
Ecchlorolestes.wings: 2 pairs membranous, often held partly spread at rest
Ecchlorolestes.color: brilliant iridescent metallic green over entire body
Ecchlorolestes.key_mark: uniform vivid emerald-green metallic sheen head to tail-tip

Archibasis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, very slender abdomen, bristle antennae
Archibasis.wings: 2 pairs narrow membranous, held folded along abdomen at rest
Archibasis.color: blue and black; posterior abdominal segments with elongated pale blue bands
Archibasis.key_mark: extended pale blue banding on rear abdomen segments creating bluetail effect

Onychargia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, slender build, bristle antennae
Onychargia.wings: 2 pairs membranous, narrow, held folded along abdomen at rest
Onychargia.color: predominantly blackish body with minimal pale or blue markings
Onychargia.key_mark: largely black marsh damselfly with strikingly reduced pale patterning

Heliocypha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely spaced eyes, robust for a damselfly, bristle antennae
Heliocypha.wings: 2 pairs membranous with white or dark patches, held partly spread at rest
Heliocypha.color: males brilliant ruby-red or scarlet with metallic blue-black; iridescent wings
Heliocypha.key_mark: vivid ruby-red body patches and iridescent wings on a hill-stream jewel

Lindenia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, widely separated eyes, stout thorax, bristle antennae
Lindenia.wings: 2 pairs large membranous, held horizontally; prominent gomphid venation
Lindenia.color: yellow and black striped body; broad pale expansion at abdominal tip
Lindenia.key_mark: prominent broad blade-shaped abdominal appendages visible in flight and at rest

Gomphus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, eyes nearly separated, tiny setose antennae
Gomphus.wings: 2 pairs glassy unequal membranous wings held flat horizontally at rest
Gomphus.color: black with yellow-green markings on thorax and abdomen
Gomphus.key_mark: abdomen clubbed at tip — segments 7-9 distinctly swollen

Cordulegaster.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large eyes touch at single dorsal point, tiny antennae
Cordulegaster.wings: 2 pairs large glassy membranous wings held horizontal at rest
Cordulegaster.color: black with bold alternating yellow rings along full abdomen length
Cordulegaster.key_mark: bold alternating black and yellow bands spanning entire abdomen length

Zoraena.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, eyes contiguous at single dorsal point, tiny antennae
Zoraena.wings: 2 pairs glassy membranous wings held horizontally at rest
Zoraena.color: dark brown to black with yellow spots or banding on abdomen
Zoraena.key_mark: long ovipositor spike projecting beyond abdomen tip in females

Neotibicen.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, wide blunt head, large wide-set eyes, short antennae
Neotibicen.wings: 2 pairs long transparent membranous wings, tent-like past abdomen at rest
Neotibicen.color: black and green patterned thorax; abdomen often greenish-tinged
Neotibicen.key_mark: wide blunt head; wings far exceeding abdomen; loud sustained buzzing

Cicada.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, blunt head, wide-set compound eyes, short antennae
Cicada.wings: 2 pairs long clear membranous wings, held tent-like past abdomen tip at rest
Cicada.color: variable; brown, black, or green cryptic patterning; some vivid green
Cicada.key_mark: wings much longer than abdomen; robust body; males produce loud sustained sound

Graphocephala.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, wedge-shaped body, hindlegs with 2 rows of spines
Graphocephala.wings: tegmina held roof-like over abdomen; short and broad
Graphocephala.color: vivid blue-green and red or orange longitudinal stripes on tegmina
Graphocephala.key_mark: electric blue-green and red/orange longitudinal striping on forewings

True Bug.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, piercing rostrum (beak) folded under head
True Bug.wings: hemelytra: basal half hardened, distal half membranous, flat over abdomen
True Bug.color: highly variable; brown, green, red/black aposematic, or cryptic
True Bug.key_mark: half-hard half-membranous forewings forming visible X or triangle on dorsum

Myodocha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, head set on distinctly elongated narrow neck
Myodocha.color: dark brown to black with reddish-brown legs and pale antennal banding
Myodocha.key_mark: strikingly elongated neck giving giraffe-like head-to-thorax profile

Lycorma.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae with globose basal segment, robust body
Lycorma.wings: forewings gray with black spots; hindwings red with black spots and white band
Lycorma.color: gray spotted forewings; hindwing flash red/black/white visible in flight
Lycorma.key_mark: gray spotted forewings concealing vivid red and black spotted hindwings

Planthopper.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, hindlegs modified for jumping
Planthopper.wings: 2 pairs, forewings held tent-like or flat; form variable by family
Planthopper.color: highly variable; cryptic browns to vivid aposematic patterns
Planthopper.key_mark: antennae below compound eyes (planthoppers) or pronotum greatly enlarged (treehoppers)

Acanthocephala.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust coreid body, 4-segmented antennae
Acanthocephala.wings: hemelytra held flat over abdomen; wings exceed abdomen tip
Acanthocephala.color: dark brown to grayish-brown, often with reddish-orange tints on legs
Acanthocephala.key_mark: hind tibiae strongly flattened and expanded into leaf-like flanges

Halyomorpha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, broad pentagonal body, 5-segmented banded antennae
Halyomorpha.wings: hemelytra held flat; broad shield silhouette
Halyomorpha.color: mottled brown; pale/dark bands on last 2 antennal segments and abdominal margin
Halyomorpha.key_mark: alternating light/dark bands on abdominal margin and last 2 antennal segments

Stink Bug.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, broad pentagonal body, large triangular scutellum
Stink Bug.wings: hemelytra flat over abdomen; pentagonal shield silhouette
Stink Bug.color: variable: solid green, mottled brown, or bold red/black/orange patterning
Stink Bug.key_mark: large triangular scutellum; broad 5-sided shield outline

Chinavia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pentagonal body, large scutellum, 5-segmented antennae
Chinavia.wings: hemelytra flat; distal membranous area green-tinged
Chinavia.color: uniform vivid green with narrow pale yellow stripe along abdominal margin
Chinavia.key_mark: solid bright green shield-shaped body with pale lateral abdominal stripe

Murgantia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pentagonal shield body, large scutellum
Murgantia.color: jet black with bold red-orange geometric patches on pronotum and hemelytra
Murgantia.key_mark: vivid black and red-orange geometric blocks; among most colorful stink bugs

Oncopeltus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elongated narrow-oval body, 4-segmented antennae
Oncopeltus.wings: hemelytra held flat; bold bicolor pattern visible from above
Oncopeltus.color: bright orange-red with broad black transverse band across middle of dorsum
Oncopeltus.key_mark: bright orange-red and black with broad black transverse band across midline

Homalodisca.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust wedge-shaped body, strongly protruding head
Homalodisca.wings: tegmina held roof-like, mottled brown; broader than typical leafhoppers
Homalodisca.color: brown to tan with irregular pale mottling and speckling on tegmina
Homalodisca.key_mark: large robust leafhopper; mottled brown tegmina; strongly projecting head

Platycotis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pronotum greatly enlarged, extending over abdomen
Platycotis.wings: hemelytra mostly hidden under expanded pronotum at rest
Platycotis.color: variable; orange-red to brown with dark banding; pronotum boldly patterned
Platycotis.key_mark: pronotum extended as tall lateral flanges or spine arching over the abdomen

Sehirus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust oval body, tibiae lined with stout spines
Sehirus.wings: hemelytra dark with pale marginal band; held flat
Sehirus.color: shiny black with distinct white or pale margin band around abdomen perimeter
Sehirus.key_mark: shiny black oval with pale white marginal stripe; spine-studded tibiae

Pyrrhocoris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, oval body, often brachypterous (short-winged)
Pyrrhocoris.wings: often reduced hemelytra not fully covering abdomen; macropterous forms exist
Pyrrhocoris.color: vivid red with contrasting black geometric spots on pronotum and hemelytra
Pyrrhocoris.key_mark: vivid red with black spots; paired face-like spots on pronotum

Bagrada.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, shield-shaped, 5-segmented antennae, piercing beak
Bagrada.color: Black with bold orange and white contrasting markings
Bagrada.key_mark: Bold black, orange, and white pattern on small shield-shaped body

Arilus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elongate, strongly curved piercing beak, thread-like antennae
Arilus.color: Dark gray to brownish-gray, uniformly dull
Arilus.key_mark: Gear-like cog crest (the 'wheel') on thorax — unique among North American bugs

Sibovia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, wedge-shaped, hind tibiae with bristle rows
Sibovia.wings: Leathery tegmina held flat over abdomen
Sibovia.color: Green to yellow-green with vivid yellow longitudinal stripes
Sibovia.key_mark: Vivid yellow stripes on green wedge-shaped leafhopper body

Magicicada.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust blunt head, short bristle-like antennae
Magicicada.wings: 4 large clear wings with bold orange venation, held tent-like at rest
Magicicada.color: Black body, red-orange eyes, orange wing veins, banded orange abdomen
Magicicada.key_mark: Red eyes + orange wing veins on black body — periodical cicada hallmark

Entylia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pronotum humped and extended rearward over abdomen
Entylia.color: Brownish-green to dark, often with pale lateral markings
Entylia.key_mark: Sharp median dorsal keel on pronotum projecting rearward over abdomen

Rhyparochromus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, flattened oval body, forward-projecting beak
Rhyparochromus.wings: Hemelytrons with membranous apical wing tips
Rhyparochromus.color: Dark brown to black with pale cream spots or bands
Rhyparochromus.key_mark: Contrasting pale spots on dark brown flattened ground-hugging body

Pseudoxenetus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, soft oval body, long slender 4-segmented antennae
Pseudoxenetus.wings: Hemelytrons with distinct cuneus demarcation; fully winged
Pseudoxenetus.color: Greenish to brownish with variable pale markings
Pseudoxenetus.key_mark: Cuneus clearly demarcated on forewing; typical plant bug body plan

Aphis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, soft pear-shaped abdomen, paired abdominal cornicles
Aphis.wings: Mostly wingless; winged morphs with 4 clear wings held flat
Aphis.color: Vivid yellow-orange body with jet-black cornicles, legs, and antennae
Aphis.key_mark: Brilliant yellow-orange aphid with contrasting jet-black cornicles and appendages

Aphid.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, soft pear-shaped abdomen, paired cornicle tubes
Aphid.wings: Usually wingless; winged morphs with 4 clear wings folded flat
Aphid.color: Highly variable: green, yellow, black, pink, or gray depending on species
Aphid.key_mark: Paired cornicle tubes projecting from rear of abdomen

Leptoglossus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hind tibiae with flat leaf-like lateral expansions
Leptoglossus.color: Brown with a white zigzag crossband across wings; orange-blushed margins
Leptoglossus.key_mark: Distinctive leaf-like flattened lobes on hind tibiae

Pachypsylla.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, compact, medium antennae, strong jumping hind legs
Pachypsylla.wings: 4 wings held roof-like over abdomen; forewing with bold venation
Pachypsylla.key_mark: Associated with hackberry galls; wings held in steep tent at rest

Cosmopepla.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, compact shield shape, 5-segmented antennae
Cosmopepla.color: Glossy black with red-orange border and two bold red-orange dorsal spots
Cosmopepla.key_mark: Two vivid red-orange spots on black — the 'twice-stabbed' pattern

Chlorochroa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, broad shield shape, large triangular scutellum
Chlorochroa.color: Uniform bright green overall, sometimes tiny pale marginal dots
Chlorochroa.key_mark: Large uniform bright-green stink bug; scutellum reaches well past mid-abdomen

Adelges.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, tiny sessile adult affixed to conifer twig
Adelges.wings: Females wingless; males with 4 wings, rarely encountered
Adelges.color: Dark purplish-black body concealed under dense white waxy wool
Adelges.key_mark: White woolly wax masses clustered at base of hemlock needles

Euthyrhynchus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, shield-shaped, stout predatory piercing beak
Euthyrhynchus.color: Dark blue-black with bold red-orange spots along abdominal margins
Euthyrhynchus.key_mark: Dark body ringed with vivid red-orange marginal spots; stout predatory beak

Gelastocoris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, squat warty body, massive bulging compound eyes
Gelastocoris.color: Mottled gray-brown cryptically matching wet sand or mud
Gelastocoris.key_mark: Enormous protruding eyes and warty toad-like shape; found on muddy shores

Pentatoma.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pentagonal shield body, 5-segmented antennae
Pentatoma.color: Dark brown to bronze-green body with distinctly red-orange legs
Pentatoma.key_mark: Bright red-orange legs contrasting sharply with dark brown shield body

Nezara.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, smooth broad shield, 5-segmented antennae
Nezara.color: Uniformly bright solid green; adults lack contrasting markings
Nezara.key_mark: Entirely uniform bright green shield bug with no bold spots or banding

Spilostethus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elongate-oval, prominent forward-projecting beak
Spilostethus.color: Bold red-orange and black aposematic banding
Spilostethus.key_mark: Striking alternating red-black banded pattern signals aposematic toxicity

Palomena.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, smooth oval shield, 5-segmented antennae
Palomena.wings: Hemelytrons with contrasting dark membranous wing tips
Palomena.color: Bright green in summer; bronzes to brown before overwintering
Palomena.key_mark: All-green shield with dark wing-tip membrane; bronzes to brown in autumn

Oxycarenus.structure: 6 legs, small oval flattened body, 4-segmented antennae, short rostrum
Oxycarenus.color: grayish-black elytra, red-orange abdomen visible at wing margins
Oxycarenus.key_mark: red abdomen exposed around dark wing margins when viewed from above

Acanthosoma.structure: 6 legs, pentagonal shield body, 3-segmented tarsi, medium antennae
Acanthosoma.color: green with red-brown shoulder patches and red-tipped abdomen
Acanthosoma.key_mark: red abdomen apex projecting visibly beyond wing tips

Oncotylus.structure: 6 legs, slender oval plant-bug body, long 4-segmented antennae
Oncotylus.wings: hemelytra with distinct cuneus, pale membrane
Oncotylus.key_mark: vivid yellow-green coloration; found on knapweed flowerheads

Corizus.structure: 6 legs, elongate-oval body, medium antennae, no scent glands
Corizus.color: bright red-orange with bold black spots and markings
Corizus.key_mark: vivid red body with black spots; mimics firebugs but lacks scent glands

Tritomegas.structure: 6 legs, broadly oval burrowing-bug build, stout antennae
Tritomegas.color: bold black and white (cream) pied pattern
Tritomegas.key_mark: striking black-and-white shield pattern; unique among Cydnidae

Cydnus.structure: 6 legs, robust oval body, spine-fringed fossorial forelegs
Cydnus.key_mark: entirely shiny black with spine-fringed burrowing forelegs

Nepa.structure: 6 legs, flattened oval body, raptorial forelegs, long caudal siphon
Nepa.color: dull gray-brown dorsal, orange-red beneath hindwings
Nepa.key_mark: long thin caudal breathing siphon paired with raptorial front legs

Water Bug.structure: 6 legs, flattened aquatic body, raptorial forelegs, caudal siphon
Water Bug.key_mark: caudal breathing siphon + raptorial forelegs; fully aquatic predator

Phyllomorpha.structure: 6 legs, strongly leaf-shaped flattened body, jagged lateral lobes
Phyllomorpha.key_mark: jagged leaf-like lateral lobes; eggs often visible glued to dorsum

Zelus.structure: 6 legs, slender elongate body, long curved 3-segmented beak, long antennae
Zelus.color: pale tan to brown with darker brown dorsal stripe and markings
Zelus.key_mark: very slender waist; sticky setose forelegs used to snare prey

Liocoris.structure: 6 legs, small oval plant-bug body, long slender antennae
Liocoris.color: yellowish-brown with three dark spots on hemelytra
Liocoris.key_mark: three dark spots on pale hemelytra; obligately on stinging nettles

Kleidocerys.structure: 6 legs, small oval seed-bug body, 4-segmented antennae
Kleidocerys.color: pale yellowish-brown with small darker spots and streaks
Kleidocerys.key_mark: tiny pale bug aggregating densely on birch catkins in late summer

Graphosoma.structure: 6 legs, rounded shield bug, large scutellum, medium antennae
Graphosoma.wings: hemelytra largely obscured by enlarged scutellum
Graphosoma.color: red with black longitudinal stripes or bold black spots (species-dependent)
Graphosoma.key_mark: aposematic red-and-black striped or spotted pattern on strongly scutellate bug

Dolycoris.structure: 6 legs, oval shield bug, dense fine pubescence over whole body
Dolycoris.color: reddish-brown with black punctures; antennae banded black and white
Dolycoris.key_mark: visibly hairy body + alternately black-and-white banded antennae

Eurydema.structure: 6 legs, rounded pentagonal shield bug, medium antennae
Eurydema.color: red or orange with black blotches, or metallic blue-black with red markings
Eurydema.key_mark: bold contrasting red/black or metallic shield pattern; Brassicaceae feeder

Gastrodes.structure: 6 legs, small elongate-oval seed bug, medium antennae
Gastrodes.color: dark brown-black with pale yellowish-white lateral spots
Gastrodes.key_mark: dark seed bug found inside pine and spruce cones; pale lateral spots

Himacerus.structure: 6 legs, slender elongate predatory bug, long antennae, grasping forelegs
Himacerus.key_mark: slender predatory bug frequently short-winged with subtly raptorial forelegs

Coreus.wings: hemelytra, broad abdomen extends beyond wing margins
Coreus.color: uniform dull brown; abdomen reddish-brown beneath
Coreus.key_mark: 4th antennal segment distinctly club-shaped and darkened vs. pale base segments

Eurygaster.structure: 6 legs, oval body, hugely enlarged scutellum covering abdomen
Eurygaster.wings: hemelytra fully concealed under expanded scutellum
Eurygaster.color: variable brown to tan, sometimes pale median stripe
Eurygaster.key_mark: smooth tortoise-shell oval outline; scutellum covers entire abdomen

Cyphostethus.structure: 6 legs, angular shield bug with projecting humeral angles, medium antennae
Cyphostethus.color: bright green with pinkish-red to purple pronotal and costal margins
Cyphostethus.key_mark: green shield bug with distinctive pink-red margins on pronotum and forewings

Rhaphigaster.structure: shield-shaped body, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, large scutellum
Rhaphigaster.wings: leathery hemelytra with membranous tips, hindwings folded beneath
Rhaphigaster.color: mottled grey-brown with scattered pale and dark speckling
Rhaphigaster.key_mark: uniformly speckled grey-brown shield; no bold contrasting pattern

Piezodorus.structure: typical pentatomid shield shape, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae
Piezodorus.wings: hemelytra with membranous apical portion, hindwings beneath
Piezodorus.color: vivid green in spring; reddish-brown in autumn overwintering form
Piezodorus.key_mark: dramatic seasonal colour shift from vivid green to dull red-brown

Metatropis.structure: extremely slender body, 6 very long legs, antennae with swollen apical club
Metatropis.wings: narrow hemelytra, body so thin wings appear outsized
Metatropis.color: pale yellowish-brown with reddish tinge on abdomen
Metatropis.key_mark: stilt-bug gestalt: thread-thin legs and knobbed antennal tips

Elasmucha.structure: ovoid shield-bug, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, broad rounded scutellum
Elasmucha.color: brownish-grey with greenish tinge and irregular darker mottling
Elasmucha.key_mark: female photographed brooding egg mass or nymphs on leaf underside

Belonochilus.wings: hemelytra with distinct corium and membrane; narrow cuneus visible
Belonochilus.color: black with bold white patches on hemelytra
Belonochilus.key_mark: stark black-and-white pied pattern on hemelytra

Lygaeus.wings: red corium, dark membrane bearing pale spot
Lygaeus.color: brilliant red and black with white spot on dark wing membrane
Lygaeus.key_mark: vivid aposematic red-and-black pattern with pale spot on membrane

Mustha.structure: pentatomid shield shape, 6 legs, pronotal margins strongly serrated
Mustha.wings: hemelytra covering abdomen, membranous hindwings beneath

Plagiognathus.structure: small oval plant bug, 6 legs, 4-segmented antennae, soft-bodied
Plagiognathus.wings: hemelytra with distinct cuneus; membranous lower wing
Plagiognathus.color: dark brown to blackish; cuneus often contrastingly pale or whitish
Plagiognathus.key_mark: tiny dark bug with pale cuneus standing out on hemelytra

Jikradia.structure: wedge-shaped leafhopper, 6 legs, hind tibiae with rows of spines
Jikradia.wings: 2 pairs; tegmina held rooflike; hindwings membranous
Jikradia.key_mark: coppery-bronze iridescent sheen across entire body

Corythucha.structure: flat-bodied, 6 legs, pronotum and hemelytra form reticulate lace network
Corythucha.wings: hemelytra entirely lace-like reticulated; hindwings membranous beneath
Corythucha.color: whitish to pale brown with dark spots visible through lace lattice
Corythucha.key_mark: elaborate lacy reticulated pronotum and hemelytra

Stagonomus.structure: typical pentatomid shield shape, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae
Stagonomus.color: brownish with reddish patches; lateral pronotal margins pale cream
Stagonomus.key_mark: pale cream lateral pronotal edges contrasting with darker disc

Picromerus.structure: robust pentatomid, 6 legs, sharply acute lateral pronotal spines
Picromerus.wings: dark hemelytra covering abdomen, dark membrane
Picromerus.color: brown mottled with pale speckling; orange-red spots on abdominal margin
Picromerus.key_mark: acute pointed shoulder spines plus orange lateral abdominal spots

Dysdercus.structure: elongate pyrrhocorid, 6 legs, 4-segmented antennae, narrow body
Dysdercus.wings: hemelytra partially cover abdomen; membranous tips
Dysdercus.color: vivid red-orange body with black and/or white bands on hemelytra
Dysdercus.key_mark: bold red body with contrasting black transverse hemelytra markings

Leptocentrus.structure: treehopper, 6 legs, pronotum produced into rearward-pointing horn
Leptocentrus.wings: tegmina leathery, concealed under pronotum; hindwings membranous
Leptocentrus.key_mark: pronotal horn projecting rearward over abdomen like a miniature helmet

Pyrops.structure: large planthopper, 6 legs, long waxy cephalic process (snout)
Pyrops.wings: 2 pairs; tegmina patterned; hindwings membranous often vividly banded
Pyrops.color: snout red to orange-tipped; wings banded red, green, and black
Pyrops.key_mark: long conspicuous coloured cephalic snout projecting from head

Graptopsaltria.structure: robust cicada, 6 legs, large compound eyes, short bristle-like antennae
Graptopsaltria.wings: 2 pairs of large transparent wings held tent-like at rest
Graptopsaltria.color: dark brown with contrasting greenish-brown pronotal and thoracic markings
Graptopsaltria.key_mark: large uniformly dark brown cicada with greenish pronotal banding

Erthesina.structure: large pentatomid, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, broad scutellum
Erthesina.wings: hemelytra with membranous tips, folded flat over abdomen
Erthesina.color: dark blackish-brown with irregular yellow spots scattered across dorsum
Erthesina.key_mark: large size with scattered yellow spots on dark brown shield

Membracis.structure: treehopper, 6 legs, pronotum laterally expanded into broad flanged helmet
Membracis.wings: tegmina concealed beneath pronotum; hindwings membranous
Membracis.color: black with contrasting yellow or white transverse bands on pronotum
Membracis.key_mark: broad laterally flanged pronotum banded black and yellow

Arvelius.structure: typical pentatomid shield shape, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae
Arvelius.color: brownish-green with row of white spots along abdominal connexivum
Arvelius.key_mark: white-spotted connexivum (abdominal margin) on brownish-green shield

Zammara.structure: robust cicada, 6 legs, large compound eyes, short bristle-like antennae
Zammara.wings: 2 pairs of large transparent wings held tent-like at rest
Zammara.key_mark: entire body brilliant green with clear transparent wings

Sphaerocoris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short segmented antennae, piercing beak
Sphaerocoris.wings: large scutellum fully covers abdomen; membranous hindwings beneath
Sphaerocoris.color: pale gray-brown ground with dark brown spots in geometric rows
Sphaerocoris.key_mark: domed scutellum covering entire abdomen in turtle-shell spot pattern

Ectrichodia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust curved beak, medium antennae
Ectrichodia.color: jet-black body with bold orange-red cross or X marking on dorsum
Ectrichodia.key_mark: vivid orange-red crux marking on black assassin bug body

Oxypleura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bristle-like antennae, stout broad body
Oxypleura.wings: 2 pairs transparent membranous wings held tent-like at rest
Oxypleura.color: brownish-black with pale or greenish pronotal and abdominal markings
Oxypleura.key_mark: sharp angular projecting pronotal collar flanges flanking midline

Codophila.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, triangular scutellum
Codophila.color: mottled variegated mix of brown, red-orange, and cream patches
Codophila.key_mark: irregularly blotched variegated pattern across pentatomid shield

Dactylopius.structure: females sedentary oval body under wax coating; males minute with antennae
Dactylopius.wings: females wingless; males 1 functional wing pair
Dactylopius.color: white cottony wax mass externally; body vivid carmine-red when crushed
Dactylopius.key_mark: woolly white wax colonies on Opuntia; bleeds bright red dye

Caura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, triangular scutellum
Caura.color: dark dorsum contrasting with bright rufous-red ventral abdomen
Caura.key_mark: bright rufous-red underside visible at abdomen margin

Psyttala.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout curved beak, body with lateral spines
Psyttala.color: dark brown to black with orange-red or yellow warning markings
Psyttala.key_mark: massive spiny body; among Africa's largest assassin bugs

Basicryptus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, triangular scutellum
Basicryptus.color: uniform dull brown, slightly paler at lateral connexivum
Basicryptus.key_mark: plain unmarked brown stink bug with no contrasting pattern

Steganocerus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, convex rounded body
Steganocerus.wings: large scutellum fully covers abdomen; hindwings beneath
Steganocerus.color: orange-red with black spots arranged in ladybird-like pattern
Steganocerus.key_mark: ladybird-mimicking spot pattern on scutellum; bug not beetle

Mulvia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, planthopper body plan
Mulvia.wings: broad triangular forewings held tent-like over body at rest
Mulvia.color: brown with two distinct pale cream-white transverse bands on forewings
Mulvia.key_mark: two pale bands across tent-held wings; ricaniid planthopper shape

Pameridea.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long slender antennae, elongate soft body
Pameridea.wings: hemelytra + membranous hindwings; may be brachypterous
Pameridea.color: reddish-brown to pale tan, sometimes with diffuse darker markings
Pameridea.key_mark: found exclusively on sticky-leaved Roridula carnivorous plants

Cenaeus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 4-segmented antennae, oval flattened body
Cenaeus.wings: hemelytra + membranous hindwings; some brachypterous individuals
Cenaeus.color: vivid red with bold contrasting black patches
Cenaeus.key_mark: striking red-and-black aposematic pattern; typical pyrrhocorid oval

Diaspis.structure: females legless beneath circular armor plate; body fused to scale
Diaspis.wings: females wingless; males 1 functional wing pair
Diaspis.size: 1-2.5 mm body; scale cover to 3 mm
Diaspis.color: pale white to gray circular armor scale encrusting host surface
Diaspis.key_mark: tiny circular white armor scales encrusting cactus pad surface

Tectocoris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae, large convex rounded scutellum
Tectocoris.wings: scutellum covers wings; membranous hindwings beneath
Tectocoris.color: bright orange-red with iridescent metallic blue-green patches; sexually dimorphic
Tectocoris.key_mark: harlequin orange and metallic blue-green on convex rounded scutellum

Choerocoris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, large rounded convex scutellum
Choerocoris.wings: large scutellum covers wings; membranous hindwings beneath
Choerocoris.color: red-orange with bold black spots, bright metallic sheen
Choerocoris.key_mark: gem-bright red scutellum with crisp black spots; jewel-like finish

Monteithiella.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, triangular scutellum
Monteithiella.color: olive-brown with conspicuous pale cream patches at humeral angles
Monteithiella.key_mark: pale cream shoulder patches at pronotal humeral angles

Cyclochila.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, bristle-like antennae, robust stout body
Cyclochila.wings: 2 pairs large transparent wings with strong venation, held tent-like
Cyclochila.color: uniform vivid apple-green with black patterning on head and thorax
Cyclochila.key_mark: brilliant uniform lime-green body; Australia's iconic loud cicada

Yoyetta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short bristle antennae, robust cicada body
Yoyetta.wings: 2 pairs transparent membranous wings held tent-like at rest
Yoyetta.color: mostly black body with bright orange-red abdominal tip
Yoyetta.key_mark: fiery orange-red tail tip contrasting sharply with black body

Psaltoda.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short bristle antennae, stout robust body
Psaltoda.wings: 2 pairs transparent wings with clear venation, held tent-like
Psaltoda.color: green with black patterning on head, thorax, and abdominal segments
Psaltoda.key_mark: large northern QLD green cicada; black-banded abdominal pattern

Musgraveia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, broad oval body
Musgraveia.color: adults bronze-orange-brown overall; nymphs vivid green or orange
Musgraveia.key_mark: large bronze-orange stink bug; sprays foul corrosive fluid when disturbed

Kikihia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short bristle-like antennae, robust thorax
Kikihia.wings: 4 clear membranous wings held tent-like at rest; forewings longer
Kikihia.color: cryptic brown, black, and green mottled pattern
Kikihia.key_mark: large bulging compound eyes flanking broad head; tymbal organs at abdomen base

Laccotrephes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; raptorial forelegs, long caudal breathing siphon
Laccotrephes.wings: fully winged; leathery hemelytra over membranous hindwings
Laccotrephes.key_mark: long slender caudal breathing siphon nearly as long as body

Oncacontias.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, shield-shaped body
Oncacontias.wings: hemelytra; triangular scutellum not fully covering abdomen
Oncacontias.color: green to brown mottled; pale connexivum margins
Oncacontias.key_mark: prosternum spine visible beneath; shield shape endemic to NZ forest

Tuberolachnus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, soft-bodied, long antennae; prominent dorsal tubercle
Tuberolachnus.wings: alate and apterous morphs; 4 membranous wings in alates
Tuberolachnus.color: dark gray-brown with conspicuous black dorsal tubercle
Tuberolachnus.key_mark: prominent conical dorsal tubercle on abdomen; dense colonies on willow bark

Scolypopa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae; planthopper body plan
Scolypopa.wings: broad triangular reticulate forewings held tent-like at rest
Scolypopa.color: mottled brown with pale and dark patches on forewings
Scolypopa.key_mark: nymphs carry conspicuous waxy white tail filaments

Arocatus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 4-segmented antennae, elongate-oval body
Arocatus.key_mark: bright red-orange and black coloration; found on swan plant seed pods

Scutiphora.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, enlarged scutellum covering entire abdomen
Scutiphora.color: vivid iridescent metallic green or blue-green
Scutiphora.key_mark: entire dorsum covered by large iridescent scutellum — classic jewel bug

Cimex.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, extremely flattened oval body
Cimex.wings: vestigial wing pads only; functionally wingless
Cimex.color: mahogany to rusty brown; darker reddish-brown when engorged
Cimex.key_mark: apple-seed shape, paper-flat profile, and vestigial wing stubs

Oeciacus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, flattened oval cimicid body plan
Oeciacus.wings: vestigial wing pads only; functionally wingless
Oeciacus.key_mark: denser body hairs than Cimex; obligate associate of martin and swallow nests

Stiretrus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, 5-segmented antennae, shield-shaped pentatomid
Stiretrus.color: blue-black with red, orange, or white spots; variable
Stiretrus.key_mark: bold anchor-shaped pale mark on pronotum and scutellum

Carpocoris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout antennae, pentatomid shield shape
Carpocoris.color: reddish-brown with alternating pale and dark connexivum spots
Carpocoris.key_mark: checkerboard pale-and-dark banding along exposed abdominal margins

Aelia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, elongate pentatomid with distinctly pointed head
Aelia.wings: hemelytra; body narrower than typical stink bug
Aelia.color: pale straw-yellow with dark longitudinal median stripe
Aelia.key_mark: distinctly pointed conical head giving bishop's-mitre silhouette

Tetraneura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, soft-bodied, cornicles very short or absent
Tetraneura.wings: alate and apterous morphs; membranous in alates
Tetraneura.key_mark: induces tight pouch galls on elm leaves; barely visible cornicles

Conocephalus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hind legs enlarged; antennae much longer than body
Conocephalus.wings: long narrow tegmina; hindwings membranous, often extending beyond

Conocephalus.key_mark: slender conical face; females with slender straight sword-like ovipositor

Bush Cricket.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hind legs enlarged; antennae longer than body
Bush Cricket.wings: leathery tegmina; hindwings membranous or reduced; some flightless
Bush Cricket.color: green or brown cryptic coloration matching vegetation
Bush Cricket.key_mark: antennae clearly exceed body length; females with prominent curved ovipositor

Schistocerca.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hind legs greatly enlarged; antennae short
Schistocerca.wings: leathery tegmina + broad fan-folded hindwings; strong flier
Schistocerca.color: tan to brown with pale median dorsal stripe; gregarious phase yellow-black
Schistocerca.key_mark: pale longitudinal stripe down pronotum; capable of locust-phase swarming

Grasshopper.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, hind legs greatly enlarged; antennae shorter than body
Grasshopper.wings: leathery tegmina over fan-folded membranous hindwings; some short-winged
Grasshopper.color: highly variable; brown, green, yellow, or boldly patterned
Grasshopper.key_mark: short antennae + oval tympanum on each side of first abdominal segment

Campylacantha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, spiny tuberculate body; short antennae
Campylacantha.wings: tegmina short and reduced; hindwings vestigial; flightless
Campylacantha.color: olive-green throughout, densely covered in short pale hairs
Campylacantha.key_mark: distinctly fuzzy-hairy body texture unique among similar grasshoppers

Ammopelmatus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 robust legs, very large rounded head; short antennae
Ammopelmatus.color: amber-orange with dark brown transverse abdominal banding
Ammopelmatus.key_mark: oversized smooth rounded head on banded barrel body; fully wingless

Romalea.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very heavy robust build, hind legs enlarged
Romalea.wings: short stubby tegmina; hindwings vestigial; flightless
Romalea.color: bold black and yellow-orange aposematic pattern; hindwings pinkish-red
Romalea.key_mark: massive flightless body; gaudy black-yellow-red warning coloration

Melanoplus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short filiform antennae, spur-throated
Melanoplus.color: olive-brown dorsum, contrasting red hind tibiae
Melanoplus.key_mark: bright red hind tibiae against brown body

Sphagniana.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very long filiform antennae
Sphagniana.wings: brachypterous; short tegmina leave abdomen exposed
Sphagniana.key_mark: short-winged katydid restricted to sphagnum bog habitat

Mermiria.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, elongate slender form
Mermiria.color: tan/brown with pale dorsolateral stripe from eye to wing tip
Mermiria.key_mark: narrow elongate build with bold pale lateral facial and body stripe

Gryllomorpha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very long antennae, long cerci
Gryllomorpha.key_mark: wingless pale cricket found in rock crevices and caves

Cricket.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very long filiform antennae, prominent cerci
Cricket.wings: variable; tegmina often present, hindwings folded beneath or absent
Cricket.color: brown to black; many species uniform dark
Cricket.key_mark: long cerci + males with stridulatory file on tegmina

Saga.structure: 3 body sections, 6 long spiny legs, extremely long antennae, elongate
Saga.color: green or pale straw-yellow with narrow pale lateral stripe
Saga.key_mark: enormous wingless predatory bush-cricket; Europe's largest orthopteran

Tettigonia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae longer than body
Tettigonia.wings: long green tegmina projecting well beyond abdomen tip
Tettigonia.color: uniform bright green; narrow brown dorsal stripe in some
Tettigonia.key_mark: large all-green katydid with wing tips extending past abdomen

Decticus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae, robust build

Decticus.color: mottled green and brown; albifrons has pale whitish face
Decticus.key_mark: boldly mottled tegmina on a heavy-bodied bush-cricket

Psophus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, stocky

Psophus.color: cryptic brown forewings; scarlet hindwings revealed in flight
Psophus.key_mark: scarlet hindwings + audible rattling sound produced in flight

Isophya.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae, plump rounded body

Isophya.color: green, often with dark dorsal stripe or lateral spots
Isophya.key_mark: plump green bush-cricket with conspicuously stubby short wings

Anacridium.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, very large locust form
Anacridium.wings: fully winged; long tegmina, broad hindwings
Anacridium.color: gray-brown with pale spots; compound eyes vertically striped
Anacridium.key_mark: very large size + boldly striped compound eye

Cyrtaspis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae, small delicate build
Cyrtaspis.wings: vestigial; tegmina reduced to tiny pads
Cyrtaspis.key_mark: tiny all-green Meconematinae with near-absent wing pads on oak

Eupholidoptera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae, moderately robust
Eupholidoptera.wings: brachypterous or apterous; wings not functional
Eupholidoptera.color: dark brown with marbled or mottled patterning

Gomphocerippus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, distinctly clubbed antennae
Gomphocerippus.wings: fully winged; tegmina reach or pass abdomen tip
Gomphocerippus.key_mark: clubbed antennae with bright white or pale ivory tips

Locusta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, large robust locust

Locusta.color: solitarious: green or brown; gregarious: yellow-brown with black marks
Locusta.key_mark: striking color-phase polyphenism between solitary and gregarious forms

Stenobothrus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, medium build

Stenobothrus.color: green or brown with white costal stripe and small black spots
Stenobothrus.key_mark: bright white costal vein stripe running along tegmen edge

Calliptamus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, stout build
Calliptamus.wings: fully winged; hindwings pink-red at base
Calliptamus.color: mottled brown; hindwing base pink to crimson
Calliptamus.key_mark: pink-red hindwing base flashed in flight

Roeseliana.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae, medium build
Roeseliana.color: dark brown-black with cream-yellow lateral pronotal border and pale spots
Roeseliana.key_mark: yellow-cream band framing pronotum sides + pale abdominal spots

Tetrix.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae, pronotum keeled
Tetrix.wings: hindwings present; pronotum projected rearward concealing wings
Tetrix.key_mark: backward-projecting pronotum extending to or beyond abdomen tip

Pholidoptera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae, moderately robust

Pholidoptera.key_mark: dark brown flightless bush-cricket with sharply contrasting yellow underside

Podisma.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust acridid build, short filiform antennae
Podisma.wings: tegmina vestigial pads or absent; hindwings absent

Podisma.key_mark: wingless or near-wingless build in alpine grassland

Pseudochorthippus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout, short antennae
Pseudochorthippus.color: green or brown with cream lateral stripe on pronotum and forewing
Pseudochorthippus.key_mark: straight parallel forewing margins with pale lateral stripe

Meconema.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender, antennae much longer than body
Meconema.key_mark: all-green body with very long antennae and short wing pads

Bicolorana.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender, antennae longer than body
Bicolorana.color: green dorsum, brown flanks; sharply two-toned

Aiolopus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, slender elongate, short antennae
Aiolopus.wings: fully winged; hindwings pale with dark transverse band
Aiolopus.color: vivid green with pale dorsal stripe; banded hindwings
Aiolopus.key_mark: slender green body; dark band across hindwings visible in flight

Chorthippus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout, short antennae

Chorthippus.key_mark: strongly arched bow-shaped forewing costal vein

Acrida.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, extremely elongate; head conical, projecting forward
Acrida.key_mark: extremely elongated conical face nearly rivaling body length

Pseudoxya.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, compact acridid build, short antennae
Pseudoxya.wings: tegmina short, not reaching abdomen tip
Pseudoxya.key_mark: markedly short tegmina on otherwise standard acridid body

Gampsocleis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust, antennae much longer than body
Gampsocleis.color: green or brown with dark spots or mottling
Gampsocleis.key_mark: massive stout katydid with very long antennae and powerful jaws

Gryllotalpa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs; forelegs massively enlarged as digging shovels
Gryllotalpa.wings: fully winged; hindwings project as filaments beyond abdomen tip
Gryllotalpa.key_mark: mole-like fossorial forelegs with fused toothed tibia-tarsal shovels

Euthystira.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout, short antennae

Euthystira.key_mark: vivid golden-green coloration with very short wing stubs

Chondracris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large robust build, short antennae
Chondracris.color: bright green body; vivid pink-red hindwings
Chondracris.key_mark: large green grasshopper with shocking pink-red hindwings

Celes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, stout, short antennae
Celes.wings: fully winged; hindwings boldly banded black and yellow or white

Chromacris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, robust lubber build, short antennae
Chromacris.color: black with vivid red-orange and green markings; aposematic
Chromacris.key_mark: bold aposematic black-red-green pattern on a lubber-type body

Omura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, conical face, pyrgomorphid profile
Omura.color: vivid multicolored; green, yellow, and red combinations
Omura.key_mark: pyrgomorphid conical face with gaudy aposematic coloration

Hetrodes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very robust armored body, short stout antennae
Hetrodes.color: mottled brown and gray, heavily sclerotized
Hetrodes.key_mark: massive spiny flightless katydid with beetle-like armored build

Zonocerus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, conical face, medium build
Zonocerus.color: brilliant orange, black, and yellow aposematic pattern

Eurycorypha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, flattened body, antennae longer than body
Eurycorypha.wings: broad flat leaf-mimicking tegmina with detailed venation
Eurycorypha.color: green with intricate leaf-vein pattern on wings
Eurycorypha.key_mark: broad flat tegmina with realistic leaf venation mimicry

Andriana.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, pronotum extended posteriorly over abdomen
Andriana.wings: tegmina minute pads; hindwings functional beneath pronotum
Andriana.key_mark: pronotum extended far back past abdomen tip — defining tetrigid trait

Acanthacris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, large robust locust build, short antennae
Acanthacris.wings: fully winged; hindwings blue with dark border
Acanthacris.color: brown mottled; hindlegs red-orange; hindwings blue
Acanthacris.key_mark: blue hindwings with dark border; red-orange hindlegs

Hemideina.structure: robust cricket-like body, 6 spiny legs, long filiform antennae, large mandibles
Hemideina.wings: tegmina short or absent; typically flightless
Hemideina.color: dark brown to black with pale yellow banding on abdomen
Hemideina.key_mark: massively enlarged head and mandibles in males

Valanga.structure: elongate grasshopper, 6 legs with enlarged hindlegs, short-medium antennae
Valanga.wings: leathery tegmina over broad membranous hindwings
Valanga.key_mark: very large size; coarse bark-like mottled pattern

Macrotona.structure: stout grasshopper, 6 legs with enlarged hindlegs, short antennae
Macrotona.key_mark: cryptic bark-matching coloration with keeled pronotum

Stenocatantops.structure: slender grasshopper, 6 legs, acutely angled narrow face, short antennae
Stenocatantops.color: brown with pale cream dorsal stripe from head through pronotum
Stenocatantops.key_mark: narrow pointed face with pale cream dorsal stripe

Caedicia.structure: laterally compressed body, 6 long legs, antennae much longer than body
Caedicia.key_mark: brilliant leaf-green body with very long thread-like antennae

Austrosalomona.structure: katydid body plan, 6 legs, antennae much longer than body
Austrosalomona.key_mark: sickle-shaped ovipositor in females; olive-drab coloration

Goniaea.structure: robust grasshopper, 6 legs with enlarged hindlegs, short antennae
Goniaea.key_mark: strongly angled pronotal crest; bark-cryptic mottling

Ephippitytha.structure: robust katydid, 6 legs, antennae much longer than body

Ephippitytha.key_mark: approximately 32 distinct dark spots on broad tegmina

Gryllus.structure: stout cricket, 6 legs, paired cerci, long filiform antennae
Gryllus.wings: flat tegmina over abdomen; male forewing bears stridulating file
Gryllus.color: shiny black; pale yellowish wing margins
Gryllus.key_mark: large shiny black cricket with loud sharp chirp

Gryllodes.structure: slender cricket, 6 legs, paired cerci, very long antennae
Gryllodes.wings: short truncated tegmina not covering abdomen
Gryllodes.color: pale tan to light brown with dark transverse abdominal bands
Gryllodes.key_mark: banded abdomen; distinctly truncated stub-like tegmina

Melanogryllus.structure: stout cricket, 6 legs, paired cerci, long antennae
Melanogryllus.key_mark: small all-dark cricket of open dry habitats

Teleogryllus.structure: robust cricket, 6 legs, paired cerci, long antennae
Teleogryllus.wings: full-length tegmina; hindwing tips often project as paired tails
Teleogryllus.key_mark: all-black cricket; hindwing filament tips projecting beyond tegmina

Henicus.structure: heavily built, wingless, 6 spiny legs, long antennae, massive mandibles
Henicus.color: dark brown to blackish with rugose texture
Henicus.key_mark: monstrous toothed mandibles on fully wingless armored body

Pardalophora.structure: medium-large grasshopper, 6 legs with enlarged hindlegs, short antennae
Pardalophora.wings: cryptic brown tegmina; hindwings coral-pink to red
Pardalophora.color: brown mottled forewings; vivid coral-red to pinkish hindwings
Pardalophora.key_mark: coral-pink hindwings flashing open in flight

Oxya.structure: compact grasshopper, 6 legs with enlarged hindlegs, short antennae
Oxya.color: green to olive with distinct pale cream lateral stripe
Oxya.key_mark: bold pale cream stripe running from eye along pronotum sides

Neoxabea.structure: slender tree cricket, 6 legs, very long filiform antennae
Neoxabea.wings: broad flat pale tegmina held horizontally at rest
Neoxabea.color: straw-yellow; male forewing with two dark spots
Neoxabea.key_mark: two dark spots on pale straw-yellow male forewing

Metrioptera.structure: medium bush-cricket, 6 legs, antennae longer than body
Metrioptera.color: brown to olive with pale cream lateral stripe on pronotum
Metrioptera.key_mark: pale pronotal side-stripe; stub wings on otherwise robust cricket

Leptophyes.structure: slender bush-cricket, 6 long legs, antennae much longer than body
Leptophyes.color: bright green densely speckled with tiny white dots
Leptophyes.key_mark: vivid green body covered in white speckles; stub-only wings

Clogmia.structure: tiny fly, 3 body sections, 6 legs, short beaded antennae
Clogmia.wings: broad hairy ovate wings held tent-like over body at rest
Clogmia.color: mottled grey with dense pale and dark body hairs throughout
Clogmia.key_mark: moth-like hairy wings held roof-wise; found resting near drains

Fly.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, prominent compound eyes, short to medium antennae
Fly.wings: one membranous forewing pair; hindwings reduced to knobbed halteres
Fly.color: highly variable; grey, black, metallic, banded, or patterned
Fly.key_mark: only one functional wing pair; halteres visible as small knobs behind wings

Tipula.structure: slender 3-segment fly body, 6 extremely long fragile legs, filiform antennae
Tipula.color: pale gray-brown; wings plain to faintly mottled
Tipula.key_mark: impossibly long trailing legs dangling conspicuously in flight

Crane Fly.structure: slender 3-segment fly body, 6 very long fragile legs, filiform antennae
Crane Fly.color: gray, brown, or tan; wings plain to lightly patterned
Crane Fly.key_mark: mosquito-like but much larger; legs detach easily when grabbed

Toxomerus.structure: slender fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae, 3 body sections
Toxomerus.wings: 1 pair clear membranous with spurious vein (vena spuria), halteres
Toxomerus.color: black abdomen with narrow yellow to cream lateral calligraphic marks
Toxomerus.key_mark: thin calligraphic yellow lines on black abdomen; hovers at flowers

Hover Fly.structure: fly body plan, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Hover Fly.wings: 1 pair membranous with diagnostic spurious vein (vena spuria), halteres
Hover Fly.color: many species yellow-and-black wasp or bee mimics
Hover Fly.key_mark: stationary hovering in midair; spurious wing vein unique to family

Helophilus.structure: medium robust fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Helophilus.color: thorax black with 3-4 bold longitudinal yellow stripes; abdomen yellow-banded
Helophilus.key_mark: striped thorax like a tiny bee viewed from above

Diogmites.structure: elongate tapering abdomen, 6 legs, short 3-segment antennae, bristled mystax
Diogmites.color: gray-black with pale lateral abdominal spots; legs dark
Diogmites.key_mark: hangs vertically from vegetation tip while consuming captured prey

Eristalis.structure: robust bee-like fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Eristalis.color: brown-black with orange-yellow abdominal patches mimicking honey bee
Eristalis.key_mark: convincing drone bee mimic with large holoptic eyes; only 1 wing pair

Sericomyia.structure: medium-large fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Sericomyia.wings: 1 pair membranous, sometimes faintly infuscated, halteres
Sericomyia.color: black with bold yellow-orange abdominal bands; thorax dark
Sericomyia.key_mark: wasp mimic with rich amber-yellow bands; associated with boggy habitats

Pyrgota.structure: medium fly, large domed head, 6 legs, no ocelli, short antennae
Pyrgota.wings: 1 pair with intricate brown wave patterning, halteres
Pyrgota.color: yellowish-brown to orange-tan body with dark banded wings
Pyrgota.key_mark: elaborately waved wing pattern; no ocelli on head

Episyrphus.structure: slender fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Episyrphus.wings: 1 pair clear membranous with spurious vein, halteres
Episyrphus.color: orange-yellow abdomen with doubled black bands separated by pale interspaces
Episyrphus.key_mark: double black bands per abdominal segment creating marmalade pattern

Volucella.structure: large robust fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Volucella.wings: 1 pair large membranous, sometimes dark at base, halteres
Volucella.color: variable: white abdominal fascia or hornet-colored yellow-black banding
Volucella.key_mark: among the largest hoverflies; bold contrasting abdominal pattern

Aedes.structure: slender fly, 6 long legs, elongate piercing proboscis, filiform antennae
Aedes.wings: 1 pair narrow membranous with scales on veins, halteres
Aedes.color: black with bright white silver scale bands on legs and abdomen
Aedes.key_mark: white-banded black legs; proboscis parallel to body surface at rest

Mosquito.structure: slender fly, 6 long legs, long piercing proboscis, plumose antennae in males
Mosquito.wings: 1 pair narrow membranous with scales on veins, halteres
Mosquito.color: brown to black; many with white scale patches or bands
Mosquito.key_mark: scaled wing veins and long forward-pointing proboscis unique among flies

Bombylius.structure: rotund densely furred fly, 6 legs, short antennae, long rigid proboscis
Bombylius.wings: 1 pair large membranous with dark leading-edge patch, halteres
Bombylius.color: golden-brown dense thoracic fur; wings dark at base and leading edge
Bombylius.key_mark: long unretracted stiff proboscis projecting forward; furry bee mimic

Dioctria.structure: slender elongate fly, 6 legs, short antennae, bristled mystax
Dioctria.color: black thorax and abdomen; bright orange-red femora
Dioctria.key_mark: vivid red-orange legs contrasting sharply with all-black body

Myathropa.structure: robust fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Myathropa.color: yellow and black with pale skull-like mark on black thorax dorsum
Myathropa.key_mark: skull or batman-face pattern on dorsal thorax diagnostic for genus

Scaeva.structure: slender fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Scaeva.wings: 1 pair clear membranous with spurious vein, halteres
Scaeva.color: black abdomen with paired white or cream curved comma-shaped lunules
Scaeva.key_mark: paired white comma-shaped spots on black abdomen

Drosophila.structure: tiny fly, 6 legs, aristate antennae, large bright red compound eyes
Drosophila.color: yellowish-tan body; brilliant red eyes; males of some spp. with dark wing spot
Drosophila.key_mark: brilliant red eyes; tiny size; drawn to fermenting fruit

Chloromyia.structure: broad flattened fly, 6 legs, short antennae
Chloromyia.wings: 1 pair folded flat scissor-like over broad abdomen at rest, halteres
Chloromyia.color: males brilliant metallic green; females bronze-green with orange abdomen
Chloromyia.key_mark: metallic iridescent green body; wings held flat over wide abdomen

Meliscaeva.structure: slender fly, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Meliscaeva.wings: 1 pair clear membranous with spurious vein, halteres
Meliscaeva.color: black abdomen with paired yellow-white spots forming broken transverse bands
Meliscaeva.key_mark: paired yellow-white abdominal spots on black; slender waistless hoverfly

Callicera.structure: slender hoverfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, antennae longer than head+thorax
Callicera.color: metallic bronze-green to black with sparse pale facial hair
Callicera.key_mark: antennae conspicuously long and clubbed, unique in Syrphidae

Cacoxenus.structure: tiny drosophilid; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Cacoxenus.color: pale yellowish-brown body; vivid red compound eyes
Cacoxenus.key_mark: vivid red compound eyes on pale yellowish drosophilid-sized body

Cheilosia.structure: robust hoverfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Cheilosia.color: entirely dull black; body variably hairy to nearly bare
Cheilosia.key_mark: all-black hoverfly lacking any yellow abdominal banding

Chrysomya.structure: robust blowfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Chrysomya.color: bright metallic green to blue-green thorax and abdomen
Chrysomya.key_mark: vivid metallic blue-green body with large orange-red compound eyes

Eristalinus.structure: robust drone-fly hoverfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, aristate antennae
Eristalinus.color: dark abdomen with yellowish lateral spots; pale facial stripe
Eristalinus.key_mark: compound eyes boldly striped or spotted with contrasting dark bands

Dioprosopa.structure: robust hoverfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Dioprosopa.color: black abdomen with four discrete pale yellow or white spots
Dioprosopa.key_mark: four pale spots arranged in two pairs across dark abdomen

Asemosyrphus.structure: slender hoverfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, hind femora notably curved
Asemosyrphus.color: dark body with pale yellow bands or spots on abdomen
Asemosyrphus.key_mark: curved sickle-shaped hind legs; dark syrphid with pale abdominal markings

Palpada.structure: robust bee-mimic hoverfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, aristate antennae
Palpada.color: dark abdomen with yellowish bands; thorax densely pale-haired
Palpada.key_mark: thorax densely tufted with pale plush hair giving bee-like appearance

Tabanus.structure: robust biting fly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, blade-like 3-segmented antennae
Tabanus.wings: single broad membranous pair; often darkened or patterned
Tabanus.color: dull brown to grey; abdomen often with pale median stripe
Tabanus.key_mark: huge iridescent compound eyes dominating broad head; stout biting mouthparts

Australoechus.structure: compact bee-fly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, long proboscis, short antennae
Australoechus.wings: single membranous pair; often held outstretched at rest
Australoechus.color: body densely clothed in woolly white to pale buff hair
Australoechus.key_mark: entire body coated in thick woolly pale hair; long forward-projecting proboscis

Dasineura.structure: minute gall midge; 3 body sections, 6 legs, long beaded antennae
Dasineura.wings: single narrow membranous pair; very few veins
Dasineura.key_mark: tiny size; long beaded (moniliform) antennae with reduced wing venation

Exaireta.structure: flattened soldier fly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae
Exaireta.wings: single membranous pair; folded flat scissor-like over abdomen at rest
Exaireta.color: metallic blue-green to purple-blue iridescent abdomen
Exaireta.key_mark: striking metallic blue iridescence; wings folded flat over abdomen

Inopus.structure: slender soldier fly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short antennae
Inopus.wings: single membranous pair; folded flat over abdomen at rest
Inopus.color: dull dark brown-black body; head distinctly red-orange
Inopus.key_mark: bright reddish-orange head sharply contrasting dark thorax and abdomen

Psorophora.structure: large mosquito; 3 body sections, 6 long legs, long proboscis, scaled antennae
Psorophora.wings: single narrow pair; covered in dark and pale scales
Psorophora.color: dark brown-black with iridescent purple scaling; legs banded
Psorophora.key_mark: exceptionally large mosquito; legs densely fringed with shaggy dark scales

Culiseta.structure: medium mosquito; 3 body sections, 6 long legs, long proboscis, scaled antennae
Culiseta.wings: single narrow scaled pair; halteres present
Culiseta.color: pale and dark alternating bands on abdomen; legs pale-banded
Culiseta.key_mark: bold alternating pale and dark bands on both abdomen and legs

Toxorhynchites.structure: large mosquito; 3 body sections, 6 long legs, proboscis strongly recurved
Toxorhynchites.color: body with brilliant metallic blue, green, and silver scaling
Toxorhynchites.key_mark: proboscis curves sharply downward; brilliant metallic blue-purple iridescent body

Calliphora.structure: robust blowfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Calliphora.color: dull blue-grey to brownish-black body; cheeks (genae) orange-red
Calliphora.key_mark: orange-red genal patches flanking dull blue-grey face and body

Lucilia.structure: robust blowfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Lucilia.color: brilliant shiny metallic green to bronze-green thorax and abdomen
Lucilia.key_mark: intense metallic green iridescence covering entire thorax and abdomen

Cynomya.structure: robust blowfly; 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae
Cynomya.color: metallic blue-black body; face and lower frons bright yellow
Cynomya.key_mark: bright yellow face contrasting sharply with dark metallic blue-black body

Tanyptera.structure: large crane fly; 3 body sections, 6 very long fragile legs, V-shaped suture
Tanyptera.wings: single narrow pair; patterned with dark spots or bands; halteres long
Tanyptera.color: dark brown to black with orange-yellow banding on abdomen
Tanyptera.key_mark: males bear elaborately branched antler-like antennae; large crane fly

Tenodera.structure: elongate 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), long filiform antennae
Tenodera.wings: fully winged both sexes; tan-brown tegmina, hindwings clear
Tenodera.color: tan to brown overall; vivid green stripe along outer margin of each tegmen
Tenodera.key_mark: green stripe running the full length of the outer fore-wing edge on brown tegmina

Mantis.structure: 3-part body (triangular head, elongate prothorax, abdomen), 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Mantis.wings: adults typically fully winged; leathery tegmina over folded membranous hindwings
Mantis.color: cryptic green or brown; some genera mottled, banded, or leaf-patterned
Mantis.key_mark: raptorial forelegs held in raised prayer posture; freely rotating triangular head

Stagmomantis.structure: moderately elongate 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Stagmomantis.wings: males fully winged; females brachypterous with wing pads reaching ~midabdomen
Stagmomantis.color: mottled gray, olive-green, or brown with faint irregular banding
Stagmomantis.key_mark: female's stubby wing pads visibly stop well short of abdomen tip

Gonatista.structure: compact broad 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), short filiform antennae
Gonatista.wings: both sexes short-winged; wings do not extend past midabdomen
Gonatista.color: mottled gray-green and brown in irregular lichen-like blotches
Gonatista.key_mark: lichen-mimic cryptic mottling on a distinctly broad, flat body form

Thesprotia.structure: hyper-elongate 3-part body, 6 very slender legs (2 raptorial), long filiform antennae
Thesprotia.wings: reduced; narrow tegmina shorter than abdomen length
Thesprotia.color: uniform pale green or straw-yellow, unpatterned
Thesprotia.key_mark: grass-stem-thin body; prothorax barely wider than the legs flanking it

Hierodula.structure: robust 3-part body, 6 stout legs (2 heavy raptorial), filiform antennae
Hierodula.wings: fully winged both sexes; broad green or brown tegmina
Hierodula.color: uniform bright green or brown; yellow-orange patch on inner face of forefemur
Hierodula.key_mark: vivid yellow-orange spot on inner face of raptorial forefemur

Empusa.structure: slender 3-part body, 6 lobed legs (2 raptorial), bipectinate antennae in males
Empusa.wings: fully winged adults; narrow cryptically patterned tegmina
Empusa.color: cryptic green or brown with subtle abdominal banding
Empusa.key_mark: tall conical crest (vertex horn) projecting upward from top of head

Ameles.structure: small compact 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), short filiform antennae
Ameles.wings: strongly dimorphic; females nearly or fully wingless, males fully winged
Ameles.color: cryptic gray-brown or olive, finely speckled or plain
Ameles.key_mark: tiny size combined with females lacking any functional wings

Deroplatys.structure: broad flattened 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Deroplatys.wings: fully winged; wide tegmina patterned with mock leaf-vein network
Deroplatys.color: mottled dark and pale brown with dark vein-like lines across body and wings
Deroplatys.key_mark: whole flattened body mimics a dead leaf complete with fake midrib and veins

Hymenopus.structure: 3-part body, 6 legs with broad petal-like femoral lobes, filiform antennae
Hymenopus.wings: fully winged; white to pink tegmina
Hymenopus.color: white to pale pink with mauve or purple highlights on leg lobes
Hymenopus.key_mark: petal-shaped lobes on mid and hind legs creating an orchid-flower disguise

Tropidomantis.structure: slender 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Tropidomantis.wings: fully winged adults; narrow elongate tegmina
Tropidomantis.color: plain green to brown, lightly mottled or unpatterned
Tropidomantis.key_mark: relatively long slender prothorax disproportionate to modest body size

Titanodula.structure: very robust 3-part body, 6 heavy legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Titanodula.wings: fully winged both sexes; broad bright green tegmina
Titanodula.color: uniform bright green; hindwings sometimes with dark basal marking
Titanodula.key_mark: exceptionally large and thick-bodied bright-green mantis with heavy forelegs

Acromantis.structure: compact 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial with swollen coxa), short antennae
Acromantis.wings: males fully winged; females brachypterous or micropterous
Acromantis.color: green or brown; inner forefemur often bears a dark-ringed pale eyespot
Acromantis.key_mark: conspicuously inflated raptorial coxa giving a puffy 'boxing-glove' silhouette

Coptopteryx.structure: moderately slender 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Coptopteryx.wings: reduced in both sexes; short tegmina leave most of abdomen exposed
Coptopteryx.color: green to brownish-green, plain or faintly longitudinally streaked
Coptopteryx.key_mark: conspicuously abbreviated wings baring the majority of the abdomen

Stagmatoptera.structure: robust 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Stagmatoptera.wings: fully winged both sexes; broad tegmina
Stagmatoptera.color: green or brown; pale cream to white crest on vertex of head
Stagmatoptera.key_mark: white or cream crest atop the head, visible from above at a distance

Brunneria.structure: hyper-elongate 3-part body, 6 slender legs (2 raptorial), long filiform antennae
Brunneria.wings: vestigial; only tiny stub pads visible behind pronotum
Brunneria.color: uniform pale green or tan, entirely unpatterned
Brunneria.key_mark: twig-like body with vestigial wing stubs; populations commonly all-female

Choeradodis.structure: 3-part body with hugely expanded leaf-like pronotum, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Choeradodis.wings: fully winged; green wings concealed beneath leaf-like tegmina
Choeradodis.color: bright leaf-green with pale venation lines across expanded pronotum
Choeradodis.key_mark: broad oval leaf-shaped pronotum forming a flat green shield around the thorax

Sibylla.structure: slender 3-part body with serrated lateral abdominal lobes, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Sibylla.wings: fully winged; narrow cryptically patterned tegmina
Sibylla.color: mottled bark-brown and gray-green with irregular banding
Sibylla.key_mark: ragged serrated lobes along abdomen sides creating a broken bark-like outline

Omomantis.structure: moderately slender 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Omomantis.wings: fully winged both sexes; tegmina with bold transverse banding
Omomantis.color: alternating black and cream-white transverse bands across body and wings
Omomantis.key_mark: bold black-and-white zebra-stripe banding covering entire dorsal surface

Dystacta.structure: flattened 3-part body, 6 legs (2 raptorial), filiform antennae
Dystacta.wings: fully winged; brown tegmina with darker pseudo-vein streaking
Dystacta.color: mottled russet-brown with irregular dark streaks and pale patches
Dystacta.key_mark: flat body with dead-leaf brown mottling and dark longitudinal pseudo-vein streaks

Galinthias.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, long filiform antennae
Galinthias.wings: full tegmina and membranous hindwings in adults
Galinthias.color: cryptic green or brown with mottled patterning
Galinthias.key_mark: conical tubular compound eyes producing distinctive cone-eye head silhouette

Pseudocreobotra.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, medium antennae
Pseudocreobotra.wings: white-green tegmina bearing bold spiral eyespot; hindwings present
Pseudocreobotra.color: white and pale green with pink-orange tinting; dark spiral on forewing
Pseudocreobotra.key_mark: bold purple-black spiral eyespot on forewing visible at rest

Phyllocrania.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, filiform antennae
Phyllocrania.wings: leaf-textured and veined tegmina; hindwings present
Phyllocrania.color: polymorphic brown to dark grey mimicking a withered dead leaf
Phyllocrania.key_mark: elaborate multi-lobed leaf-like crest projecting from vertex of head

Sphodromantis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with stout raptorial forelegs, long antennae
Sphodromantis.wings: full-length green or brown tegmina; hindwings present
Sphodromantis.color: uniform bright green; brown morphs occur
Sphodromantis.key_mark: black-ringed white spot on inner coxa of raptorial foreleg

Popa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 long slender legs with raptorial forelegs, antennae
Popa.wings: narrow bark-patterned tegmina flush with elongated body
Popa.color: bark brown to grey with irregular mottling
Popa.key_mark: extremely slender elongated body and limbs; near-perfect twig mimic

Miomantis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, medium antennae
Miomantis.wings: full wings in males; females often short-winged (brachypterous)
