Miomantis.key_mark: strong sexual size dimorphism; females notably larger with reduced wings

Orthodera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, filiform antennae
Orthodera.key_mark: vivid blue-purple patch on inner face of raptorial foreleg coxa

Kongobatha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, filiform antennae
Kongobatha.key_mark: slender elongated body associated with snake-like defensive posturing

Pseudomantis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs with raptorial forelegs, medium antennae
Pseudomantis.wings: full tegmina in both sexes; hindwings present
Pseudomantis.key_mark: pale white fringe along outer wing margin (albofimbriata = white-fringed)

Idolomantis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 heavily lobed legs with raptorial forelegs, long antennae
Idolomantis.wings: large wings; inner surface vivid red, white, black, and violet
Idolomantis.color: cryptic green-brown at rest; inner wings expose brilliant multicolor pattern
Idolomantis.key_mark: leaf-like lobes on all leg segments and abdomen; spectacular deimatic display

Labidura.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium segmented antennae, terminal forceps
Labidura.wings: short oval chestnut tegmina; fan-folded hindwings beneath
Labidura.key_mark: large size for an earwig; male forceps strongly curved and asymmetric

Earwig.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, beaded antennae, paired cerci modified as forceps
Earwig.wings: very short leathery tegmina or absent; hindwings fan-folded when present
Earwig.color: brown to reddish-brown; varies by species
Earwig.key_mark: prominent pincer-like forceps projecting from abdomen tip

Forficula.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, beaded antennae, terminal forceps
Forficula.wings: short chestnut-brown tegmina concealing fan-folded hindwings
Forficula.color: reddish-brown body; paler yellowish legs and antennal segments
Forficula.key_mark: male forceps strongly curved and asymmetric; female forceps nearly straight

Anisolabis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae, terminal forceps
Anisolabis.wings: none; fully apterous with no tegmina
Anisolabis.key_mark: completely wingless earwig; no trace of tegmina or wing pads

Apterygida.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, beaded antennae, terminal forceps
Apterygida.wings: very short tegmina barely covering base of abdomen; hindwings absent
Apterygida.key_mark: tegmina notably shorter than Forficula, exposing most of abdomen

Doru.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, segmented antennae, terminal forceps
Doru.color: brown with pale cream longitudinal stripes along abdomen
Doru.key_mark: pale longitudinal stripes running the length of abdomen

Euborellia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, medium antennae, terminal forceps
Euborellia.color: dark brown to black; legs alternately pale and dark banded
Euborellia.key_mark: alternating pale and dark ring-bands on legs; completely wingless

Periplaneta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 spiny legs, very long filiform antennae, flat oval body
Periplaneta.wings: full-length reddish-brown tegmina; both sexes fully winged
Periplaneta.color: reddish mahogany-brown; pale yellow border on pronotum
Periplaneta.key_mark: large reddish-brown body with pale yellow figure-8 border on pronotum

Cockroach.structure: 3 body sections, 6 spiny legs, very long filiform antennae, flattened oval body
Cockroach.wings: leathery tegmina overlapping abdomen or absent; hindwings membranous
Cockroach.key_mark: head concealed beneath large flattened pronotum; whip-like antennae

Therea.structure: 3 body sections, 6 spiny legs, long filiform antennae, oval body
Therea.wings: full-length black tegmina with white spots
Therea.color: jet black with 7 bold white spots across dorsum
Therea.key_mark: striking black-and-white polka-dot domino pattern; unmistakable

Blattella.structure: 3 body sections, 6 spiny legs, long filiform antennae
Blattella.wings: 2 pairs tegmina, fully winged but rarely flies
Blattella.color: tan to light brown; pronotum with 2 dark parallel stripes
Blattella.key_mark: twin dark pronotal stripes on pale tan background

Pycnoscelus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 spiny legs, long filiform antennae
Pycnoscelus.color: shiny dark brown to black with pale-edged tegmina
Pycnoscelus.key_mark: glossy dark body with pale tegminal margins; burrowing habit

Gyna.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae
Gyna.color: white to cream or pale grey with porcelain-like sheen

Hodotermes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short beaded antennae; caste polymorphism
Hodotermes.key_mark: diurnal grass-harvesting workers with functional compound eyes

Termite.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short beaded antennae; soft-bodied castes
Termite.wings: alates 2 equal pairs shed post-flight; workers/soldiers wingless
Termite.color: workers pale whitish; alates tan to dark brown
Termite.key_mark: equal-length paired wings in alates; straight bead-like antennae

Drymaplaneta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 robust legs, long filiform antennae
Drymaplaneta.wings: females wingless; males with short reduced tegmina
Drymaplaneta.key_mark: large reddish-brown flightless Australian native cockroach

Ectobius.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae
Ectobius.wings: fully winged both sexes; tegmina reach abdomen tip
Ectobius.color: pale tawny brown with pale translucent pronotal margins
Ectobius.key_mark: small pale outdoor leaf-litter roach with pale-edged pronotum

Aptera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 robust legs, long filiform antennae
Aptera.color: jet black, heavily sclerotized and shiny
Aptera.key_mark: very large jet-black wingless cockroach from S. African mountains

Kalotermes.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short beaded antennae; caste polymorphism
Kalotermes.color: pale body; alates with yellow-orange pronotum
Kalotermes.key_mark: bright yellow-orange pronotum on reproductive alates

Supella.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae
Supella.wings: males fully winged; females with shorter wing pads
Supella.color: brown with 2 pale yellow transverse bands across abdomen and wing bases
Supella.key_mark: 2 pale transverse abdominal bands; no pronotal stripes

Hadrurus.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + curved metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Hadrurus.color: pale yellow to tan with darker brown dorsal mottling
Hadrurus.key_mark: largest N. American scorpion; dense long sensory hairs on body and legs

Scorpion.structure: cephalothorax + 12-seg abdomen + telson/stinger, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Scorpion.color: tan to dark brown; all species fluoresce blue-green under UV
Scorpion.key_mark: curved venomous tail stinger + UV fluorescence diagnostic for entire order

Paruroctonus.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + curved metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Paruroctonus.color: pale tan to yellowish with fine dark dorsal mottling
Paruroctonus.key_mark: pale granular vaejovid; rounded metasomal segments; W. North American deserts

Centruroides.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + slender metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Centruroides.color: yellow to tan, typically with 2 dark longitudinal dorsal stripes
Centruroides.key_mark: 2 dark dorsal stripes + needle-thin telson; bark-climbing habit

Maaykuyak.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + curved metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Maaykuyak.key_mark: small nondescript vaejovid; restricted to Trans-Pecos Texas desert

Anuroctonus.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + robust metasoma, 8 legs, massive chelate pedipalps
Anuroctonus.key_mark: grossly swollen telson vesicle ('swollenstinger'); massive pedipalp chelae

Serradigitus.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Serradigitus.color: pale yellowish to tan with faint mottling
Serradigitus.key_mark: serrated saw-like inner margins on pedipalp fingers; small pale vaejovid

Vaejovis.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + curved metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Vaejovis.color: dark brown to reddish-brown body with contrasting pale yellow legs
Vaejovis.key_mark: dark body with pale/yellow appendages; under rocks in E. and SW United States

Buthus.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + slender metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Buthus.color: uniform bright yellow to yellowish-brown throughout
Buthus.key_mark: uniform vivid yellow + triangular sternum (Buthidae key); N. Africa/S. Europe

Aegaeobuthus.structure: cephalothorax + segmented abdomen + slender metasoma, 8 legs, chelate pedipalps
Aegaeobuthus.color: pale yellow ground with dark brown checkered dorsal pattern
Aegaeobuthus.key_mark: bold dark checkered pattern on pale yellow; Aegean islands/E. Mediterranean

Iurus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, robust chelae, segmented metasoma + stinger, no antennae
Iurus.key_mark: large robust chelae; among largest scorpions of Mediterranean/Middle East

Odontobuthus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, slender chelae, thick metasoma, no antennae
Odontobuthus.key_mark: serrated pedipalp finger margins; all-yellow buthid of Iran/Middle East

Androctonus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, narrow chelae, massively thick metasoma, no antennae
Androctonus.color: dark brown to black; some species uniformly yellowish
Androctonus.key_mark: tail segments nearly as wide as deep; contrasts with thread-thin chelae

Hottentotta.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, moderate chelae, keeled opisthosoma, no antennae
Hottentotta.color: yellowish-brown body with dark brown to black tail tip
Hottentotta.key_mark: sharply ridged (alligator-back) opisthosoma segments; black telson tip

Gigantometrus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, very large robust chelae, thick metasoma, no antennae
Gigantometrus.key_mark: one of world's largest scorpions by mass; enormous robust chelae

Uroplectes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, slender chelae, elongate metasoma, no antennae
Uroplectes.color: yellow, olivaceous, or black; legs often paler than body
Uroplectes.key_mark: disproportionately elongate metasoma relative to body; small African buthid

Opisthacanthus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, massive robust chelae, stout build, no antennae
Opisthacanthus.key_mark: disproportionately massive chelae dominate body profile; hormurid

Parabuthus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, narrow chelae, barrel-thick metasoma, no antennae
Parabuthus.color: dark brown to black; some species with pale yellow contrast areas
Parabuthus.key_mark: barrel-thick metasoma vs. extremely slender chelae; venom can be squirted

Opistophthalmus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, large fossorial chelae, no antennae
Opistophthalmus.key_mark: large robust digging chelae; southern African burrower in scorpionid family

Hadogenes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, strongly flattened body, wide chelae, no antennae
Hadogenes.key_mark: extreme dorsoventral flattening; body slips into narrow rock crevices

Tityus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, slender chelae, sub-aculear telson tooth, no antennae
Tityus.color: yellowish to reddish-brown, often with dark dorsal stripe
Tityus.key_mark: sub-aculear tooth (spine below stinger tip); dominant New World buthid genus

Cercophonius.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, moderate chelae, bothriurid plan, no antennae
Cercophonius.key_mark: small size; SE Australian endemic found under bark and logs in forest

Urodacus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, robust chelae, broad prosoma, no antennae
Urodacus.key_mark: very dark coloration; robust Australian scorpion under rocks in dry scrub

Uroctonus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, moderate chelae, vaejovid plan, no antennae
Uroctonus.key_mark: dark vaejovid found under bark and logs in Pacific coast conifer forests

Pseudouroctonus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, slender chelae, elongate legs, no antennae
Pseudouroctonus.key_mark: pale coloration and elongate appendages; cave/subsurface-adapted vaejovid

Tetratrichobothrius.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, moderate chelae, euscorpiid plan, no antennae
Tetratrichobothrius.color: jet-black body with yellow-brown metasoma and legs
Tetratrichobothrius.key_mark: black body sharply contrasting with pale yellow-brown tail and legs

Amblyomma.structure: 2 body regions, 8 legs (adult), long hypostome mouthparts, scutum, no antennae
Amblyomma.size: 2-6 mm unfed, up to 15 mm engorged
Amblyomma.color: reddish-brown with enameled white/silver ornate scutum pattern
Amblyomma.key_mark: ornate enameled scutum; notably long piercing mouthparts (hypostome)

Tick.structure: 2 body regions (capitulum + idiosoma), 8 legs (adult), no antennae
Tick.color: tan to dark brown; some with white-patterned dorsal scutum
Tick.key_mark: hard dorsal scutum (Ixodidae); swells dramatically with blood meal

Dermacentor.structure: 2 body regions, 8 legs (adult), short broad mouthparts, scutum, no antennae
Dermacentor.size: 3-6 mm unfed, up to 12 mm engorged
Dermacentor.color: reddish-brown with bold white/cream ornate scutum pattern
Dermacentor.key_mark: bold white ornate scutum pattern; short broad mouthparts

Ixodes.structure: 2 body regions, 8 legs (adult), very long mouthparts, no eyes, no antennae
Ixodes.size: 1-3 mm unfed, up to 11 mm engorged
Ixodes.color: reddish-brown body, dark legs; plain unmarked scutum
Ixodes.key_mark: plain inornate scutum; no eyes; very long mouthparts; tiny when unfed

Cercidia.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, round bulbous abdomen
Cercidia.color: reddish-brown to carmine abdomen with pale spots or markings
Cercidia.key_mark: distinctly reddish-carmine rounded abdomen on a small orb weaver

Orb Weaver Spider.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, bulbous abdomen
Orb Weaver Spider.color: highly variable; brown, yellow, orange, banded or spotted
Orb Weaver Spider.key_mark: circular geometric orb web; round abdomen, rests at hub

Argiope.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae, elongate abdomen
Argiope.color: silver-white or bright yellow and black banded abdomen
Argiope.key_mark: bold silver or yellow-and-black banding; zigzag stabilimentum in web

Micrathena.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; abdomen with hard bony spines
Micrathena.color: white, black, and yellow in contrasting pattern
Micrathena.key_mark: rigid pointed spines or tubercles projecting from hard abdomen

Gasteracantha.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; abdomen wide, hard, spine-edged
Gasteracantha.color: bright white, yellow, or red with bold black spots
Gasteracantha.key_mark: hard crab-shaped abdomen with 6 prominent pointed lateral spines

Brachypelma.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae, urticating abdominal hairs
Brachypelma.size: 55-65 mm body; leg span to 150 mm
Brachypelma.color: jet-black body with vivid orange-red leg joints and femora
Brachypelma.key_mark: striking orange-red leg banding contrasting against jet-black body

Tarantula.structure: 2 body sections, 8 thick legs, no antennae, densely hairy all over
Tarantula.color: earth tones—brown, tan, black; some with bright accent markings
Tarantula.key_mark: massive hairy build with thick legs; largest spiders by mass

Aphonopelma.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout hairy legs, no antennae
Aphonopelma.color: uniformly drab brown to dark brown; minimal patterning
Aphonopelma.key_mark: plain brown heavy-bodied tarantula with no bright accent markings

Trichonephila.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs with bristle tufts, no antennae
Trichonephila.color: silver and yellow-banded elongate abdomen; yellow leg segments
Trichonephila.key_mark: large golden-silk orb web; long silver-and-yellow banded abdomen

Latrodectus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 slender legs, no antennae, glossy round abdomen
Latrodectus.color: shiny black or brown; red/orange hourglass on ventral abdomen
Latrodectus.key_mark: red hourglass or spots on underside of shiny globose abdomen

Spider.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, spinnerets at abdomen tip
Spider.key_mark: 8 legs + 2 body sections distinguishes from all insects

Misumena.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs with front 2 pairs splayed sideways, no antennae
Misumena.color: white to bright yellow; female may show pink-red lateral stripes
Misumena.key_mark: crab-like splayed-leg stance; white or yellow body matches flower

Pseudeuophrys.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, compact with large anterior eyes
Pseudeuophrys.color: gray-brown with pale mottled or speckled pattern
Pseudeuophrys.key_mark: tiny compact jumping spider; 2 prominently large anterior median eyes

Jumping Spider.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, compact with 2 huge forward eyes
Jumping Spider.color: variable; many show iridescent chelicerae or bold patterning
Jumping Spider.key_mark: two enormously enlarged forward-facing eyes; jerky stalking movement

Salticus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, compact build with large eyes
Salticus.color: black and white striped bands across cephalothorax and abdomen
Salticus.key_mark: bold zebra-stripe black-and-white pattern; flat face with large eyes

Steatoda.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, smooth rounded abdomen
Steatoda.color: dark brown to purplish-black; pale cream band at anterior abdomen
Steatoda.key_mark: shiny dark globose abdomen resembling widow but lacking red hourglass

Platycryptus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, distinctly flattened compact body
Platycryptus.color: tan-gray with mottled brown-white cryptic pattern; pale median stripe
Platycryptus.key_mark: flat bark-patterned tan body; prominent forward-facing eyes

Loxosceles.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, flat slender build
Loxosceles.color: uniform pale to medium brown; darker fiddle mark on cephalothorax
Loxosceles.key_mark: dark violin/fiddle mark on cephalothorax; 6 eyes arranged in 3 dyads

Phidippus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, robust build with large eyes
Phidippus.color: black with white spots or bands; iridescent green chelicerae
Phidippus.key_mark: iridescent metallic green chelicerae on black-and-white body

Psalmopoeus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae, slender arboreal build
Psalmopoeus.color: olive-brown to tan with darker chevron or stripe pattern on abdomen
Psalmopoeus.key_mark: slender tarantula without urticating hairs; chevron-banded abdomen

Maratus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact build, 8 anterior eyes in rows
Maratus.color: males with iridescent abdominal flap scales; females cryptic gray-brown
Maratus.key_mark: males raise iridescent fan-like abdominal flap during courtship display

Epicadus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, first 2 pairs elongated and held laterally
Epicadus.color: white to cream body with yellowish or pinkish tints
Epicadus.key_mark: abdomen bears prominent lateral spines or tubercles giving jagged outline

Paraphidippus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, stout compact build, 8 eyes in 3 rows
Paraphidippus.color: brown-black base with pale scale patches; iridescent green chelicerae
Paraphidippus.key_mark: brilliant iridescent green chelicerae contrasting with dark body

Synema.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, first 2 pairs held laterally crab-like
Synema.color: yellow or white abdomen with bold black pattern on dorsum
Synema.key_mark: black dorsal silhouette on pale abdomen resembles Napoleon bicorne hat

Cyrtophora.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, elongated angular abdomen with humps
Cyrtophora.color: silver-white with dark longitudinal stripes and angular markings
Cyrtophora.key_mark: builds horizontal tent-web dome, not flat orb; angular humped abdomen

Nhandu.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, large robust body with stout chelicerae
Nhandu.color: tawny golden-blonde overall; legs banded darker brown
Nhandu.key_mark: large size with dense pale golden urticating hairs covering abdomen

Dolomedes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, flattened elongated build for surface hunting
Dolomedes.color: brown-gray with continuous pale cream stripe along each body side
Dolomedes.key_mark: bold pale lateral stripe running unbroken from eyes to abdomen tip

Araneus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, large globose abdomen
Araneus.color: variable brown to orange; type species has white cross of spots on abdomen
Araneus.key_mark: white cross-shaped spot pattern on rounded abdomen in classic species

Leucauge.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, elongated abdomen, long chelicerae
Leucauge.color: iridescent silver-white abdomen with green, yellow, or orange lateral marks
Leucauge.key_mark: iridescent silver-green elongated abdomen hung in horizontal orb web

Neoscona.color: brown-tan with pale dorsal stripe and foliate leaf-like abdominal pattern
Neoscona.key_mark: leaf-like foliate pattern on abdomen dorsum; nocturnal orb-web builder

Pisaura.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, slender elongated body with long legs
Pisaura.color: brown with narrow pale buff median stripe down cephalothorax and abdomen
Pisaura.key_mark: female carries silk-wrapped egg sac held beneath chelicerae when foraging

Helpis.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact jumping spider build
Helpis.color: metallic bronze-brown iridescent scaling; males with darker iridescent sheen
Helpis.key_mark: all-over metallic bronze iridescent sheen on cephalothorax and abdomen

Ebrechtella.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, first 2 pairs held laterally
Ebrechtella.color: pale white to cream with angular dark lateral marks on abdomen
Ebrechtella.key_mark: sharply triangular abdomen outline with pale whitish ground color

Misumenoides.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, first 2 pairs elongated and crab-like
Misumenoides.color: white to pale yellow; females sometimes yellow-green matching flower petals
Misumenoides.key_mark: white stripe across clypeus below second eye row; unique among flower crab spiders

Nigma.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, small cribellate spider with fine comb setae
Nigma.color: vivid leaf-green abdomen; carapace often reddish-brown
Nigma.key_mark: bright green abdomen with reddish carapace; flat cribellate sheet web on leaves

Nephilingis.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, elongated abdomen with tufted legs
Nephilingis.color: dark abdomen with yellow-orange spots; sternum vivid red-orange
Nephilingis.key_mark: strikingly red-orange sternum visible on underside

Verrucosa.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, sharply triangular posterior abdomen
Verrucosa.color: white or cream abdomen with red and black dorsal arrowhead markings
Verrucosa.key_mark: abdomen tapers to a sharp posterior point forming a distinct arrowhead shape

Holocnemus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 extremely long spindly legs, small globose body
Holocnemus.color: pale tan to gray with marbled dark mottling on abdomen
Holocnemus.key_mark: marbled dark-on-pale abdominal pattern distinguishes it from plain pholcids

Mopsus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, robust compact build, large anterior eyes
Mopsus.color: male vivid all-green with white facial fringe; female brown-green
Mopsus.key_mark: brilliant all-green body; male has white fringe of hairs bordering face

Cyrtopholis.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, large robust body with stout chelicerae
Cyrtopholis.color: uniform dark brown to chestnut; dense hairy covering throughout
Cyrtopholis.key_mark: uniformly dark brown hairy New World tarantula with urticating hair patch on abdomen

Heteropoda.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs held laterally crab-like, no antennae
Heteropoda.color: mottled tan to brown; faint darker banding on legs
Heteropoda.key_mark: crab-like lateral leg posture; body strongly flattened dorso-ventrally

Habronattus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact build, no antennae
Habronattus.color: males with iridescent face scales and colored leg tufts; females cryptic brown
Habronattus.key_mark: males bear elaborate iridescent facial and leg display ornaments

Evarcha.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid form, no antennae
Evarcha.color: brown to reddish; males of some species with vivid red abdomen
Evarcha.key_mark: large anterior eyes; males of some species with bright reddish abdomen

Avicularia.structure: 2 body sections, 8 robust hairy legs, no antennae; large tarantula
Avicularia.color: dark gray to black velvety body; tarsi distinctly pink
Avicularia.key_mark: pink toe tips contrasting dark velvety body

Hogna.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long robust legs, no antennae
Hogna.color: brown with pale radiating carapace stripes; pale abdominal median stripe
Hogna.key_mark: radiating pale carapace stripes; large reflective posterior eye row

Zoropsis.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; cribellate silk glands present
Zoropsis.color: yellowish-brown carapace; abdomen with dark herringbone chevron pattern
Zoropsis.key_mark: bold herringbone chevrons on abdomen; wolf-spider silhouette

Stegodyphus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, round plump abdomen, no antennae
Stegodyphus.color: gray-brown with pale dorsal abdominal markings; velvety surface
Stegodyphus.key_mark: large communal dense sheet-web colonies; velvety gray body

Peucetia.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long spiny legs, slender build, no antennae
Peucetia.color: vivid bright green; abdomen with small red or white spots
Peucetia.key_mark: brilliant green with prominent leg spines; no web, active hunter

Oxytate.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs with front pair extended forward, no antennae
Oxytate.key_mark: slender elongated green body unlike typical compact crab spiders

Philaeus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid build, no antennae
Philaeus.color: male: black cephalothorax, vivid red-orange abdomen; female: cryptic brown
Philaeus.key_mark: male's brilliant red-orange abdomen sharply contrasting black cephalothorax

Nephila.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae; female abdomen elongated
Nephila.key_mark: large golden-silk orb web; female's long yellow-and-black cylindrical abdomen

Trachyzelotes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, flattened ground-spider build, no antennae
Trachyzelotes.color: dark gray to black body; legs distinctly pale yellowish
Trachyzelotes.key_mark: pale yellow legs contrasting uniformly dark body

Thorelliola.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid form, no antennae
Thorelliola.color: dark brown to black with pale or iridescent facial markings
Thorelliola.key_mark: large forward-facing principal eyes; dark compact salticid body

Abdomegaphobema.structure: 2 body sections, 8 robust hairy legs, no antennae; large theraphosid
Abdomegaphobema.color: dark brown to black body; femora distinctly reddish-orange
Abdomegaphobema.key_mark: reddish-orange femoral segments contrasting dark brown body

Lyssomanes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 slender legs, no antennae; unusually slender for Salticidae
Lyssomanes.key_mark: translucent green body with disproportionately large forward-facing eyes

Agalenatea.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; globose abdomen
Agalenatea.color: yellowish to reddish-brown; dark folium outline on pale abdomen
Agalenatea.key_mark: small orb-weaver with dark-edged folium pattern on pale abdomen

Plexippus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid build, no antennae
Plexippus.color: males dark brown-black with bold white median abdominal stripe
Plexippus.key_mark: bold white central stripe running full length of dark abdomen

Dolichothele.structure: 2 body sections, 8 hairy legs, no antennae; small theraphosid build
Dolichothele.color: pale yellowish-tan to olive; uniform without bold contrast
Dolichothele.key_mark: unusually small size for a theraphosid; pale tan/olive coloration

Isoxya.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; abdomen with lateral tubercles
Isoxya.color: yellow and black; abdomen yellow with black dorsal markings
Isoxya.key_mark: angular abdomen with pointed lateral humps; yellow-and-black coloration

Desis.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; compact robust build
Desis.key_mark: intertidal specialist; sealed silk retreat under barnacles survives submersion

Scytodes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, 6 eyes in 3 dyads, strongly domed carapace
Scytodes.color: pale yellow-tan with dark brown spots and blotches
Scytodes.key_mark: highly arched carapace, dome peak above mid-body, unlike any other spider

Talavera.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid build, large AME
Talavera.color: gray-brown with pale facial and abdominal markings
Talavera.key_mark: minute even for a jumping spider; barely visible to naked eye

Mangora.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, elongated oval abdomen, orb-weaver
Mangora.color: pale yellow-green with dark lateral stripes on abdomen
Mangora.key_mark: elongated pale abdomen with bold dark stripes sitting hub of orb web

Pholcus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 extremely long thin legs, cylindrical abdomen
Pholcus.size: 6–10 mm body; leg span up to 70 mm
Pholcus.color: pale gray to tan, semi-translucent with faint gray abdominal mark
Pholcus.key_mark: tiny cylindrical body utterly dwarfed by ultra-long spindly legs

Trapezocephalus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, wide trapezoidal salticid cephalothorax
Trapezocephalus.color: dark brown to black with pale lateral or facial markings
Trapezocephalus.key_mark: broad trapezoidal head profile with large forward-facing eye block

Menemerus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, dorsoventrally flattened salticid
Menemerus.color: mottled gray-brown with two pale dorsal stripes on abdomen
Menemerus.key_mark: flat cryptic gray body pressed flush to vertical wall or bark

Ctenus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long robust legs, eyes in 2 rows of 4
Ctenus.color: brown with pale median stripe and dark lateral bands on cephalothorax
Ctenus.key_mark: stout ground-runner with evenly sized 4+4 eye rows and heavy leg spines

Aculepeira.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, large globose abdomen, orb-weaver
Aculepeira.color: brown with pale leaf-shaped folium on dark abdomen dorsum
Aculepeira.key_mark: conspicuous oak-leaf folium pattern dominating abdomen dorsum

Phrixotrichus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs plus pedipalps, robust theraphosid with urticating setae
Phrixotrichus.color: tan to brown with subtle darker ocelot-like spotting on abdomen
Phrixotrichus.key_mark: large velvety Chilean tarantula with faint spotted pattern on pale ground

Tutelina.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid, chelicerae enlarged in males
Tutelina.color: male: iridescent blue-green chelicerae; female: dull brown
Tutelina.key_mark: males flash brilliant iridescent chelicerae in courtship display

Grammostola.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs plus pedipalps, large robust theraphosid
Grammostola.color: dark brown to gray base with dense contrasting pale golden or pinkish setae
Grammostola.key_mark: slow-moving large tarantula with striking pale setae contrasting dark legs

Bijoaraneus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, rounded globose abdomen, orb-weaver
Bijoaraneus.color: cream to pale yellow abdomen with dark kidney-shaped central mark
Bijoaraneus.key_mark: pale abdomen bearing distinct dark kidney-bean blotch on dorsum

Pachistopelma.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs plus pedipalps, compact arboreal theraphosid
Pachistopelma.color: black cephalothorax contrasting sharply with rufous-brown abdomen
Pachistopelma.key_mark: strongly bicolored: jet-black carapace vs. reddish-brown abdomen

Rabidosa.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, elongate lycosid, 4-2-2 eye rows
Rabidosa.color: brown with two bold pale longitudinal stripes on cephalothorax
Rabidosa.key_mark: paired pale racing stripes running full length of carapace

Nesticodes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, globose abdomen, cobweb weaver
Nesticodes.color: uniform deep red to maroon overall
Nesticodes.key_mark: uniformly red-maroon rounded body; looks like a red bead suspended in web

Eris.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, compact salticid, large AME
Eris.color: bronze-brown with iridescent scales and white supraocular stripe
Eris.key_mark: coppery-bronze iridescent sheen with white stripe above eye row

Cyrba.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, elongated narrow cephalothorax, Spartaeinae
Cyrba.color: gray-brown with pale and dark banding on abdomen
Cyrba.key_mark: elongated cephalothorax and low flat stalking posture distinguish from typical salticids

Parasteatoda.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, globose abdomen, comb-footed cobweb weaver
Parasteatoda.color: brown to tan with mottled pale spots and patches on abdomen
Parasteatoda.key_mark: irregular tangled cobweb in corners with mottled tan globose abdomen

Badumna.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, robust build, sheet web with silk-tube retreat
Badumna.color: dark gray-brown with pale chevron herringbone pattern on abdomen
Badumna.key_mark: pale herringbone chevrons on dark abdomen; funnel retreat at web edge

Caerostris.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, strongly tuberculate lumpy abdomen, orb-weaver
Caerostris.color: cryptic bark-gray to brown with irregular pale and dark mottling
Caerostris.key_mark: knobby tuberculate abdomen with bark-perfect cryptic camouflage

Pisaurina.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; elongated, legs held flat
Pisaurina.color: mottled brown with pale cream dorsal stripe down abdomen
Pisaurina.key_mark: carries egg sac held beneath body in chelicerae until hatching

Chaetopelma.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae; mygalomorph, parallel downward fangs
Chaetopelma.color: uniformly dark brown to black with dense dark velvety setae
Chaetopelma.key_mark: all-black Old World mygalomorph; no urticating hairs

Eratigena.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae; flattened, fast-running build
Eratigena.color: brown with pale herringbone chevron pattern down dorsal abdomen
Eratigena.key_mark: herringbone zigzag stripe on abdomen; builds flat funnel sheet web

Zygiella.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; plump rounded abdomen
Zygiella.color: gray-silver with dark leaf-shaped folium; pale lateral flanks
Zygiella.key_mark: orb web with one missing sector; silvery abdomen sides

Arkys.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; stubby triangular abdomen with tubercles
Arkys.color: white, cream, and brown mottled; cryptic bird-dropping pattern
Arkys.key_mark: bird-dropping mimicry coloration on warty triangular abdomen

Lasiodora.structure: 2 body sections, 8 very stout legs, no antennae; massive mygalomorph
Lasiodora.color: dark brown to black with reddish-brown setae on legs and abdomen
Lasiodora.key_mark: among the largest tarantulas; bald urticating hair patch on abdomen

Portia.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae; slender with ragged tufted body
Portia.color: mottled brown with white and dark tufts giving debris-like texture
Portia.key_mark: ragged tufts mimicking dead plant litter; large forward-facing salticid eyes

Caribena.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; arboreal mygalomorph, moderate build
Caribena.color: dark charcoal-brown body with pink to coral tarsal tips on all legs
Caribena.key_mark: pink or coral toe tips contrasting sharply with dark body

Alopecosa.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; robust wolf spider build
Alopecosa.color: brown with pale median longitudinal stripe and banded abdomen
Alopecosa.key_mark: pale dorsal stripe on cephalothorax; wolf spider 4-large-eye posterior row

Phoneutria.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae; large robust with prominent pedipalps
Phoneutria.color: gray-brown with black-spotted ventral abdomen; pale median stripe
Phoneutria.key_mark: threat display rearing high on hind legs with forelegs raised

Eriophora.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; globose abdomen
Eriophora.color: tan to brown with dark leaf-shaped folium and pale border on abdomen
Eriophora.key_mark: large nocturnal orb weaver; prominent dark folium edged with pale spots

Argyrodes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; tiny with conical elongated abdomen
Argyrodes.color: abdomen mirror-silver to white; cephalothorax and legs yellowish
Argyrodes.key_mark: tiny kleptoparasite with highly reflective silver globose abdomen

Amazonius.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; arboreal mygalomorph, moderate build
Amazonius.color: orange to orange-brown overall with darker abdominal patterning
Amazonius.key_mark: bright uniform orange coloration across body and legs

Camaricus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; crab spider with splayed forelegs
Camaricus.color: brown to cream with variable dark markings; camouflage-patterned
Camaricus.key_mark: laterally splayed raptorial forelegs held open; sideways crab-like stance

Trite.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; compact salticid, boxy cephalothorax
Trite.color: jet-black cephalothorax; gray-brown abdomen with pale transverse bands
Trite.key_mark: jet-black head with large anterior eyes contrasting pale-banded abdomen

Dysdera.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, 6 eyes, no antennae; massive projecting chelicerae
Dysdera.color: reddish-orange cephalothorax and legs; pale cream to gray abdomen
Dysdera.key_mark: bicolor red-orange front half + cream abdomen; disproportionately huge chelicerae

Hyptiotes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; compact lumpy angular abdomen
Hyptiotes.key_mark: holds only a triangular sector of orb web; jerks silk rhythmically to snare prey

Attulus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; tiny compact salticid
Attulus.color: pale gray-brown with white setae patches; iridescent chelicerae
Attulus.key_mark: tiny salticid with iridescent blue-green chelicerae; bold AME eye pair

Tylorida.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long legs, no antennae; hugely swollen abdomen
Tylorida.color: abdomen silvery-white to pale yellow-green; legs banded dark and pale
Tylorida.key_mark: massively inflated silver-white abdomen dwarfing cephalothorax

Herpyllus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; flattened fast-running ground spider
Herpyllus.color: dark gray to black with white ruffled zigzag midline stripe on abdomen
Herpyllus.key_mark: white ruffled midline stripe on black abdomen resembling parson's cravat

Leviana.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; globose orb-weaver abdomen
Leviana.color: abdomen sharply bicolored, anterior half dark, posterior half pale
Leviana.key_mark: abdomen split into two contrasting halves of near-equal size

Anasaitis.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; large anterior eye row
Anasaitis.color: dark body with paired white flaglike spots on dorsal abdomen
Anasaitis.key_mark: twin white flag-marks on dark abdomen; prominent salticid eyes

Pelegrina.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; compact salticid build
Pelegrina.color: pale ground densely speckled with dark brown; females more heavily peppered
Pelegrina.key_mark: salt-and-pepper dorsal speckling unlike most other jumping spiders

Thomisus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; laterally flattened crab posture
Thomisus.color: white, yellow, or brown matching flower; T. scrupeus dull brownish
Thomisus.key_mark: raptorial front leg pairs held wide open in crab-spider ambush stance

Poecilotheria.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae; arboreal mygalomorph
Poecilotheria.size: body 55-80 mm; leg span to ~200 mm
Poecilotheria.color: grey-black carapace with bold geometric yellow or cream ventral and dorsal markings
Poecilotheria.key_mark: intricate geometric yellow-and-black pattern; Asian arboreal tarantula

Zealaranea.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; rounded orb-weaver abdomen
Zealaranea.color: dark brown abdomen crossed by a broad white transverse band
Zealaranea.key_mark: bold white band bisecting dark abdomen; NZ endemic orbweaver

Uloborus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; cribellate silk apparatus
Uloborus.color: cryptic grey-brown with banded legs bearing feathery hair tufts
Uloborus.key_mark: feathery foreleg tufts; sole orbweaver family lacking functional venom glands

Austracantha.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; abdomen with 6 rigid lateral spines
Austracantha.color: white or yellow abdomen with black markings and red- or orange-tipped spines
Austracantha.key_mark: 6 prominent hard spines ringing the abdomen margin

Sphodros.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; mygalomorph, purseweb builder
Sphodros.color: jet-black body; legs bright red-orange in males
Sphodros.key_mark: red-orange legs on all-black mygalomorph; silk tube flush against tree bark

Harpactira.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae; terrestrial baboon spider
Harpactira.color: vivid golden-yellow carapace and abdomen; iridescent metallic blue legs
Harpactira.key_mark: metallic blue legs contrasting with bright golden-yellow body

Theraphosa.structure: 2 body sections, 8 massive legs, no antennae; world's largest mygalomorph
Theraphosa.size: body up to ~90 mm; leg span up to ~280 mm
Theraphosa.color: uniform dark brown to burgundy; dense urticating setae on abdomen
Theraphosa.key_mark: largest spider by mass; uniform dark brown with extraordinary bulk

Uroballus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; elongated tubular abdomen
Uroballus.color: brown or green abdomen with pale transverse segmental bands
Uroballus.key_mark: elongated banded abdomen closely mimics caterpillar body segments

Palystes.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs held crablike, no antennae; large huntsman form
Palystes.color: brown with pale sternum stripe; hairy banded legs
Palystes.key_mark: large S. African huntsman; female guards bulky parchment egg-sac nest

Sicarius.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; 6 eyes in 3 dyads, body flattened
Sicarius.color: uniform sand-tan; body often coated in adhered sand grains
Sicarius.key_mark: only 6 eyes in 3 paired dyads; buries flush in sand with eyes exposed

Clubiona.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; cylindrical tapering abdomen
Clubiona.color: uniform pale yellowish-brown to cream; no bold patterning
Clubiona.key_mark: plain unmarked pale sac spider; retreats into sealed silk tube

Eupalaestrus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae; terrestrial mygalomorph
Eupalaestrus.color: dark brown-black body with pale cream collar at pedicel junction
Eupalaestrus.key_mark: pale whitish collar band between carapace and abdomen on dark tarantula

Nuctenea.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; strongly flattened oval abdomen
Nuctenea.color: dark walnut-brown with pale angular folium on dorsal abdomen
Nuctenea.key_mark: distinctly flattened leaf-shaped dark abdomen; hides in bark crevices by day

Telamonia.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; compact salticid build
Telamonia.color: dark body with 2 bold pale longitudinal stripes running along abdomen
Telamonia.key_mark: two broad white stripes running the full length of the dark abdomen

Uroctea.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; flat rounded body
Uroctea.color: dark brown to black with 5 cream or yellow spots on dorsal abdomen
Uroctea.key_mark: 5 pale spots on dark abdomen; builds flat retreat under rocks

Eresus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae; dense velvety setae
Eresus.color: male: scarlet abdomen with 4 black spots; female: uniformly black
Eresus.key_mark: male's red abdomen with 4 black spots closely mimics a ladybird beetle

Cyclosa.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, conical rear abdominal tubercle
Cyclosa.color: mottled gray-brown and white, cryptic against debris
Cyclosa.key_mark: vertical trash-line of silk-wrapped debris running through web hub

Cyclosternum.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae, body densely setose
Cyclosternum.color: dark brown-black with contrasting yellow-gold tibial banding
Cyclosternum.key_mark: bold yellow-gold bands across dark leg segments on a large tarantula

Phrynarachne.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, first two pairs enlarged, crab posture
Phrynarachne.color: white and black irregular blotches over warty lumpy abdomen
Phrynarachne.key_mark: near-perfect bird-dropping mimic; warty irregular white-and-black texture

Agelena.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, prominent posterior spinnerets
Agelena.color: brown with paired pale longitudinal stripes on carapace and abdomen
Agelena.key_mark: flat sheet web with a tubular funnel retreat at one edge

Micrommata.structure: 2 body sections, 8 long laterally-splayed legs, no antennae, body flattened
Micrommata.color: uniform vivid leaf-green; males with red-and-yellow abdominal stripe
Micrommata.key_mark: solid brilliant green across entire large flattened body

Pystira.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, large anterior median eyes
Pystira.color: black-and-yellow abdominal banding mimicking a bumblebee
Pystira.key_mark: striking bumblebee-mimicking alternating black and yellow body bands

Hentzia.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, body notably elongated for a salticid
Hentzia.color: pale tan-cream with scattered dark flecks; male chelicerae iridescent green
Hentzia.key_mark: unusually narrow, elongated body distinguishes it among jumping spiders

Hyllus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 stout legs, no antennae, compact; large forward-facing eyes
Hyllus.color: dark brown-black with bold white or pale iridescent scale patches
Hyllus.key_mark: exceptionally large, heavy-bodied salticid with vivid pale scale markings

Metacyrba.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, compact with large anterior median eyes
Metacyrba.color: dark brown to black with pale longitudinal stripe along abdomen
Metacyrba.key_mark: pale median stripe running full length of a dark abdomen

Hasarius.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, no antennae, compact salticid build
Hasarius.color: dark brown-black with white lateral stripes and white rear abdominal spot
Hasarius.key_mark: white lateral stripes and bold white posterior abdominal spot on dark body

Togwoteeus.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 long legs, no antennae, no visible waist
Togwoteeus.key_mark: single pill-shaped body with no waist; legs long relative to body size

Harvestman.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 long slender legs, no antennae, eyes on median tubercle
Harvestman.color: brown, tan, or gray, often mottled or with dark dorsal saddle
Harvestman.key_mark: single unwaisted oval body; 8 legs but body never pinched like a spider

Phalangium.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 long legs, no antennae, median ocularium raised
Phalangium.color: gray-brown with dark dorsal saddle; flanks paler
Phalangium.key_mark: dark saddle on pale gray body; male's large horn-like chelicerae diagnostic

Leiobunum.structure: 1 tiny round body, 8 extremely long thread-thin legs, no antennae
Leiobunum.color: warm brown to tan body with darker dorsal mark; legs much paler
Leiobunum.key_mark: tiny circular body on hair-thin legs of extreme length; dot-on-stilts look

Opilio.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 long legs, no antennae, prominent central ocularium
Opilio.color: grayish-brown with reticulate or saddled dorsal pattern
Opilio.key_mark: raised central eye tubercle on fused oval body; pale sides, dark dorsum

Rilaena.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 legs, no antennae, broadly oval abdomen
Rilaena.color: pale greenish-tan with darker triangular dorsal marking
Rilaena.key_mark: adults present in spring only; pale body with dark triangular dorsal blotch

Nemastoma.structure: 1 compact oval body, 8 shorter stouter legs than phalangiids, no antennae
Nemastoma.color: jet black with two vivid cream to golden spots on anterior dorsum
Nemastoma.key_mark: two bright cream-gold spots on a jet-black body; distinctly tiny

Dicranopalpus.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 very long legs, no antennae, pedipalps distinctly forked
Dicranopalpus.color: mottled gray-brown; often rests spread-eagled flat against substrate
Dicranopalpus.key_mark: bifurcate pedipalps unlike those of any other European harvestman

Mitopus.structure: 1 fused oval body, 8 long legs, no antennae
Mitopus.color: pale tan-brown with sharply contrasting dark brown dorsal saddle
Mitopus.key_mark: strongly contrasting dark dorsal saddle stripe against pale mottled body

Phalces.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae, extremely elongated body
Phalces.color: green to brown cryptic twig-and-bark coloration
Phalces.key_mark: twig-like elongated body; freezes completely motionless when disturbed

Stick Insect.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, very long filiform antennae
Stick Insect.wings: wingless in most; some with short tegmina and folded hindwings
Stick Insect.color: cryptic green or brown matching twigs and bark

Clemacantha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 robust legs, long antennae
Clemacantha.color: green to dark brown with heavily textured cuticle
Clemacantha.key_mark: very large stick insect with strongly roughened tuberculate body

Onchestus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 slender legs, long antennae
Onchestus.key_mark: strongly bark-patterned mottling on elongated cylindrical body

Ctenomorpha.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, moderately long antennae
Ctenomorpha.wings: short tegmina with pale-margined fan-like hindwings
Ctenomorpha.color: gray-brown body; pale cream wing margin visible at rest
Ctenomorpha.key_mark: pale-edged wing margin forming lateral stripe along abdomen

Podacanthus.color: green body; brilliant pink hindwings revealed in flight
Podacanthus.key_mark: flash of vivid pink hindwings when disturbed or in flight

Argosarchus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 long spiny legs, long antennae
Argosarchus.wings: females wingless; males with vestigial stubs
Argosarchus.color: green to mottled brown with pale blotching
Argosarchus.key_mark: NZ's largest stick insect; spiny tuberculate femora

Eurycnema.structure: 3 body sections, 6 long legs, long antennae
Eurycnema.color: bright green body; hindwings red-pink with blue base
Eurycnema.key_mark: vivid red-pink and blue hindwings contrasting bright green body

Scolopocryptops.structure: many-segmented, ~21 leg pairs, long antennae, venomous forcipules
Scolopocryptops.key_mark: blue-gray underside sharply contrasting reddish-brown back

Centipede.structure: many-segmented body, 1 leg pair per segment, long antennae, forcipules
Centipede.color: orange-brown to reddish; some banded or dark
Centipede.key_mark: 1 leg pair per body segment plus venomous fang-like forcipules

Cormocephalus.structure: flattened, ~21 leg pairs, long antennae, stout forcipules
Cormocephalus.color: olive-brown body with bright red-orange head capsule
Cormocephalus.key_mark: vivid red-orange head capsule contrasting olive-brown body

Scolopendra.structure: flattened, 21 leg pairs, long antennae, large forcipules
Scolopendra.color: yellow-green to brown with contrasting banding and leg color
Scolopendra.key_mark: bold alternating segment banding; terminal leg pair elongated

Hemiscolopendra.structure: flattened, 21 leg pairs, long antennae, forcipules
Hemiscolopendra.color: turquoise to blue-green dorsum with pale lateral margins
Hemiscolopendra.key_mark: distinctive turquoise-blue flattened body with pale lateral margins

Ethmostigmus.structure: flattened, 21 leg pairs, long antennae, robust forcipules
Ethmostigmus.color: dark blue-black to brown body; legs bright yellow-orange
Ethmostigmus.key_mark: dark body with strikingly contrasting yellow-orange legs throughout

Philoscia.structure: oval segmented crustacean, 7 leg pairs, long and short antennae
Philoscia.color: brown with conspicuous pale median dorsal stripe; mottled flanks
Philoscia.key_mark: pale central stripe running full length of brown dorsum

Woodlouse.structure: oval flattened crustacean, 7 leg pairs, 2 antennae pairs
Woodlouse.color: gray to brown, often mottled or spotted
Woodlouse.key_mark: armored interlocking dorsal plates; only common terrestrial crustacean

Oniscus.structure: broad oval crustacean, 7 leg pairs, long antennae
Oniscus.color: shiny slate gray with irregular pale yellow marginal blotches
Oniscus.key_mark: shiny gray body with irregular yellow spots along lateral margins

Porcellio.structure: oval crustacean, 7 leg pairs, long antennae
Porcellio.color: gray to slate, sometimes orange-mottled; rough granular surface
Porcellio.key_mark: distinctly rough granular dorsal surface texture

Trachelipus.structure: oval crustacean, 7 leg pairs, long antennae
Trachelipus.color: gray-brown with pale lateral mottling and whitish pleopod covers
Trachelipus.key_mark: 2-segmented uropods projecting clearly from posterior end

Armadillidium.structure: domed oval crustacean, 7 leg pairs, moderate antennae
Armadillidium.color: slate gray to dark gray, sometimes pale-mottled
Armadillidium.key_mark: rolls into tight perfect sphere when disturbed

Eluma.structure: domed oval crustacean, 7 leg pairs, short antennae
Eluma.color: dark gray to black with distinctly velvety matte surface
Eluma.key_mark: velvety matte-black cuticle with sculpted ridged tergites

Platyarthrus.structure: oval flattened body, 14 legs, 2 antennae; blind, eyeless
Platyarthrus.color: pale whitish to cream, wholly unpigmented
Platyarthrus.key_mark: tiny blind white woodlouse found exclusively inside ant nests

Allograpta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, short aristate antennae; slender wasp-like abdomen
Allograpta.wings: 1 pair clear membranous wings; halteres; vena spuria (false vein) visible
Allograpta.color: black abdomen with yellow longitudinal streaks; yellow facial stripe
Allograpta.key_mark: yellow streaks run lengthwise on black abdomen, not as crossbands

Polydontomyia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, aristate antennae; male hind femora strongly bowed
Polydontomyia.wings: 1 pair clear membranous wings; halteres; vena spuria present
Polydontomyia.color: black abdomen with yellow transverse bands; pale thoracic vittae
Polydontomyia.key_mark: male hind legs curved into sickle shape — unique among hoverflies

Majangella.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (raptorial forelegs), long filiform antennae
Majangella.wings: 4 wings; tegmina leaf-textured green; hindwings membranous
Majangella.color: vivid green with irregular mossy lobes on legs and lateral thorax
Majangella.key_mark: large mantis with moss-mimicking leaf flanges on limbs and body

Iris.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs (raptorial forelegs), filiform antennae; slender
Iris.wings: 4 wings; hindwings with large blue-black false-eye, flashed in display
Iris.color: cryptic green or brown; hindwings vivid blue with bold ocellus
Iris.key_mark: deimatic display exposes vivid blue hindwing eyespot when threatened

Vostox.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, multisegmented antennae; terminal forceps present
Vostox.wings: short leathery tegmina; hindwings fan-folded beneath
Vostox.key_mark: small earwig; forceps tips bear distinct apical teeth

Canarilabis.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, multisegmented antennae; large forceps
Canarilabis.key_mark: large wingless earwig with notably asymmetric forceps

Polyzosteria.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long filiform antennae; flattened oval body
Polyzosteria.wings: tegmina reduced or absent; hindwings vestigial
Polyzosteria.color: dark brown-black with blue-green metallic iridescent sheen
Polyzosteria.key_mark: jewel-like metallic iridescence across dark cuticle

Loboptera.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; flattened oval body
Loboptera.wings: tegmina reduced to small lobes not covering abdomen; hindwings absent
Loboptera.color: dark brown with paler lateral pronotal margins
Loboptera.key_mark: tiny lobe-shaped tegmina expose most of the abdomen

Opisthoplatia.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; robust oval body
Opisthoplatia.wings: male fully winged; female with very short stub tegmina only
Opisthoplatia.color: dark brown to blackish, often pale-margined pronotum
Opisthoplatia.key_mark: extreme sexual dimorphism: female nearly wingless beside winged male

Laxta.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; extremely dorsoventrally flattened
Laxta.wings: male with full tegmina and hindwings; female entirely wingless
Laxta.key_mark: paper-thin flat profile for bark crevices; female fully apterous

Blaberus.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; very large robust oval body
Blaberus.wings: full-length tegmina and hindwings present in adults
Blaberus.color: tan-brown tegmina; pale pronotum with dark central blotch
Blaberus.key_mark: enormous size; dark blotch centered on pale pronotal disc

Blaptica.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; oval body
Blaptica.wings: male with full tegmina; female brachypterous with rudimentary stubs only
Blaptica.color: dark brown-black with irregular orange blotches on abdomen
Blaptica.key_mark: orange mottled abdomen on dark body; female has only tiny wing stubs

Pseudomops.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; slender oval body
Pseudomops.wings: full-length tegmina and hindwings in both sexes
Pseudomops.color: brown with cream-white border along pronotum and tegmina edges
Pseudomops.key_mark: crisp pale border frames the entire dark pronotum and wing covers

Oxyhaloa.structure: 3 body sections, 6 legs, long antennae; oval body
Oxyhaloa.wings: tegmina present but abbreviated; hindwings reduced
Oxyhaloa.color: bright reddish-orange head and pronotum; dark brown-black tegmina
Oxyhaloa.key_mark: vivid red-orange head sharply contrasting dark wing covers

Chihuahuanus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 walking legs, chelate pedipalps, stout tail with stinger
Chihuahuanus.color: yellowish-tan with dark longitudinal stripes on tail segments
Chihuahuanus.key_mark: striped tail segments; slender pincers; small pale desert scorpion

Smeringurus.structure: 2 body sections, 8 legs, robust chelate pedipalps, stout metasoma; no antennae
Smeringurus.color: pale sandy yellow to yellowish-brown overall
Smeringurus.key_mark: large pale sand scorpion; swollen robust pincers; glows blue-green under UV

Libitioides.structure: fused oval body (no waist), 8 long thin legs, tiny chelicerae; no antennae
Libitioides.color: brown with ornate cream-white patterning on scutum
Libitioides.key_mark: patterned armored scutum; single fused body oval with no spider-like waist

Rhysida.structure: flattened elongated body, ~21 leg pairs, long antennae; forcipules present
Rhysida.color: reddish-brown to orange body; legs conspicuously blue or blue-green
Rhysida.key_mark: blue-turquoise legs starkly contrasting reddish-brown body

Cryptops.structure: elongated flattened body, 21 leg pairs, short antennae, no eyes; forcipules present
Cryptops.key_mark: completely eyeless; last leg pair elongated and directed rearward

Theatops.structure: elongate multi-segmented body, 21 leg pairs, long segmented antennae, forcipules
Theatops.color: dark reddish-brown to brown, paler ventrally
Theatops.key_mark: greatly enlarged, thickened hind legs dwarfing anterior leg pairs

Rhyscotus.structure: oval convex body, 7 leg pairs, 2 antenna pairs (1 vestigial)
Rhyscotus.color: uniform gray-brown to pale tan, little patterning
Rhyscotus.key_mark: smooth, low-domed dorsum with indistinct segment margins

Pentidotea.structure: elongate flattened body, 7 leg pairs, 2 antenna pairs, uropods flanking telson
Pentidotea.color: cryptic green to dark brown, often matching host alga precisely
Pentidotea.key_mark: uropods forming flat lateral flanges that clasp paddle-shaped telson

Ligia.structure: oval-elongate body, 7 leg pairs, antennae nearly body length, long forked uropods
Ligia.color: gray to olive-brown, finely mottled or speckled dorsum
Ligia.key_mark: paired elongate uropods projecting rearward + extraordinarily long antennae

Littorophiloscia.structure: oval flattened body, 7 leg pairs, 2 antenna pairs
Littorophiloscia.color: brown to gray-brown with pale longitudinal mid-dorsal stripe
Littorophiloscia.key_mark: continuous pale stripe running full length of dorsal midline
